c8162e17.title: Lead Full Stack Architect (Founding Engineering Team)
c8162e17.description:
Lead Full Stack Architect (Founding Engineering Team)

**Company:** Business Sarthi

**Location:** Gurugram, Haryana (Hybrid)

**Experience:** 7–10 Years

**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

**Compensation:** As per Industry best practices \& standards

About Business Sarthi

Business Sarthi is building **India's first AI\-powered Business Operating System**—a new category of enterprise technology designed to transform how businesses discover opportunities, make decisions, and execute operations.

Our vision is to build an intelligent operating system that connects AI, business intelligence, enterprise workflows, automation, and digital ecosystems into a single unified experience.

We're looking for passionate engineers who want to build a category\-defining product from the ground up and become part of our founding engineering leadership team.

The Opportunity

As the **Lead Full Stack Architect**, you will own the product engineering architecture and lead the design, development, and delivery of Business Sarthi.

This is a hands\-on technical leadership role where you'll shape the engineering foundation of our platform while mentoring developers, establishing engineering standards, and driving product quality.

You'll work closely with the founders, product teams, and platform engineers to deliver scalable, secure, and high\-performing enterprise applications.

Key Responsibilities

Product Architecture

* Design scalable enterprise\-grade application architecture.
* Define technology standards, coding guidelines, and development best practices.
* Design modular, reusable, and maintainable software components.
* Drive architectural decisions for new products and features.

Full Stack Development

* Build high\-performance web applications using modern frontend frameworks.
* Develop scalable backend services and RESTful APIs.
* Design and implement microservices\-based architecture.
* Integrate external APIs, enterprise systems, and third\-party services.

Engineering Excellence

* Lead code reviews and enforce coding standards.
* Improve application performance, scalability, and reliability.
* Optimize application security and maintainability.
* Drive technical debt reduction initiatives.

Product Delivery

* Translate business requirements into technical solutions.
* Estimate effort, plan releases, and deliver high\-quality software.
* Collaborate with Product Managers, UX Designers, QA, and DevOps teams.
* Ensure timely and predictable project delivery.

Database \& Integration

* Design PostgreSQL schemas and optimize queries.
* Build secure APIs and integration services.
* Work with messaging systems and asynchronous processing where required.

Leadership \& Mentoring

* Mentor developers and conduct technical coaching sessions.
* Drive engineering culture focused on quality, ownership, and continuous improvement.
* Participate in hiring, technical interviews, and engineering planning.

Required Technical SkillsFrontend

* React.js
* Next.js
* TypeScript
* JavaScript (ES6\+)
* HTML5
* CSS3
* Tailwind CSS

Backend

* Node.js (NestJS/Express) **or**
* Java (Spring Boot)
* REST APIs
* GraphQL (Good to Have)
* Microservices Architecture

Database

* PostgreSQL
* SQL Optimization
* Database Design
* JSONB
* Indexing
* Performance Tuning

Architecture

* Microservices
* API\-First Design
* Domain\-Driven Design (DDD)
* Event\-Driven Architecture (Preferred)
* Design Patterns
* Scalable System Design

Cloud \& DevOps

* Docker
* Kubernetes (Basic Working Knowledge)
* Git
* CI/CD
* Linux
* NGINX

Security

* OAuth2
* JWT
* RBAC
* API Security
* Secure Coding Practices

Preferred Skills

* AI/LLM Integration (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, etc.)
* OpenSearch / Elasticsearch
* Vector Databases (pgvector)
* Redis
* Kafka / RabbitMQ
* ERPNext / Frappe Framework
* SaaS Multi\-Tenant Architecture
* Government API Integrations
* Performance Engineering

Required Experience

* 7–10 years of Full Stack Software Development experience.
* Strong experience designing enterprise\-scale applications.
* Hands\-on experience with React/Next.js and Node.js or Java Spring Boot.
* Proven experience building scalable SaaS or enterprise platforms.
* Strong understanding of modern software architecture patterns.
* Experience leading development teams and mentoring engineers.

Who Should Apply

You'll thrive in this role if you:

* Think like an architect, not just a developer.
* Enjoy solving complex business and engineering challenges.
* Can balance speed with engineering quality.
* Have experience building products from concept to production.
* Take ownership beyond your immediate responsibilities.
* Want to build technology that creates long\-term impact.

Why Join Business Sarthi?

* Build India's next\-generation AI\-powered Business Operating System.
* Join the founding engineering leadership team.
* Work directly with experienced founders.
* Influence product architecture and technology strategy.
* Build a platform that serves enterprises at national scale.
* Opportunity to grow into **Principal Architect**, **Engineering Manager**, or **VP Engineering**.

Salary \& Benefits

**CTC:** As per Industry best practices \& standards

Additional Benefits:

* Annual Performance Bonus
* Hybrid Work Model
* Learning \& Certification Sponsorship
* Premium Development assets
* Opportunity to build and lead engineering teams

Preferred Candidate Profile

* **Notice Period:** Immediate to 60 days preferred
* **Location:** Delhi NCR preferred (or willing to relocate to Gurugram)
* **Education:** B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech in Computer Science, IT, or related discipline

Pay: ₹1,800,000\.00 \- ₹2,700,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Health insurance
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Application Question(s):

* Please share your current CTC and expected salary along with notice period

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Gurgaon, Haryana

e575bc84.title: Senior Service Delivery Manager
e575bc84.description:
We are seeking an experienced Service Delivery Manager to oversee the end\-to\-end delivery of IT services, ensuring alignment with project objectives and client expectations. The ideal candidate will have hands\-on experience in at least one of the following engagements: BI/DW, DWH, Data Warehousing, Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, Data Projects, Data Management, or Data Governance.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Oversee end\-to\-end delivery of IT services, ensuring alignment with project objectives and client expectations
* Act as the primary point of contact for clients, addressing escalations, service issues, and improvement initiatives
* Manage project delivery within defined scope, timelines, and budget, ensuring adherence to SLAs and KPIs
* Monitor service delivery costs and budgets, ensuring resources are allocated efficiently and expenses remain within budget constraints
* Identify opportunities for cost optimization and value creation for both the client and the organization
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams including engineering, QA, and operations to deliver high\-quality solutions
* Monitor and report on service performance metrics, identifying areas for improvement and implementing corrective actions
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance efficiency, quality, and client satisfaction
* Identify and mitigate risks to service delivery, implementing proactive measures to ensure smooth operations
* Lead regular status reviews with stakeholders, providing clear and concise updates on project progress
* Ensure compliance with organizational standards, policies, and ITIL best practices
* Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to foster trust and long\-term partnerships
* Stay updated with industry trends and best practices in service delivery management; attend conferences, workshops, and training sessions

3456022f.title: Delivery Lead
3456022f.description:
We are seeking an
 **AVP / SAVP of Analytics Delivery \& Operations** 
 to act as the "Chief Operating Officer" of our analytics organization. In this highly enterprising, executive role, you will have master oversight of global analytics delivery across all client PODs. You will utilize a balanced and data\-driven approach to intervene in operations, providing critical mitigation strategies to ensure revenue goals and fiscal forecasts are met. You will partner closely with POD account managers and analytics teams to engineer tactical solutions that evolve into enterprise\-grade strategic frameworks.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Analytics Delivery Oversight \& Revenue Realization** 



* **Master Delivery Management:** 
 Oversee end\-to\-end analytics delivery across multiple client PODs, ensuring operational excellence, strict quality control, and the seamless execution of data\-driven solutions.
* **Crisis Mitigation \& Revenue Remediation:** 
 Act as the ultimate escalation point for operational variances. Design and execute objective, data\-driven revenue remediation plans to overcome complex fiscal shortfalls and ensure precise forecast accuracy across major healthcare accounts.
* **Enterprising Partnership:** 
 Partner aggressively with POD Account Managers and commercial leaders to align analytics delivery directly with client P\&L objectives, ensuring all commissioned revenue goals are achieved or exceeded.



**2\. Tactical Interventions \& Strategic Framework Architecture** 



* **Tactical Problem Solving:** 
 Dive deep into specific POD challenges to devise immediate, tactical analytics solutions (e.g., targeted SQL rules, rapid hospital profiling, or data deep\-dives) that course\-correct performance gaps.
* **Framework Evolution:** 
 Systematically harvest successful tactical interventions from individual PODs and architect them into scalable, strategic analytics frameworks that can be deployed across the broader enterprise portfolio.



**3\. Operational Excellence \& Automation** 



* **Drive Automation:** 
 Spearhead the continuous automation of delivery pipelines and operational reporting across all POD analytics teams to maximize efficiency and reduce manual overhead.
* **Next\-Gen Integration:** 
 Champion the integration of advanced technologies, including the deployment of Agentic AI frameworks and automated decision engines, to accelerate pattern mining and shift\-left capabilities within the delivery lifecycle.
* **Resource \& Capacity Management:** 
 Optimize resource allocation, talent deployment, and cross\-pollination of skills across various PODs to maintain a high\-performing, agile organizational structure.



  





**Summary of Qualifications** 




 The ideal candidate is a seasoned, operational powerhouse with
 **15\+ years** 
 of overall experience in analytics delivery, operations management, and enterprise consulting.
 


* **Leadership Experience:** 
 10\+ years of experience leading large\-scale analytics delivery organizations, acting in a COO or senior delivery oversight capacity.
* **Consulting \& Operations Pedigree:** 
 Deep expertise in managing complex operational matrices, mitigating delivery risks, and partnering with account management to drive revenue.
* **Domain Expertise:** 
 Profound understanding of the US Healthcare value chain, specifically Payment Integrity, Payers, and Providers. Proven track record of managing multi\-million dollar revenue portfolios in an outcome\-driven environment.
* **Education:** 
 MBA from a Top Tier B\-school is strongly preferred, or an advanced degree in Engineering, Mathematics, Operations Research, or Business Administration.



  





**Core Skillsets \& Competencies** 



* **Operational Command:** 
 Exceptional capability to oversee massive, concurrent data operations and step in with objective, unbiased, and data\-driven mitigation strategies when targets are at risk.
* **Advanced Analytics Foundation:** 
 Deep understanding of the analytics lifecycle (SQL, Python, Databricks, AI/ML pipelines) to effectively guide technical teams and evaluate tactical solutions.
* **Commercial \& P\&L Acumen:** 
 Enterprising mindset with a strong grasp of business optimization, financial forecasting, and ROI realization within commission\-based revenue models.
* **Framework Development:** 
 Unique ability to bridge the gap between "in\-the\-weeds" tactical execution and high\-level strategic framework development.
* **Executive Communication:** 
 Excellent written and verbal communication, capable of driving consensus among internal POD leaders, account managers, and executive stakeholders.

e9750862.title: Technical Delivery Manager
e9750862.description:
Here at Appian, our values of
 **Intensity** 
 and
 **Excellence** 
 define who we are. We set high standards and live up to them, ensuring that everything we do is done with care and quality. We approach every challenge with ambition and commitment, holding ourselves and each other accountable to achieve the best results. When you join Appian, you’ll be part of a passionate team dedicated to accomplishing hard things, together.
 



  
 



 Appian is looking for a hands\-on Technical Delivery Manager to provide post\-sales ownership over multiple accounts and support our growing business. 
 



 As a leader within Appian's Customer Success organization, you will be responsible for the delivery of projects utilizing Appian's cutting edge technology. 
 



 Your focus will be spread across multiple customers and you’ll work directly with key project and executive stakeholders throughout the entire project life\-cycle to ensure client satisfaction and adoption. You will also play a significant role in supporting new business software and services opportunities.
 



 The TDM will also play an important role in mood orchestration, fostering a culture of positivity, high performance and collaboration aligned to Appian’s values. They will also work extensively with our people, providing coaching, actionable feedback and mentoring to support their career progression and development within Appian.
 



**Basic qualifications:** 



* 8\+ years of experience in an BPM/ SaaS project delivery management.
* 5\+ years of team management experience.
* 3\+ years of exp collaborating with cross functional teams ( Architects/ product designers to design and deliver compelling solutions for customers)
* Strong technical acumen in BPM/ SaaS
* Bachelor degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, Mathematics or related field/degree.
* Willingness to travel.



**Preferred Qualification:** 



* **2\+** 
 Years of pre\-sales experience.
* Experience understanding customer’s strategic goals, positioning technology to meet their goals, developing application roadmaps with customers, and building compelling business cases to understand investments.
* Industry\-experience in one or more of the following industries: Financial Services, Pharmaceuticals, Insurance, Manufacturing (Preferred)



**To be successful in this role, you will:** 



* Oversee the delivery of Appian projects to ensure deployment matches client executive and business sponsor expectations.
* Mentor a team and manage multiple large\-scale projects simultaneously, nurturing them from inception to launch while collaborating with stakeholders and establishing realistic development guidelines.
* Interface with Appian Sales, Marketing, Engineering, Product Management, and Product Support.
* Work with delivery partners within the region to augment Appian led engagements with partner resources as well as to supplement partner led engagements with Appian resources.
* Prior experience in delivering Appian engagements will be an added advantage.




**Tools and Resources** 




* Training and Development: During onboarding, we focus on equipping new hires with the skills and knowledge for success through department\-specific training. Continuous learning is a central focus at Appian, with dedicated mentorship and the First\-Friend program being widely utilized resources for new hires.
* Growth Opportunities: Appian provides a diverse array of growth and development opportunities, including our leadership program tailored for new and aspiring managers, a comprehensive library of specialized department training through Appian University, skills based training, and tuition reimbursement for those aiming to advance their education. This commitment ensures that employees have access to a holistic range of development opportunities.
* Community: We’ll immerse you into our community rooted in respect starting on day one. Appian fosters inclusivity through our 8 employee\-led affinity groups. These groups help employees build stronger internal and external networks by planning social, educational, and outreach activities to connect with Appianites and larger initiatives throughout the company.



**Benefits**




 Appian offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your health, wellbeing, and financial future. Benefits may include health coverage, Employee Assistance Program (EAP) with free mental health support, life and disability insurance, an Employee Stock Purchase Program (ESPP), a retirement/pension plan, wellness dollars, tuition reimbursement, family\-forming benefits and more. Benefits vary by country—please ask your Talent Acquisition contact for details specific to the location you are applying to.
 




**About Appian** 





 Appian provides process automation technology. We automate complex processes in large enterprises and governments. Our platform is known for its unique reliability and scale. We’ve been automating processes for 25 years and understand enterprise operations like no one else. For more information, visit appian.com. \[Nasdaq: APPN]
 



 Follow Appian: LinkedIn, Youtube, Instagram, Facebook
 



*Appian is an equal opportunity employer that strives to attract and retain the best talent. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law.* 




*Appian provides reasonable accommodations to applicants in accordance with all applicable laws. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the employment process, please contact us by email at ReasonableAccommodations@appian.com. Please note that only inquiries concerning a request for reasonable accommodation will be responded to from this email address.* 




*Appian's Applicant \& Candidate Privacy Notice*

 Firstsource Solutions Limited, an RP\-Sanjiv Goenka Group company (NSE: FSL, BSE: 532809, Reuters: FISO.BO, Bloomberg: FSOL:IN), is a specialized global business process services partner, providing transformational solutions and services spanning the customer lifecycle across Healthcare, Banking and Financial Services, Communications, Media and Technology, Retail, and other diverse industries. * Shape commercial constructs: FTE/Txn/Outcome/Gainshare; drive unit economics (productivity, automation, right\-shoring).
* Pipeline governance with Sales/Solutions; forecast ramps, seasonality, attrition, cost\-to\-serve.


**Operations Leadership (800\+ FTE)**
* Run multi\-site middle/back\-office for Life \& Annuities (new business, U/W support, policy admin/servicing, claims, commissions, reconciliation) and Retirement support (recordkeeping ops), plus omnichannel contact center (voice/email/chat/social).
* SLA rigor: accuracy, TAT, AHT, FCR, CSAT/NPS, QA, backlog/RTE, shrinkage, WFM capacity models, manage delivery penalty and earn back regimes.
* Business continuity/DR, change \& incident management.


**Client Leadership \& Governance**
* Executive sponsor for CXO/COO\-level stakeholders; run QBRs/MBRs, contract adherence, scope/change control.
* Proactive risk registers; regulatory readiness; expansion roadmaps and upsell/cross\-sell motions.


**Transformation, Automation \& GenAI**
* Roadmap across value chain: Lean Six Sigma, RPA (UiPath/AA/Blue Prism), IDP (ABBYY/Hyperscience), GenAI (Azure OpenAI/Bedrock/Vertex).
* Use cases:
+ Underwriting: requirements triage, medical/APS summarization, decision support.
+ Claims: adjudication assistance, fraud flags, FNOL ingestion.
+ Servicing: STP uplift, premium/commission reconciliation automation.
+ Contact Center: agent assist, knowledge retrieval, QA automation, sentiment/NBA.

* Instrument benefits: STP%, automation rate, NIGO reduction, cycle time, $ savings.


**New Business \& Solutioning (RFI/RFP)**
* Lead RFI/RFP responses; design operating model, SLAs, tech stack, locations, transitions, pricing, risk mitigations.
* Conduct due diligence; build transformation\-backed TCO/ROI narratives; executive orals \& site tours.


**People \& Culture**
* Build leadership bench (GM/DGM/SDM); scale competency academies (LOMA ALMI/FLMI, COPC).
* Engagement \& retention at scale; succession planning; DE\&I; performance \& rewards architecture.


**Risk, Compliance \& Controls**
* Ensure GLBA, HIPAA/PHI (if applicable), AML/KYC, OFAC, state DOI compliance; for Retirement, align to ERISA/DOL expectations.
* Maintain SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI DSS (payments), ISO 9001/COPC QMS; audit readiness.


**Required Qualifications**
* 20\+ years BFSI operations; 10\+ years in Life, Annuities \& Retirement.
* Proven leadership of ≥800 FTE multi\-site delivery and $30M\+ offshore P\&L.
* Deep domain across L\&A middle/back\-office \+ contact center; strong WFM and service design.
* Hands\-on transformation (Lean SS, RPA/IDP, GenAI) with quantified outcomes.
* Deal solutioning with authored RFI/RFP wins; transitions to steady\-state at scale.
* Executive client management; commercial negotiation; crisis management.
* Familiar with policy admin platforms (ALIP/VPAS/LifePro), CX tech (Genesys/NICE/Amazon Connect/Five9\), analytics.


**Preferred Certifications:** 
**LOMA ALMI/FLMI** 
 ,
 **Lean Six Sigma Black Belt** 
 ,
 **COPC** 
 ,
 **PMP/PRINCE2** 
 , RPA vendor certs,
 **ITIL** 
 .
   

  

**KPIs**
* Financial: Revenue growth, EBITDA, cost\-to\-serve, transformation savings ($).
* Ops: SLA attainment, accuracy, TAT, AHT/FCR, backlog, rework, STP%.
* Digital: Automation rate, IDP accuracy, GenAI adoption \& benefits.
* Client: CSAT/NPS, renewals/expansions, governance health.
* People: Attrition, engagement, leadership bench, time\-to\-proficiency.


**Education**
* Bachelor’s degree required; MBA preferred.
* LOMA certifications will provide an edge

33f999b6.title: Learning Delivery Lead
33f999b6.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are seeking for an experienced Learning Delivery Lead to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for day‑to‑day administration and execution of learning delivery activities for a global, multi‑country client population.
   

  

 In this role you will play a key role in:
   

  

* Learning Request Management \& Case Handling
* Receive and process learning delivery requests through established case‑based workflows.
* Perform end‑to‑end learning administration activities within agreed KPIs and SLAs.
* Maintain accurate case documentation, status updates, and timely closure of requests.
* LMS Administration \& Learning Setup
* Perform operational actions in the Learning Management System (LMS)
* Set up instructor‑led and virtual learning sessions in line with approved procedures.
* Ensure learning offerings are visible, correctly configured, and ready for learner access.
* Coordinate learning session logistics


**Your Profile**
* 7–9 years of relevant experience in Learning Operations, HR Operations, Shared Services, or Managed Services environments.
* Hands‑on experience supporting learning delivery administration for global or multi‑country populations.
* Experience working in a case‑based, ticket‑driven delivery model.
* Client‑servicing experience in a structured delivery environment is strongly preferred.
* Working knowledge of Workday Learning Management Systems (LMS); experience with enterprise LMS platforms preferred.
* Familiarity with instructor‑led and virtual learning delivery models.
* Experience managing learning records, attendance, completion, and reporting.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* We’re committed to ensure that people of all backgrounds feel encouraged and have a sense of belonging at Capgemini. You are valued for who you are, and you can bring your original self to work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \| www.capgemini.com

c9668cce.title: Senior Delivery Manager
c9668cce.description:
We are looking for a Senior Delivery Manager will define, scope and manage one or more projects of medium size/complexity and will work with senior leadership, engineering and key stakeholders to ensure technical and/or business objectives are achieved. Typical projects may include the entire lifecycle from requirements through to deployment or specific parts of the lifecycle of a larger project. Typical project complexity/size will 6\-12 months duration and involve up to 10 FTEs across one or more locations.
   

  

**About You – Experience, Education, Skills, And Accomplishments**
* You have 5\+ years of IT Project Management experience managing technology projects; 2\+ years of experience in agile methodology and frameworks such as Scrum, Kanban, Scaled Agile (SAFe) etc.
* CSM, SAFe, PMP, PSM or SSM certification (preferred not mandatory)
* Proven ability to lead groups and individuals working in different locations and time zones globally.
* Strong oral and written communication skills; excellent problem solving and analytical skills.
* Proven ability to drive project planning and execution process and add value beyond just a task\-oriented doer or project manager.
* Familiarity with systems development lifecycle (SDLC)
* Proven ability to function in a fast moving and rapidly evolving environment.
* You have 3 years’ experience working with team(s)/project(s) and have a well\-understood approach to planning and forecasting at both ticket and project level (including capacity planning, timelines, dependency management).
* You have 3 years’ experience as a good listener with strong mediation and relationship\-mending skills who can identify issues in the team dynamics and skill sets and can rectify them.
* You have experience with Jira, Confluence, and Microsoft Teams.
* Bachelor’s Degree preferred.


**It Would Be Great If You Also Had**
* Understanding/exposure to Agile transformation within organization.
* Exposure working with multi\-cultural, global, and remote teams along with ability to adapt to change.
* Working with development teams on daily basis.
* Detailed knowledge of software development/delivery lifecycle (SDLC) \& agile best practices (like DevOps, BDD, CI/CD, …).
* Goals to pursue a PMP/SAFe SM certification.


**What will you be doing in this role?**
* Lead and coach project teams and drive successful delivery of highest value features.
* Develop schedule that support the business objectives, timelines, budgets, resources, milestones, and project deliverables.
* Lead teams in implementing Scrum in order to maximize velocity. Work with Product Owner to ensure highest value features are delivered at agreed time.
* Actively participate in assisting the team resolving issues and escalate as needed.
* Prepare and conduct periodic project status reports to update project governance teams and executive management regularly on progress, risks and issues
* Manages project execution to achieve highest value project deliverables within the established schedule and budget.
* Track progress on a daily basis through burn up, burn down and velocity tracking. Understand and help manage product back log.
* Advocate of strong and effective project management standards, disciplines and rigor with other Clarivate Analytics team members


**What product will you be developing?**
 You will be a part of the Delivery Team and potentially work with any of the Life Sciences \& Healthcare development teams.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Your primary team is the Delivery Management Team but in our matrix organization, you will be assigned to one or more Delivery Teams under Life Sciences \& Healthcare (Teams working on building a software product and inclusive of all required functions) based on the requirements and business priorities.
   

  

**Hours of Work**
 40\-hours per week, minimum 2 days in the Bangalore office per week (as per current norms, this may change in future as per company guidelines), permanent full\-time position
   

  

 At Clarivate, we are committed to providing equal employment opportunities for all qualified persons with respect to hiring, compensation, promotion, training, and other terms, conditions, and privileges of employment. We comply with applicable laws and regulations governing non\-discrimination in all locations.

0e4a437a.title: Senior Manager_DevOps and Cloud Platform Engineering_Pune
0e4a437a.description:
**Who we are**
--------------



VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
  

As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
  

We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
  

\#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture

**About this Role**
-------------------



We are seeking a highly experienced technology professional to lead end\-to\-end DevOps, cloud, and platform engineering capabilities across key VOIS markets. This role focuses on driving large\-scale transformation through automation, cloud adoption, and resilient infrastructure practices, ensuring alignment with organisational strategy, operational excellence, and industry\-leading standards.

**What you’ll do**
------------------


* Lead CI/CD strategy, pipeline design, and automated deployment across multiple applications
* Drive adoption of DevOps practices including automation, Infrastructure as Code, version control, and release orchestration
* Define and execute cloud strategies across AWS, Azure, or GCP, including migration and optimisation
* Design and implement cloud\-native architectures leveraging microservices, containers, and Kubernetes
* Oversee hybrid infrastructure operations, ensuring high availability, resilience, and scalability
* Establish site reliability engineering practices including SLAs, SLOs, observability, and incident management
* Enable AI and automation use cases such as AIOps and predictive monitoring
* Lead cross\-functional teams across DevOps, cloud, and infrastructure domains in a global environment
* Partner with business, product, and architecture teams to deliver scalable solutions
* Drive continuous improvement through KPIs such as deployment success, availability, and MTTR
* Ensure governance, compliance, and security adherence across systems and processes
* Standardise engineering and operational practices across regions and teams
**Who you are**
---------------


* Proven experience (12\+ years) in DevOps, cloud, infrastructure, and platform engineering
* Strong expertise in CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab
* Deep understanding of cloud platforms and container technologies including Kubernetes and OpenShift
* Experience in infrastructure automation using Terraform, Ansible, or scripting
* Knowledge of AI/ML applications in IT operations, including AIOps
* Strong understanding of microservices architecture and API\-driven systems
* Experience in incident management, reliability engineering, and ITIL processes
* Demonstrated ability to manage large\-scale, distributed enterprise systems
* Strong stakeholder engagement and communication skills across global teams
* Experience leading multi\-disciplinary engineering teams and driving capability development
**Not a perfect fit?**
----------------------



Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.

**What's in it for you**
------------------------


* Opportunity to lead transformation initiatives across global markets
* Exposure to cutting\-edge cloud, automation, and AI\-driven technologies
* Collaborative environment working with cross\-functional global teams
* Ability to influence technology strategy and drive impactful outcomes
* Continuous learning and professional growth in an evolving technology landscape
**What skills you will learn**
------------------------------


* Advanced cloud architecture and large\-scale platform engineering
* AI\-driven operations and automation strategies
* Enterprise\-level DevOps and CI/CD optimisation
* Strategic stakeholder management across global environments
* Leadership in driving transformation, innovation, and operational excellence
**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
----------------------------------------------



Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.

**Join Us**
-----------



At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
  

We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
  

With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

**Alert**
---------

Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
  

\#JDEnhancedByTARA

**Follow us on social media**
-----------------------------


* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/

8f55d295.title: Client Solutions Manager, Amazon Advertising
8f55d295.description:
**Description**
 mazon Advertising operates at the intersection of eCommerce and advertising, offering a rich array of digital display and video advertising solutions with the goal of helping our customers find and discover anything they want to buy. We help advertisers reach customers on Amazon.in, users of Amazon FireTv and MiniTV and other high quality sites across the web (via Amazon DSP). We put the customer at the heart of everything we do and work backwards, including in advertising.
   

  

 If you’re obsessed with being a part of digital advertising that informs instead of interrupts; that helps customers deliver great products and brands, not just delivers impressions; and that empowers customers to be decisive, rather than distracts them then we want you to come join us and make advertising even better.
   

  

**About Role**
 We are looking for a hands\-on, creative, detail\-oriented, analytical, and highly\-motivated client solutions manager to help scale our growing advertising business. You will work with advertisers and other Amazon business partners to manage media campaigns, ensure strong campaign performance and deliver positive return on investment for our emerging and growing advertisers. You will also lead dedicated programs to scale display advertising.
   

  

 You should be passionate about understanding business drivers for advertising performance, the range of Amazon products available to our advertisers and engaging with internal and external partners to deliver on these. This is an advertiser facing role that is also responsible for identifying opportunities to drive incremental revenue and long\-term growth. You will deliver consultative solutions for your advertisers earning their trust by educating them on how to be successful via Amazon Ad Products.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 The responsibilities of the Client Solutions Manager would comprise of:
   

  

 Engage with CXOs/Ecommerce \& Marketing heads of large brands within the category and act as an Amazon Advertising consultant and product expert. Consult and educate advertisers with insights and solutions to achieve greater results on Amazon
   

  

 Leverage our suite of rich data, targeting and product channels to collaborate with the other teams in the development of tailored solutions that meet clients’ goals
   

  

 Own end\-to\-end key business metrics like ad revenue and active advertisers for a complete category for Amazon advertising (Display and Video Ads)
   

  

 Create and drive processes and initiatives to differentiate Amazon as an advertising destination and improve advertiser impact
   

  

 Lead initiatives which require significant cross team collaboration
   

  

 Serve as a source of market intelligence for other areas of the Advertising team (e.g., product development, product marketing, pricing) and assist in the development of best practices and operational efficiencies
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience in advertising
* MBA


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working in e\-commerce
* Experience in operations, account management, or analytics


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ASSPL \- Maharashtra \- C32
   

  

 Job ID: A10435366

b8e5dea0.title: Technical Program Manager, Product and Platform Management
b8e5dea0.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.
* Experience leading technical discussions and plans.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* 8 years of experience in technical program management with emerging technologies.
* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Ability to own and deliver complex, cross\-functional technical programs end\-to\-end.
* Excellent ability to influence without authority and drive consensus across engineering, product, and UX.
* Exceptional communication skills, articulating complex topics to technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Skilled in navigating ambiguity, proactively identifying and mitigating risks, and managing dependencies.

**About the job**
-----------------


A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.


In gTech Users and Products (gUP), our mission is to advocate for Google’s users by creating helpful and trusted experiences across the product ecosystem.


As a Technical Program Manager (TPM) in the gUP TSI Program Management Office (PMO), you will lead and drive the execution of complex, cross\-functional programs critical to gUP's top priorities. You will take ownership of significant initiatives, potentially spanning areas like the Generative AI\-powered help guide, enhancing User Voice feedback systems, or refining engineering operations and governance frameworks.


You will collaborate closely with Engineering, Product Management, and UX teams to define program scope, develop detailed execution plans, manage dependencies, mitigate risks, and ensure on\-time delivery. This role requires a strong ability to manage ambiguity, influence stakeholders without direct authority, and make sound technical judgments. You will be responsible for driving alignment across teams, communicating progress effectively, and proactively solving problems to keep high\-impact programs on track. We are looking for an experienced TPM who can operate independently and contribute to improving program management practices within TSI.


In gTech Users and Products (gUP), our mission is to advocate for Google’s users by creating helpful and trusted experiences across the product ecosystem. We achieve this by meeting partners and consumers where they are with support and help, representing their needs with our product partners and proposing fixes and features that elevate their engagement with Google's diverse product ecosystem. Additionally we provide a range of product services that ensure our products are optimized for every user, no matter where they are in the world (e.g., localization, digitization, partner integration and more).

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Drive and own the delivery of complex, high\-impact programs, from technical scoping and design through global launch, landing, and maintenance.
* Apply deep technical understanding to proactively identify and resolve complex system\-level blockers, guiding technical decisions within Generative AI architecture, prompt engineering, and data pipelines.
* Influence and align cross\-functional teams (Engineering, Product, UX) and stakeholders on program goals, technical approaches, and priorities, driving consensus and unblocking progress.
* Contribute to product and program strategy by identifying opportunities, defining clear project goals, and ensuring alignment with broader gUP objectives.
* Design, implement, and drive adoption of scalable frameworks, best practices, and data\-driven OKRs to improve program execution, monitor health, and enhance communication with leadership.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

5e956ae5.title: Technical Program Manager II- Eng
5e956ae5.description:
Job description
 Company and benefits


Job ID
TECHN019288
Employment Type
Regular
Work Style
hybrid
Location
Noida,UP,India
Role
Technical Program Manager II\- Eng
Why UKG:


At UKG, the work you do matters. The code you ship, the decisions you make, and the care you show a customer all add up to real impact. Today, tens of millions of workers start and end their days with our workforce operating platform. Helping people get paid, grow in their careers, and shape the future of their industries. That’s what we do.


We never stop learning. We never stop challenging the norm. We push for better, and we celebrate the wins along the way. Here, you’ll get flexibility that’s real, benefits you can count on, and a team that succeeds together. Because at UKG, your work matters—and so do you.
  

  

About the Role
  

We are seeking a Technical Program Manager to support our Release Management function. In this role, you will partner closely with a Staff and Senior Technical Program Managers and collaborate with engineering and cross\-functional teams to help coordinate software releases for the UKG Pro Suite.
  

This is an excellent opportunity for someone early in their career who is passionate about software delivery, enjoys solving complex coordination challenges, and wants to grow their program management skills in a fast\-paced SaaS environment. The ideal candidate is organized, curious, eager to learn, and interested in modern software development practices, including Agile, CI/CD, evolving Agentic SDLC workflows, and AI\-assisted ways of working.
  

As UKG continues to evolve toward AI\-assisted and agent\-driven software delivery, this role offers a unique opportunity to help shape the future of Release Management. You'll work alongside experienced Technical Program Managers to leverage AI to streamline operations, improve engineering efficiency, and contribute to the adoption of Agentic SDLC practices across the organization.
  

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
  

Responsibilities
  

* Support planning and coordination of software releases across multiple engineering teams.
* Partner with engineering and technical program management teams to track release milestones, dependencies, and deliverables.
* Maintain release plans, documentation, and communications to help ensure predictable, high\-quality software releases.
* Create and maintain JIRA queries, dashboards, and reports to provide visibility into release health, risks, and overall release progress.
* Help identify release risks, dependencies, and blockers, escalating issues to the appropriate stakeholders when needed.
* Assist in facilitating release readiness activities, cross\-functional meetings, and stakeholder communications.
* Drive continuous improvement by identifying opportunities to simplify release processes, automate repetitive tasks, and leverage AI to reduce manual effort and improve operational efficiency.
* Learn and apply modern Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) practices, including various engineering methodologies, CI/CD, DevOps principles, and emerging Agentic SDLC concepts.
* Use AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, or similar technologies to improve documentation, reporting, communication, analysis, workflow automation, and day\-to\-day productivity.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
  

Requirements
  

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, Business, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Foundational understanding of modern software development practices, including the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), Agile methodologies, and CI/CD concepts.
* Interest in emerging engineering practices, including Agentic SDLC and AI\-assisted software delivery.
* Experience using JIRA, including creating filters, queries, dashboards, and reports.
* Comfort using generative AI tools (such as Claude, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, or similar) to improve productivity, communication, documentation, analysis, and workflow automation.
* Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities and adapt in a fast\-paced environment.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across technical and non\-technical teams.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and critical thinking skills with attention to detail.
* Demonstrated curiosity, initiative, adaptability, and a passion for continuous learning and process improvement.
* Ability to perform in a hybrid\-office role, requiring three or more days per week in the office.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
  

Preferred Qualifications
  

* Internship, academic project, open\-source contribution, or equivalent experience working with software development teams.
* Familiarity with release management concepts in a SaaS environment.
* Experience using collaboration and engineering tools such as Confluence, GitHub, TestRail, or similar platforms.
* Familiarity with creating dashboards and reports to communicate project, release, or operational status.
* Exposure to Agile frameworks such as Scrum or SAFe.
* Interest in AI agents, workflow automation, Model Context Protocol (MCP), or other emerging technologies that are transforming software engineering and program management

  

Company Overview:


UKG is the Workforce Operating Platform that puts workforce understanding to work. With the world's largest collection of workforce insights, and people\-first AI, our ability to reveal unseen ways to build trust, amplify productivity, and empower talent, is unmatched. It's this expertise that equips our customers with the intelligence to solve any challenge in any industry — because great organizations know their workforce is their competitive edge. Learn more at ukg.com.


UKG is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace, including the recruitment process.


Disability Accommodation in the Application and Interview Process


For individuals with disabilities that need additional assistance at any point in the application and interview process, please email UKGCareers@ukg.com


NOTICE ON HIRING SCAMS
  

UKG will never ask you for a copy of your driver’s license, social security card, or passport during a job inter  

  

  

ABOUT OUR JOB DESCRIPTIONS
  

All job descriptions are written to accurately reflect the open job and include general work responsibilities. They do not present a comprehensive, detailed inventory of all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications required for the job. Management reserves the right to revise the job or require that other or different tasks be performed if or when circumstances change.

84ea786c.title: Technical Program Manager
84ea786c.description:
Here at Appian, our values of
 **Intensity** 
 and
 **Excellence** 
 define who we are. We set high standards and live up to them, ensuring that everything we do is done with care and quality. We approach every challenge with ambition and commitment, holding ourselves and each other accountable to achieve the best results. When you join Appian, you’ll be part of a passionate team dedicated to accomplishing hard things, together.
 



 You will own end\-to\-end delivery for complex, cross\-org modernization programs. You will create clarity from ambiguity, define operating mechanisms, drive dependency management, and ensure high\-quality execution across Platform Engineering and Low Code Foundations.
 



 Required Experience \& Skills
 


* 8–12\+ years technical program management in engineering organizations
* Experience driving large, cross\-team technical programs with measurable outcomes
* Excellent written and verbal communication; strong ability to influence without authority
* Demonstrated rigor in planning, risk management, and execution mechanisms
* Comfort partnering with senior engineering leaders and principal engineers



 Preferred Experience \& Skills
 


* Experience with platform modernization (cloud\-native, performance, reliability, migrations)
* Experience with AI\-enabled programs or AI\-first SDLC adoption
* Background in software engineering, systems engineering, or technical product delivery




**Tools and Resources** 




* Training and Development: During onboarding, we focus on equipping new hires with the skills and knowledge for success through department\-specific training. Continuous learning is a central focus at Appian, with dedicated mentorship and the First\-Friend program being widely utilized resources for new hires.
* Growth Opportunities: Appian provides a diverse array of growth and development opportunities, including our leadership program tailored for new and aspiring managers, a comprehensive library of specialized department training through Appian University, skills based training, and tuition reimbursement for those aiming to advance their education. This commitment ensures that employees have access to a holistic range of development opportunities.
* Community: We’ll immerse you into our community rooted in respect starting on day one. Appian fosters inclusivity through our 8 employee\-led affinity groups. These groups help employees build stronger internal and external networks by planning social, educational, and outreach activities to connect with Appianites and larger initiatives throughout the company.



**Benefits**




 Appian offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your health, wellbeing, and financial future. Benefits may include health coverage, Employee Assistance Program (EAP) with free mental health support, life and disability insurance, an Employee Stock Purchase Program (ESPP), a retirement/pension plan, wellness dollars, tuition reimbursement, family\-forming benefits and more. Benefits vary by country—please ask your Talent Acquisition contact for details specific to the location you are applying to.

 Appian provides process automation technology. We automate complex processes in large enterprises and governments. Our platform is known for its unique reliability and scale. We’ve been automating processes for 25 years and understand enterprise operations like no one else. For more information, visit appian.com. \[Nasdaq: APPN]

e2c79c1e.title: Technical Program Manager
e2c79c1e.description:
Technical Program Manager
   

  

 As a Technical Program Manager, you’ll be the orchestrator of complex, cross\-functional initiatives that span engineering, product, and design. You’ll ensure that our platform capabilities are delivered on time, at scale, and with uncompromising quality—enabling products to serve millions of customers seamlessly. Your work will directly influence how quickly and effectively our teams can bring new innovations to market.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Drive end\-to\-end delivery of large\-scale, multi\-team technical programs—such as building next\-gen developer platforms, API ecosystems, or cloud\-native infrastructure.
   

  

 Partner with engineering leaders to define program scope, success metrics, and technical milestones.
   

  

 Create and maintain program roadmaps, ensuring alignment with business priorities and product strategies.
   

  

 Identify and mitigate risks early, removing blockers to keep teams moving forward.
   

  

 Facilitate cross\-team communication, ensuring stakeholders—from engineers to executives—are informed and aligned.
   

  

 Champion agile best practices, continuous improvement, and operational excellence across the organization.
   

  

 Leverage tools like Jira and Confluence to track progress and communicate status effectively.
   

  

**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
 6\+ years of relevant experience in program or project management within a technology\-driven environment.
   

  

 Proven track record of delivering complex, cross\-functional technical programs at scale.
   

  

 Strong understanding of software development lifecycles, Java, Cloud technologies (AWS, GCP, or Azure), and modern DevOps practices.
   

  

 Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills—you can translate technical details into clear business impact.
   

  

 Experience working in agile environments and driving adoption of agile principles.
   

  

 A problem\-solving mindset with the ability to navigate ambiguity and make data\-informed decisions

9ed2344d.title: Technical Program Manager – Embedded Systems
9ed2344d.description:
**Netradyne** 
 harnesses the power of Computer Vision and Edge Computing to revolutionize the modern\-day transportation ecosystem. We are a leader in fleet safety solutions. With growth exceeding 4x year over year, our solution is quickly being recognized as a significant disruptive technology. Our team is growing, and we need forward\-thinking, uncompromising, competitive team members to continue to facilitate our growth.
   

  

**Technical Program Manager – Embedded Systems**
 Location: Bangalore
   

  

 Company: Netradyne
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Netradyne is seeking an experienced
 **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** 
 to lead cross\-functional teams in delivering cutting\-edge embedded and IoT products. In this role, you will collaborate closely with hardware, firmware, and software engineering teams to drive the complete product lifecycle—from early prototyping through mass production.
   

  

 You will play a critical role in ensuring seamless execution by managing dependencies, mitigating risks, and delivering high\-quality products on schedule.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Program Planning \& Execution**
* Define, plan, and execute complex engineering programs across embedded product lines
* Drive program schedules and ensure alignment with business objectives and delivery timelines


**Cross\-Functional Coordination**
* Act as the central point of contact across Hardware, Firmware, Software, QA, and Product Management teams
* Foster strong collaboration and ensure clear communication across all stakeholders


**Dependency Management**
* Identify and manage dependencies across multiple teams and functions
* Proactively negotiate timelines and resolve conflicts to keep programs on track


**Risk Management \& Mitigation**
* Anticipate technical risks, bottlenecks, and resource constraints
* Develop and execute mitigation strategies to minimize impact on delivery


**Technical Communication**
* Provide regular updates on program status, milestones, risks, and changes to leadership
* Translate technical challenges into clear business impact for stakeholders


**Process \& Execution Excellence**
* Implement and refine Agile methodologies to improve efficiency
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives, including streamlining software release cycles


**Qualifications \& Education**
* Bachelor’s degree (B.Tech or equivalent) in Computer Science, Electronics, or related field


**Experience**
* 7–10 years of experience in Technical Program Management
* Strong background in embedded systems, IoT, or automotive domains


**Technical Expertise**
* Solid understanding of embedded software ecosystems, including hardware\-software integration
* Experience working with multidisciplinary engineering teams


**Tools \& Technologies**
* Hands\-on experience with project tracking and management tools such as Jira, MS Project (MPP), Smartsheet
* Proficiency in MS Office tools (Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)


**Nice to Have**
* Experience in scaling products from prototype to production
* Familiarity with automotive standards or IoT platforms
* PMP / Agile certifications


**Equal Opportunity Employer Statement** 
 : Netradyne is an equal opportunity employer and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.
   

  

**Additional Information:** 
 This position is based out in HM Tech Park, Whitefield Bangalore.
   

  

**Follow us on LinkedIn: For more information on our work culture, follow us on** 
**Netradyne: My Company \| LinkedIn**
 We are committed to an inclusive and diverse team. Netradyne is an equal\-opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status, or any legally protected status.
   

  

 If there is a match between your experiences/skills and the Company's needs, we will contact you directly.
   

  

 Netradyne is an equal\-opportunity employer.
   

  

**Applicants only \- Recruiting agencies do not contact.**
**Recruitment Fraud Alert!**
 There has been an increase in fraud that targets job seekers. Scammers may present themselves to job seekers as Netradyne employees or recruiters. Please be aware that Netradyne does not request sensitive personal data from applicants via text/instant message or any unsecured method; does not promise any advance payment for work equipment set\-up and does not use recruitment or job\-sourcing agencies that charge candidates an advance fee of any kind. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in ‘@netradyne.com’ or ‘@us\-greenhouse\-mail.io’.
   

  

 Please review and apply to our available job openings at Netradyne.com/company/careers. For more information on avoiding and reporting scams, please visit the Federal Trade Commission's job scams website.

5a08604a.title: Sr. Program Manager, EU FBA
5a08604a.description:
**Description**
 Today, more than 60% of worldwide purchases from Amazon are made from third\-party selling partners, mostly from small\- and medium\-sized businesses. Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA) enables these businesses to hand over the heavy lifting of warehousing, payment processing, delivery, returns, and customer service to Amazon.
   

  

 Amazon seeks a creative, dynamic, and experienced Senior Program Manager to join the EU FBA team to drive transformational improvements in our fulfillment operations. This role offers the opportunity to shape the future of how millions of sellers experience Amazon's fulfillment network while directly impacting customer satisfaction and operational excellence.
   

  

 As a Senior Program Manager, you will own the strategy , drive product related discussions and execution of initiatives that reduce operational defects , Escalation management, VOS, Adoption , and touch entire seller journey and enhance both end\-customer delivery experience and our selling partner experience across Amazon's fulfillment network. You'll work at the intersection of technology, operations, and business strategy to identify opportunities, design solutions, and scale innovations that deliver measurable impact.
   

  

 You will work independently with senior leadership visibility, driving complex initiatives that span multiple organizations. This role requires someone who can think big, connect disparate insights, and lead pilots from concept through to network\-wide implementation.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Define and own program strategy, vision, and roadmap for critical fulfillment initiatives and internal\-facing applications
* Develop program roadmap , working with various team to ensure alignment with stakeholder business and application objectives
* Translate business intent, customer needs, and technical direction into clear, well\-documented business requirements or product backlog for complex applications spanning multiple technical domains
* Own end\-to\-end program and product delivery with feature tradeoffs and technology product management
* Bridge conversations between business users and development teams using knowledge of complex business processes and technical integration
* Collaborate with Program, Operations, Product, Engineering teams to define, launch, and scale innovative pilots
* Navigate ambiguity and build consensus across diverse stakeholder groups
* Use data and metrics to drive decision\-making and measure program success
* Identify and lead scalable solutions to operational challenges in partnership with cross\-functional teams
* Communicate strategy and results to senior leadership through compelling narratives and business cases
* Establish program mechanisms including goal setting, metrics, and reporting frameworks


**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* Experience using data and metrics to determine and drive improvements
* Experience owning program strategy, end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership
* Experience developing and executing/delivering product and technical roadmaps influencing internal and external stakeholders
* Experience experience using data and metrics to measure impact and determine improvements
* Experience owning program strategy, managing end\-to\-end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership
* Experience influencing multiple stakeholders and leading cross functional teams across geographies and business units
* Experience delivering complex projects with prior ownership of the operation of a mission\-critical team and/or product


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in influencing senior leadership through data driven insights
* Experience working across functional teams and senior stakeholders
* Experience working in e\-commerce / retail / supply chain / financial services business
* Experience implementing change management successfully transitioning programs into large\-scale operations
* Bachelor's degree, or MBA in management, business administration, economics, engineering, marketing
* Experience working in an operations, supply chain, transportation, project management or management consulting role
* Experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities, or experience in managing and troublshooting network and experience in software development


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI HYD 13 SEZ

d5695b9f.title: Technical Program Manager, AWS Data Center Engineering Operations
d5695b9f.description:
**Description**
 AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
   

  

 You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.
   

  

 Amazon is expanding the Data Center management team in India. This position within Amazon Data Services India Private Limited (ADSIPL) requires broad Data Center knowledge with Subject Matter Expertise (SME) in as many specific fields as possible. The location for this job will be in Mumbai, Maharashtra.
   

  

 We are seeking a Technical Program Manager (TPM) to govern, drive, and monitor end\-to\-end program success of the global Operations programs. As TPM you will own the program's strategic direction, define its governance model, build alignment across senior stakeholders, and create structure and clarity where it is required.
   

  

 You will work within an Operations org, influence system owners and architecture decisions, and advise Senior Managers and Directors. The role requires independently navigating ambiguity where the business problem, program strategy, and technology solutions may not be defined. You will drive simplification and efficiency in existing engineering and operational architectures to unblock innovation, accelerate delivery and be a force multiplier in the team's effectiveness, and drive trade\-offs between short\-term operational needs and long\-term program strategy. This role directly advises DCEO and InfraOps senior leadership on program health, risk posture, and strategic roadmap.
   

  

 People and Culture
   

  

 To succeed in Amazon, you must be self\-motivated, process oriented and build mechanisms on delivering results. You will put the customer first in everything you do and build trust and communicate effectively with people at all levels of the business. Our team culture is collaborative; it is designed to empower and enable you to succeed.
   

  

**The Successful Candidate Will Be Accountable For**
 Stakeholder Governance \& Communication — On\-time delivery of all executive artifacts (strategic narratives, business review documents, findings presentations) aligned to milestone targets — with structured senior leadership engagement across Infrastructure Operations leadership.
   

  

* Automation Programs — On\-track delivery of automation targets — measured by metric integration completeness, dashboard publication cadence, and improvement trends.
* Continuous Improvement Velocity — Measurable cycle\-time reduction in the assurance program lifecycle, implementation of lessons learned driven through formal engineering approval within each quarter.


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Define and run the operations program governance framework — including program charter, success metrics, cadence design, escalation pathways, and the annual review roadmap for the region delivering independently with limited guidance in partnership with Infrastructure Operations leadership.
* Build and govern senior stakeholder alignment — establishing structured engagement with Infrastructure Operations and Data Center Engineering leadership serving as the program voice at Sr. Manager.
* Govern cross\-functional coordination — aligning engineering, business operations, continuous improvement, analytics, and partner engineering teams around shared program commitments, negotiating resources, managing the cross\-cluster SME reviewer pool, and removing organizational\-level blockers.
* Drive engineering bandwidth optimization — assuming full ownership of all program execution activities, freeing the lead engineer to focus on technical strategy, standards development, design oversight, and program innovation.
* Author and present executive communications — writing strategic narratives, business review program updates, root cause analyses, and VP\-level findings presentations; trusted to present program decisions independently to leaders up to three tiers above level.
* Govern the program dashboard and metrics — maintaining a single source of truth for program health (closure rates, health score trends, finding age, milestone compliance, reviewer quality scores) and publishing to senior leadership on a regular cadence.
* Drive continuous improvement and program innovation — running post\-review pulse surveys, synthesizing lessons learned, identifying systemic patterns, streamlining excess process, and leading automation initiatives (health score reporting, ticket generation, dashboard publication).
* Govern assurance checklist evolution — analyzing finding patterns, stakeholder feedback, and evolving data center operational standards to drive structural checklist updates through the formal engineering review and approval process.
* Build program management capability — maintaining comprehensive governance documentation (playbooks, templates, process guides) in collaboration with platforms, mentoring TPM community practices, and enabling program scale and continuity across the Infrastructure Operations function.


**About The Team**
 About AWS
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 7\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* Experience leading large\-scale, technical or engineering programs with a proven record of thought leadership, business case development, realizing customer benefits, and successful program completion
* Experience building scalable programs and repeatable scalable processes, levering various tools and methods to create scale and efficiency
* 11\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* Bachelor's degree or above in Operations, Business, Project Management or Engineering


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working in data centers or critical infrastructure
* PMP certificate, or 6\+ years of in program management, workforce strategy development, or metrics\-driven decision making experience
* Experience mentoring or training the engineering community on complex technical issues
* Experience managing, motivating, and influencing team behaviors
* Experience using data and metrics to back up assumptions, evaluate outcomes, and make data\-driven decisions
* Experience in written and verbal communication with the ability to present complex technical information in a clear and concise manner to executives and non\-technical leaders


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADSIPL \- Maharashtra
