d15ddb75.title: Senior Program Manager, TSE Product
d15ddb75.description:
**Description**
 Have you ever thought about what it takes to detect and prevent fraud among hundreds of millions of e\-Commerce transactions in different countries? What would you do to create a trusted marketplace where millions of buyers and sellers can safely transact online? What kinds of processes and systems would you build to maximize customer satisfaction? Come be a part of a rapidly expanding Trustworthy Shopping Experience Operations (TSE Ops) team that helps solve this challenging problem at scale.
   

  

 The Team: The Trustworthy Shopping Experience Operations (TSE Ops) works on improving seller experience and overall ensuring that Amazon’s marketplace is a safe and trusted space for our customers by enabling activities in different scopes, such as: Product Safety and Compliance (PSC), Restricted Products (RP), Product Quality (PQ) and Trusted Order and Remediation Experience (TORX). In addition to these, the team has support functions which enable the investigator and operational experience through workforce and capacity planning, ops analytics, site strategy, program expansion, change management, tech enablement and security and compliance. The team supports 16 languages across 21 Amazon stores with over 8K employees located in 17 sites.
   

  

 Role : We are looking for a Sr Program Manager to support the Trust worthy Shopping experience (TSE) Operations \& Product team. The role holder will look at opportunities within the TSE space that can be unified and done centrally, thereby helping deliver cost savings. The role holder will need to partner with program teams to understand their needs and evaluate opportunities for standardization and automation. And partner with Operations team for seamless execution.
   

  

 The right candidate is highly organized, can look out for potential opportunities, earn trust with partner teams and also have a tech bent of mind for automation. Also the role holder is required to have the ability to evangelize the idea to multiple partner teams, have a strong ability to communicate effectively (both orally and in written form) and have experience influencing without authority. You are a strategic thinker with a proven track record of taking end\-to\-end ownership, planning both for the short\-and long term, and successfully delivering results with limited guidance.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Drive SOP standardization by partnering with Program stakeholders.
* Evaluate and drive opportunities to drive SOP automation to improve speed and accuracy of the investigators.
* Ensure that the Ops investigators have a seamless experience across functions, working with product and tech teams to own and fix workflow issues.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* 5\+ years of delivering cross functional projects experience
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

85455585.title: Specialist - Pre-Sales
85455585.description:
Ingram Micro is a leading technology company for the global information technology ecosystem.
   

  

 With the ability to reach nearly 90% of the global population, we play a vital role in the worldwide IT sales channel, bringing products and services from technology manufacturers and cloud providers to business\-to\-business technology experts.
   

  

 Our market reach, diverse solutions and services portfolio, and digital platform Ingram Micro Xvantage™ set us apart
   

  

**Position Summary:**
 Typical pre\-sales activities include gaining understanding of customer's business
   

  

 and analysis of customer's system and product needs. Provides primarily pre\-sales technical support for the development and implementation of complex products/applications/solutions
   

  

**What you bring to the role:**
 Established and productive professional individual contributor. Works independently with general supervision. Problems faced are difficult and may be complex. May influence others within the job area through explanation of facts, policies and practices.
   

  

 Works on moderate to complex projects. Uses company standard policies and procedures to resolve a variety of issues.
   

  

 Exercises judgment within defined procedures and practices to determine appropriate action. Receives moderate level of guidance. Work is reviewed for soundness of judgment and overall accuracy.
   

  

 General proficiency with various tools, systems, and procedures required to accomplish the job. May need to consult with Senior/Specialist staff members on some technical issues. A four year college degree (or additional experience in a related field) and 3 years functional experience including a minimum 1 year position specific experience.

5c9cb486.title: Senior Solutions Engineer
5c9cb486.description:
**Introduction**
 At IBM Global Sales, we bring together innovation, collaboration, and expertise to help clients solve their most complex business challenges. Working across industries and geographies, you’ll partner with colleagues, clients, and partners to co\-create solutions that drive digital transformation and lasting impact.Success in Global Sales is built on curiosity, empathy, and collaboration. You’ll connect technical understanding with strong people skills, building trusted relationships and shaping solutions that improve business and society. With world\-class onboarding, continuous learning, and a supportive culture, IBM offers the tools and opportunities to grow your career. Join us and be part of a global team that’s passionate about driving innovation and making a difference.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
* Help advance new \& innovative data streaming use\-cases from conception to go\-live
* Execute on and lead technical proof of concepts
* Conduct discovery \& whiteboard Sessions to develop new use\-cases
* Provide thought Leadership by delivering technical talks and workshops
* Guide customers with hands\-on help and best practice to drive operational maturity of their Confluent deployment
* Analyze customer consumption trends and identify optimization opportunities
* Work closely with product and engineering teams, and serve as a key product advocate across the customer, partner and Industry ecosystem
* Forge strong relationships with key customer stakeholders and serve as a dependable partner for them


**Preferred Education**
 Master's Degree

* Experience with event\-driven architecture, data integration \& processing techniques, database \& data warehouse technologies, or related fields
* First\-Hand exposure to cloud architecture, migrations, deployment \& application development
* Experience with DevOps/Automation, GitOps or Kubernetes
* Ability to read \& write Java, Python or SQL
* Clear, consistent demonstration of self\-starter behavior, a desire to learn new things and tackle hard technical problems
* Exceptional presentation and communications capabilities. Confidence presenting to a highly skilled and experienced audience, ranging from developers to enterprise architects and up to C\-level executives


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
* Technical certifications \- cloud developer/architect, data engineering \& integration
* Familiarity with solution or value Selling
* A challenger mindset and an ability to positively influence peoples’ opinions

c3264f09.description:
**About Our Company**


Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise Financial Inc., a US financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and diversified financial services leader with more than $1\.5 trillion in assets under management, administration and advisement as of year\-end 2024\. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection.


Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions, and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So, if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong, ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

**Job Description**


In this role, you will be helping a team responsible for building tools for engineers, platform wide improvements, driving digital transformation etc. You will work with business leaders/technology partners to create the product road map and manage any product changes through the development, user acceptance testing and implementation processes. You are passionate about continuous improvement and bringing impactful changes using latest technologies.
In this role, you will be helping a team responsible for building tools for engineers, platform wide improvements, driving digital transformation etc. You will work with business leaders/technology partners to create the product road map and manage any product changes through the development, user acceptance testing and implementation processes. You are passionate about continuous improvement and bringing impactful changes using latest technologies.

  

* Available during UK working hours.
* Overall 6\+ years of experience in Salesforce Marketing Cloud \& Core Salesforce CRM.
* Subject Matter Expert knowledge of Salesforce Marketing Cloud and Salesforce CRM.
* Hands\-on experience as a full\-stack developer for Salesforce Marketing Cloud creating personalized, dynamic messages, landing pages, SQL, and is experienced with data configuration, manipulations and advance segmentation.
* Strong hands\-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud data and journeys, including advanced SQL and data objects for segmentation and troubleshooting, a clear understanding of the platform dependencies that enable personalization and reporting
* Proven expertise designing and executing customer journeys using Email Studio, Content Builder, Journey Builder, Automation Studio, and CloudPages.
* Should have experience in Sales or Service cloud, with experience in Salesforce Admin capabilities like Data Model, Security model, lightning pages, flows etc.
* Hands\-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud and Salesforce CRM integrations, including designing and supporting MQL‑to‑SQL lead journeys, working with Leads, Contacts, Campaigns, and Campaign Members in Salesforce, and ensuring seamless data flow and alignment between marketing automation and sales processes.
* Ability to evaluate implementations and provide optimizations and improvements if applicable.
* Strong problem\-solving, analytical, and communication skills.
* Experience creating technical documentation, including technical specifications, test plans, and user guides.

 **Overall Preferred Skills**

* Understanding of Marketing \& Sales ways of working in the B2B Financial Services Industry
* Proactive and self\-starting demeanor with the ability to manage tasks independently while collaborating remotely.
* Ability to set the right expectations on effort and timelines required to meet business requirements.
* 3\+ certifications related to Salesforce CRM and SFMC. Eg. Certified Marketing Cloud Admin, Certified Marketing Cloud Consultant, Certified Marketing Cloud Email Specialist, Certified Marketing Cloud Developer, Salesforce Platform Developer 1, Salesforce Admin certified.

 **In\-Office Collaboration**


We are a client\-centric, relationship\-based business. Working together, in\-person, is foundational to how we achieve results. By fostering a culture of face\-to\-face collaboration, idea sharing, productivity and personal connection, we deliver for our stakeholders — clients, advisors, employees and shareholders. Our employees work in the office at least three (3\) days per week, with flexibility to work from home two (2\) days per week. Some roles may require additional in\-office time or different in\-office expectations, and specific requirements will be discussed during the hiring process.

**Full\-Time/Part\-Time**


Full time**Timings**


(2:00p\-10:30p)**India Business Unit**


AWMPO AWMP\&S President's Office**Job Family Group**


Technology*Ameriprise India LLP is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, genetic information, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, military status, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, family status or any other basis prohibited by law.*

*We are committed to fostering an inclusive and accessible recruitment process for individuals with disabilities. If you require a reasonable accommodation to participate in the application or interview process, speak to your recruiter to discuss how we can support you.*

6ad6c287.title: Solution Architect
6ad6c287.description:
**Do you want a job with a purpose?**
**And do you want to make healthcare safer, better and more reliable?**
**Join our Team!**
 Join us as our
 **EHR Solution Architect** 
 at
 **Dedalus** 
 , one of the World’s leading healthcare technology companies, working from
 **Chennai and Noida,** 
**India** 
 to do the best work of your career and make a profound impact in providing better care for a healthier planet.
   




**What you’ll achieve** 

  

 As an
 **EHR** 
**Solutions Architect** 
 you will be part of our high performing ANZ architecture practice, utilising your skills in the architecture, design, and enhancement of our market leading Electronic Health Record (EHR) solution designed specifically for hospital and healthcare environments.
   

  

 This role is suitable for a health industry experienced Solution Architect who is looking for the opportunity to apply their knowledge, experience and skills to architect and deliver high quality solutions to customers, improve customer and patient outcomes, and contribute to our team of diverse and passionate professionals.  You will be perceived as a thought leader in your field and play a crucial role in ensuring that different software components work together securely, efficiently and effectively to achieve business objectives particularly in a Managed Services setting.
   

  

 You will lead the digital transformation agenda and solutioning activity for our largest and most complex deals to deliver a step change in performance across patient experience, operational efficiency and clinical effectiveness.  You will be adept at defining “compound” solutions and the associated transformation steps that combine the power of Dedalus and partner capabilities in a way that maximizes client and patient value, particularly as products from Dedalus’ global portfolio are introduced into ANZ region.
   

  

 The primary focus is to ensure all components align to deliver a safe, robust and reliable product to our customers.
   

  

 Working with an extended highly skilled cross\-functional team, you will be making a profound impact on the healthcare delivery provided by our valued customers.
   

  

 As the
 **EHR Solution Architect** 
 , you will Architect integrated solutions across potentially hybrid hosting environments that meet business objectives and align with Dedalus’ architectural standards, principles and best practices including application, data, integration, technology, and security domains.
   

  

 This includes defining conceptual, logical and physical architectures through engagement with appropriate SMEs, producing Solution Architecture documentation to support downstream project activities.
   

  

**You will:** 



* Architect solutions aligned to business, portfolio and product roadmaps and overarching industry and internal policies and practices.  Balance competing stakeholder objectives, technical best practice, and align to capabilities of delivery and support teams in the respective solution domains.
* Utilise knowledge of cloud platform services (preferably AWS) to produce solution architectures for cloud native and hybrid landscapes.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including developers, project managers, other solution architects, and business stakeholders. You will provide technical leadership and guidance to ensure solution architectures meet realistic, deliverable and supportable objectives, within funding and delivery constraints.
* Ensure architectures comply with established architecture governance processes, policies and standards used within Dedalus both at a global and regional level.
* Work with business, sales, product, and technical engineering stakeholders to influence and specify solutions ranging from customer project engagements to product enhancement and portfolio capability uplift.
* Liaise and collaborate with customer stakeholders including but not limited to; Project Managers, Solution Architects, and technical team members.



  

  




**Take the next step towards your dream career** 
**At Dedalus** 
**Life flows through our software** 
 . Every day we do something special by helping caregivers and health professionals deliver better care to their served communities. Take the next step in your career that will make a profound impact. Here’s what you’ll need to succeed:
 



**Essential Requirements** 




* Tertiary qualifications in computer science, information and systems management, or a business discipline, or equivalent industry experience.
* 15\+ years’ experience in the Software industry, with a minimum of 3 years in a healthcare setting.
* 7\+ years in a solution architect role, applying a range of different architecture skills.
* 5\+ years of experience with Cloud Solutions (preferably AWS and Azure) in a Managed Services setting.
* 3\+ years Integration Architecture and Data Architecture experience in a healthcare setting including HL7 and FHIR experience.
* Proven Integration experience between enterprise applications (e.g. APIs, ESB, etc)
* Experience with formal architecture frameworks (e.g., TOGAF) and modelling languages (e.g., UML, ArchiMate).
* Ability to lead architecture workshops and work with stakeholders of all levels including customer engagement.
* Healthcare and life sciences industry domain knowledge, primarily in tertiary care sector.
* Excellent creative thinking, problem\-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues and provide effective outcomes.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with technical and non\-technical stakeholders within Dedalus and our customers.
* Strong time\-management and organisational skills to balance and prioritise workload.



  

**Desirable Requirements** 



* Experience with Citrix application and desktop virtualisation technology.
* Experience with containerisation technology (e.g. Kubernetes, Docker).
* Experience with RDBMs including Oracle.
* Experience with industry related regulations (e.g. Privacy Act, GDPR, ISM).
* Familiarity with project management methodologies (e.g. PRINCE2, PMP, etc).
* Solid understanding of software development methodologies, including Agile and DevSecOps practices.
* Experience with task management tools (e.g., JIRA, etc.).
* Understanding of ITIL processes.



  

**Work Environment** 



* Ability to work from home in a suitable environment when necessary.
* Ability to attend meetings, collaborate, and communicate across multiple time zones including Europe and ANZ.
* Willingness to travel as required



  

  

**We are Dedalus, come join us**
 Dedalus is committed to providing an engaging, rewarding work experience that reflects the passion our employees bring to our mission of helping clinicians and nurses deliver better care to their served communities.
   

 Our company fosters a culture where employees are encouraged to learn and innovate, and to enable and enhance clinical co\-operation and processes while making a meaningful difference for millions of people around the world. Each person is the end point and the starting point of the Group’s activities and the ultimate beneficiary. For this reason, we are so proud of doing our very special jobs each day.
   

 Our company is enriched by a diverse population of 7,600 people in more than 40 countries that work together to innovate and drive better healthcare options for millions of patients around the world. We are the people of Dedalus.
   

  

**Application closing date: 22nd July 2026**
 Our Diversity \& Inclusion Commitment sets out Dedalus’ approach to ensuring respect, inclusion and success for all our colleagues and the wider communities we operate in. It is imperative for us to share our commitment and dedication to ensure an inclusive and diverse workplace. We recognise that we have improvements to make, and, on this journey, we must remain authentic and realistic but also ambitious.
   

  

 Our diversity \& inclusion commitment – Dedalus Global
   

  

 Life Flows Through Our Software

cf431bdd.title: Solutions Architect - Presales (Cisco)
cf431bdd.description:
**Pre‑Sales \& Solution Design**
* Work closely with Sales, Partners, and Customers to understand business and technical requirements
* Design end‑to‑end Cisco solutions including:
* Enterprise Networking (Switching, Routing, Wireless)
* Security (Firewalls, Cisco ISE, Duo, Umbrella, Secure Access)
* SD‑WAN, Cloud, and Data Center solutions
* Create High\-Level Design (HLD), Low\-Level Design (LLD), and BoQ / BoM


**Cisco Technology Expertise**
* Strong understanding of Cisco Networking and Cybersecurity products
* Experience with VLAN design, segmentation, inter‑VLAN routing, redundancy, and high availability
* Cisco Meraki solutions (MX, MS, MR) – deployment and dashboard management
* VPNs (Remote Access and Site‑to‑Site), SD‑WAN, network expansion and scaling
* Cisco DNA Center (DNAC), ISE, Umbrella, Duo, Secure Service Connect (SSC)
* Network monitoring using SNMP, ManageEngine, and similar tools


**Customer Engagement \& Proposals**
* Prepare and respond to RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs
* Create techno‑commercial proposals, compliance matrices, and scope documents
* Conduct solution presentations, demos, PoCs, and technical walkthroughs
* Support deal qualification, BOQ presentation, and deal ID creation
* Act as a trusted technical advisor for customers and partners


**Collaboration \& Delivery Readiness**
* Coordinate with Professional Services and delivery teams for deployment readiness
* Work with Cisco Account Teams, TAC, and OEM support for solution validation
* Maintain solution documentation and technical artifacts
* Mentor junior pre‑sales engineers as required


**Mandatory Skills**
* Strong networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLANs, ICMP
* Solid understanding of network security: Firewalls, VPNs, content filtering
* Experience in virtualization, enterprise management systems, network monitoring
* Basic knowledge of Infra services: AD, DNS, DHCP, NTP (preferred)


**Qualifications \& Experience**
* BE / B.Tech in a relevant discipline
* 4\-8 years of experience as a Pre‑Sales / Solution Engineer
* Cisco certifications such as CCNA / CCNP preferred
* Strong presentation, communication, and documentation skills
* Ability to explain technical concepts to non‑technical stakeholders
* Customer‑focused mindset with ability to work independently


**Why Join Us**
* Exposure to enterprise and large‑scale Cisco deployments
* Work with cross‑functional sales, partner, and delivery teams
* Opportunity to grow as a trusted technical advisor and architect

cee6b8b5.title: Solutions Engineer
cee6b8b5.description:
**Role : Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE)** 




**Location: Kochi, Trivandrum, Chennai, Bangalore.** 




**Exp Level: 5\-9 years** 




  





 We are helping our client hire Forward Deployed Engineers (FDE). As a FDE you will play a strategic client\-facing role—embedding within engineering teams to design, build, and deliver impactful technology solutions. You’ll combine deep technical expertise with strong stakeholder management to solve complex business challenges and accelerate delivery.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Partner with client teams to design, develop, deploy, and support production\-grade applications and AI\-powered solutions.
* Lead end\-to\-end software delivery: requirements, design, implementation, testing, deployment, and support.
* Act as a senior technical resource, advising on architecture, scalability, security, and performance.
* Leverage AI\-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor) and promote reusable workflows.
* Build trusted client relationships, identify new opportunities, and contribute to account growth.
* Mentor team members and drive adoption of modern engineering and AI practices.



  





**Requirements** 



* 5\+ years of enterprise software engineering experience with full SDLC delivery.
* Daily use of AI\-assisted development tools in professional settings.
* Proficiency in multiple programming languages and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Strong consulting mindset with excellent communication skills for technical and executive audiences.
* Prior client\-facing engineering experience (FDE, Solutions Engineer, Technical Consultant) preferred.
* Experience with AI agent frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen) and relevant certifications a plus.

37514757.title: Solution Architect
37514757.description:
### **Technology**



DGS India \- Mumbai \- Thane Ashar IT Park
#### **About the job**


**Qualtrics Solution Architect**


We are seeking an experienced Solution Architect to design and deliver enterprise\-grade cloud solutions with deep expertise in AWS, Qualtrics, and enterprise experience platforms. This role combines technical architecture, hands\-on development, and direct client engagement to build scalable, secure integration solutions across banking, telecom, automotive, healthcare and aviation sectors. The ideal candidate will drive end\-to\-end solutioning from requirements gathering through implementation and serve as a trusted advisor to global clients on platform customization, data flow automation, and cloud\-native transformation.


Qualtrics Solution Architect We are seeking an experienced Solution Architect with 15\+ years of experience, to design and deliver enterprise\-grade cloud solutions with deep expertise in Qualtrics, AWS, and enterprise experience platforms. This role combines technical architecture, hands\-on development, and direct client engagement to build scalable, secure integration solutions across banking, telecom, automotive, healthcare and aviation sectors. The ideal candidate will drive end\-to\-end solutioning from requirements gathering through implementation and serve as a trusted advisor to global clients on platform customization, data flow automation, and cloud\-native transformation. Key Responsibilities a. Discovery – Requirements Ownership • Support pre\-sales activities including proposal development, solution architecture, scoping, effort estimation, and client presentations • Partner with business stakeholders to capture requirements and deliver technical solutions that prioritize performance, security, and scalability. • Document requirements, decisions, and trade\-offs clearly to ensure alignment across client and delivery teams. b. Design – End\-to\-End Solution Design • Architect end\-to\-end cloud\-native solutions using AWS services (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3\) and integrate with platforms such as Qualtrics, CRM, and enterprise data warehouses • Develop complete solution architectures covering applications, integrations, data flow, infrastructure, and APIs. • Lead the design and architecture of Qualtrics XM solutions (CX, EX, PX, Brand Experience) • Has exposure to all new AI functionalities, and is aware of Qualtrics AI features • Conduct code reviews and guide teams on best practices and cloud\-native patterns • Build integration solutions connecting survey platforms with CRM systems, ticketing tools, SMS/messaging gateways, data warehouses, and kiosk systems • Support integration with BI tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) (Would be a bonus) c. Strategy – Business Alignment \& Client Advisory • Ensure solutions directly support client business goals, deliver immediate value, and remain scalable for future needs. • Act as a trusted advisor, simplifying technical concepts, guiding client decisions, and driving best practices. • Present insights and solution designs to leadership d. Program Governance – Standards \& Compliance • Manage full project lifecycle: scoping, solutioning, design, implementation, and client enablement • Enforce design standards, best practices, and compliance requirements across client engagements. • Maintain consistency and quality in solution delivery across multiple projects. e. Scale – Scalability \& Future Readiness • Build reusable and scalable solution frameworks to improve efficiency across client engagements. • Design architectures that adapt to evolving client needs and technology updates. • Lead development of serverless applications using Node.js, Python, and React Required Skills \& Experience: • Proven experience as a Solution Architect in consulting or client\-facing roles. • Platforms: Qualtrics certification is a must. Hands\-on expertise with Qualtrics CX/EX platforms (survey design, dashboards, workflows). • Strong knowledge of API integrations, enterprise architecture, and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP). • Has worked on AI / ML technologies, also is exposed to Qualtrics AI features • Technical know\-how o Languages: Node.js, Python, SQL o Frontend: React, Angular, jQuery, HTML/CSS o DevOps: Jenkins, Docker, Git • Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills. • Ability to balance technical depth with business advisory.

4c6f2751.title: Executive Manager | Technical Architect | Hyderabad | Engineering as a Service/ Operate
4c6f2751.description:
Job requisition ID :: 108917
Date: Jul 15, 2026
Location: Hyderabad
Designation: Executive Manager
Entity: Deloitte LLP
 * **Job Title**: Technical Architect – Full Stack
* **Role:** Technical Architect
* **Experience:** 10\-12\+ Years
* **Location:** Hybrid \- Hyd
* **Employment Type:** Full\-time
* **Roles And responsibilities**

**Roles and Responsibilities:**

* Collaborating with decision\-makers and management to comprehend the organization’s software architecture requirements.
* Designing and developing software architecture aligned with organizational specifications.
* Leading the development team and ensuring adherence to industry\-standard best practices.
* Evaluating and enhancing the tools and frameworks utilized in software development.
* Managing multiple development projects and ensuring their prompt completion.
* Troubleshooting issues within the software systems effectively.
* Ability to proactively coordinate with team members, assist when needed, and take
* necessary steps to complete tasks on time.
* Capability to delve into details and explain the importance of each activity to team members.
* Keeping all stakeholders updated on task progress.
* Ensuring adherence to processes throughout the lifecycle.
* Ownership of responsibility for code quality, application security, functionality, and code performance.
* Designing, coding, and debugging products and features.
* Analyzing and resolving technical queries from the team.
* Collaborating effectively with cross\-functional teams such as Product Management, Business Development, and Operations.
* Working with frontend engineers to implement features.
* Designing appropriate solutions/architecture for products/features based on requirements, estimating efforts, and managing development.
* Managing and enhancing systems by innovating and implementing best practices.

**Key Skills:**

**1\) Java, JDK \& JVM**

* Expert Java 8\+ with deep JVM internals, GC, classloading, memory management, tuning
* Advanced concurrency: Executor/ForkJoin, locks, concurrent collections, Java memory model, non\-blocking programming

**2\) Spring Ecosystem (MVC, Boot, Cloud, Security, AI)**

* Expertise in Spring Boot, MVC, Cloud, Security, Data JPA, Batch; REST/SOAP/GraphQL with API governance
* Secure APIs using OAuth2/OIDC/JWT/TLS/mTLS; OWASP, secrets management, secure coding
* Spring Cloud hands\-on: Config/Gateway/Circuit Breaker/Discovery patterns
* Design and development of REST/SOAP/GraphQL APIs with best practices for **API versioning and documentation (Swagger/ OpenAPI)**

**3\) Coding \& Problem Solving**


Purpose of Coding Evaluation

* Coding is mandatory, but is used primarily to validate design thinking, architectural reasoning, and correctness, rather than pure DSA skills
* Evaluation focuses on design trade‑offs, extensibility, reliability, and correctness, over algorithmic optimization alone
* Problems typically involve refactoring, abstraction, concurrency, distributed system concepts, or observability‑aware design
* Note for Coding Exercises:

*Before implementing any solution, the candidate is expected to clearly explain design choices and architectural trade‑offs, such as:*

  

* 
* *Simplicity vs extensibility*
* *Consistency vs availability*
* *Performance vs maintainability*

**4\) Microservices, Distributed Systems \& Messaging (Kafka / RabbitMQ / MQ)**

* Define solution blueprints/reference architectures; microservices patterns; event\-driven design; service mesh concepts
* Distributed transaction thinking: ACID/CAP/eventual consistency; saga patterns; reliability strategies
* Kafka/RabbitMQ depth: streaming, partitioning, reliability patterns

 **5\) Architecture \& Design Patterns (incl. scalability \& observability)**

* SOLID, DDD, hexagonal architecture; architecture trade\-offs and decisions


Mandatory Skills: Fullstack Java Enterprise .

854ae6a6.title: AI Architect - Modern AI Applications
854ae6a6.description:
Thank you for your interest in joining Solventum. Solventum is a new healthcare company with a long legacy of solving big challenges that improve lives and help healthcare professionals perform at their best. At Solventum, people are at the heart of every innovation we pursue. Guided by empathy, insight, and clinical intelligence, we collaborate with the best minds in healthcare to address our customers’ toughest challenges. While we continue updating the Solventum Careers Page and applicant materials, some documents may still reflect legacy branding. Please note that all listed roles are Solventum positions, and our Privacy Policy: https://www.solventum.com/en\-us/home/legal/website\-privacy\-statement/applicant\-privacy/ applies to any personal information you submit. As it was with 3M, at Solventum all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Description:**
**AI Architect – Modern AI Applications**
**3M Health Care is now Solventum**
**At Solventum, we enable better, smarter, safer healthcare to improve lives. As a new company with a long legacy of creating breakthrough solutions for our customers’ toughest challenges, we pioneer game\-changing innovations at the intersection of health, material and data science that change patients' lives for the better while enabling healthcare professionals to perform at their best. Because people, and their wellbeing, are at the heart of every scientific advancement we pursue.**
**We partner closely with the brightest minds in healthcare to ensure that every solution we create melds the latest technology with compassion and empathy. Because at Solventum, we never stop solving for you.**
**The Impact You’ll Make in this Role**
 As a AI Architect with deep expertise in Machine learning, Agentic AI, Generative AI, and Natural Language Understanding (NLU), you will lead high\-impact AI Platform development for HIS applications. In this role, you will be a hands\-on research and development leader \- driving technical breakthroughs, designing novel AI architectures, and directly influencing the integration of advanced AI into mission\-critical healthcare products. You will collaborate closely with other scientists, engineers, and domain experts to create platform/solutions that are explainable, reliable, and transformative for healthcare operations.
   

  

**This role is focused on building scalable AI platforms and frameworks from scratch and is not a data science or model experimentation role.**
**Key Responsibilities**
**Healthcare\-Focused AI Development**
* Architect, design and develop AI platform to support large language models to handle healthcare\-specific language, regulatory requirements, and ethical considerations.
* Frameworks which can support AI pipelines that can process structured and unstructured healthcare data (FHIR, HL7, clinical notes, claims data).
* Contribute to domain\-specific model architectures that improve clinical decision\-making, revenue cycle management, and patient engagement.


**Technical Leadership**
* Serve as the primary technical authority on any AI Platform related development within product teams.
* Mentor junior AI designers and engineers through code reviews, research guidance, and technical workshops.
* Drive internal knowledge\-sharing on emerging AI trends, frameworks, and best practices.


**Operational \& Compliance Excellence**
* Implement rigorous model evaluation frameworks for accuracy, robustness, and fairness.
* Ensure compliance with healthcare privacy and data security regulations (HIPAA, HITRUST).
* Partner with engineering to move research prototypes into production environments.


**Required Qualifications**
* Master’s in Computer Science, AI, Machine Learning, or related field AND 10\+ years of experience in developing AI/ML platform on Cloud \& on\-Prem.


 Or
   

  

* 15\+ software engineering background in AI, Machine Learning, or related field with 10\+ years of experience in building AI/ML platforms.
* Proficiency in Python, R, and modern ML libraries.
* Experience with GenAI, LLMs, and transformer architectures.
* Skilled with AI development tools and frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, LangChain, RAG systems).
* Hands\-on experience with autonomous AI agents and reasoning systems.
* Strong track record applying AI to healthcare or life sciences use cases.
* Strong background with cloud platforms ,On Prem and MLOps/LLMOps practices.
* Strong background in Kubernetes , Terraforms etc.,
* Proven ability in Observability, Logging and Scalable systems


**Preferred Skills**
* Knowledge graph db, No SQL/SQL DB
* Proven ability to take Architecture/Design from concept to production.


 For current employees, internal transfer restrictions may not apply. For more details, contact your local recruiter/HR team.
   

  

**Work location:**
* India


**Supporting Your Well\-being**
 Solventum offers many programs to help you live your best life – both physically and financially. To ensure competitive pay and benefits, Solventum regularly benchmarks with other companies that are comparable in size and scope.
   

  

 Solventum is committed to maintaining the highest standards of integrity and professionalism in our recruitment process. Applicants must remain alert to fraudulent job postings and recruitment schemes that falsely claim to represent Solventum and seek to exploit job seekers.
   

  

 Please note that all email communications from Solventum regarding job opportunities with the company will be from an email with a domain of
 **@solventum.com** 
 . Be wary of unsolicited emails or messages regarding Solventum job opportunities from emails with other email domains.
   

  

**Please note: your application may not be considered if you do not provide your education and work history, either by: 1\) uploading a resume, or 2\) entering the information into the application fields directly.**

 Carefully read these Terms of Use before using this website. Your access to and use of this website and application for a job at Solventum are conditioned on your acceptance and compliance with these terms.

b80be9d3.title: Enterprise Architect, Professional Services, Google Cloud
b80be9d3.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Gurugram, Haryana, India; Mumbai, Maharashtra, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience performing customer\-facing services focused on translating enterprise customer needs into cloud architectures.
* Experience writing software in one or more languages (e.g., Java, Python, Go).
* Experience developing software, internet infrastructure, or migration solutions in virtual environments.
* Experience leading technical execution for multi\-system projects and delivering technical strategies to executive stakeholders.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience designing cloud\-native distributed systems and integrating artificial intelligence models into enterprise applications.
* Experience establishing technical strategies, data governance standards, and architectures for regulated enterprise environments.
* Experience with standard IT security practices, including identity and access management, data protection, and encryption.
* Experience automating infrastructure provisioning, continuous integration pipelines, and container orchestration technologies.
* Ability to advise executive stakeholders on capability mapping and aligning technical roadmaps with business objectives.


**About the job** 
 The Google Cloud Consulting Professional Services team guides customers through the moments that matter most in their cloud journey to help businesses thrive. We help customers transform and evolve their business through the use of Google’s global network, web\-scale data centers, and software infrastructure. As part of an innovative team in this rapidly growing business, you will help shape the future of businesses of all sizes and use technology to connect with customers, employees, and partners.
   

  

 As a Principal Enterprise Architect, you will act as a trusted domain expert bridging complex commercial direction with production\-grade technical implementations. You will lead strategic relationships with executive stakeholders, advising them on how to optimize their use of cloud technology to support overarching business processes. Operating at the intersection of business strategy and software engineering, you will own the technical execution of partnerships, translate enterprise needs into architectures, and guide teams through complex digital transformations.
   

  

 In this role, you will lead discovery workshops, construct business capability maps, and define long\-term technical road maps. You will apply core software engineering and system design principles to modernize existing applications and architect novel, cloud\-native solutions incorporating advanced artificial intelligence and agentic workflows. By overseeing system\-level architecture, evaluating technical trade\-offs, and establishing data governance and reliability standards, you will ensure solutions are secure, and commercially viable.Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Build and maintain strategic relationships with executive stakeholders to advise on technology strategy, translating ambiguous enterprise needs into structured technical road maps and solutions.
* Lead discovery workshops and business capability mapping sessions to define solution constraints, operational goals, and value\-based implementation sequences.
* Oversee the design and execution of cloud\-native system architectures, utilizing domain\-driven design, event\-driven patterns, and secure integration blueprints.
* Guide the technical development of repeatable solutions, application modernization frameworks, and artificial intelligence orchestrations while ensuring system diagnostics and compliance with industry standards.
* Provide technical direction and mentorship to cross\-functional delivery teams, driving agile governance, code design reviews, and architecture decision logs to ensure product excellence.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

7f116042.title: Solutions Architect
7f116042.description:
**Description**
 AWS is hiring for Solutions Architects, who embeds directly inside India's most strategic enterprise accounts to architect production AI systems that deliver measurable business impact. The role will support complete engagement from discovery and scoping, through architecture and help build/co\-build.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Lead discovery through production rollout for strategic enterprise accounts, co\-building and architecting agentic systems on Amazon Bedrock, AgentCore, and Strands Agents
   

  

* Translate requirements into Guardrails, Automated Reasoning Checks, data residency configurations, and audit\-ready compliance artifacts that regulated enterprises can take to their risk teams.
* Design and deliver working AI prototypes, then architect the path to production, hardening with eval frameworks, IaC (AWS CDK), observability, and enterprise security
* Architect and co\-develop production MCP servers, RAG pipelines, multi\-agent orchestrations, and LLM\-as\-judge eval frameworks alongside customer engineering teams, leaving them with complete, owned deployment packages they can operate independently.
* Codify repeatable deployment patterns into AWS\-wide playbooks and feed structured field signal (model gaps, eval results, feature friction) directly to Amazon Bedrock PM and AgentCore engineering teams, shaping the AWS AI roadmap for India.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 4\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 2\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience
* 10\+ years of IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries experience
* Experience in industry work in a related environment
* Experience in customer engagement
* Experience with AWS technologies
* 
* Lead discovery workshops with customer CTO / engineering teams to map high\-value AI use cases across multiple industry verticals.
* 
* Own technical scoping, solution architecture for agentic AI workloads on Amazon Bedrock and AgentCore.
* 
* Build PoCs leveraging Amazon Bedrock, Strands Agents SDK, Amazon AgentCore
* 
* Design and implement multi\-agent orchestrations, MCP tool servers, RAG pipelines (Knowledge Bases for Bedrock, OpenSearch Serverless, Aurora pgvector), and LLM\-as\-judge evaluation frameworks.
* 
* Deliver IaC (AWS CDK / CloudFormation / Terraform) for repeatable, production\-grade deployment patterns that the customer can own post\-engagement.
* 
* Navigate India's regulatory and translate requirements into Bedrock Guardrails, Automated Reasoning Checks, and data residency configurations.
* 
* Architect AI systems for auditability: model version pinning, prompt logging, PII redaction, inference geography (ap\-south\-1\), and compliance artifact generation.
* 
* Deliver eval\-driven acceptance criteria: define benchmark suites, run eval loops against domain\-specific test sets, and produce launch\-evidence packages that satisfy customer risk / model governance teams.
* 
* Run structured discovery (jobs\-to\-be\-done, process mining, failure mode analysis) to identify AI leverage points and sequence delivery for maximum early impact.
* 
* Build long\-term technical relationships with customer engineering leadership and proactively surface new AI deployment opportunities across the account lifecycle.
* 
* Codify repeatable deployment patterns into AWS\-wide playbooks, reference architectures, and GitHub samples that scale insights across hundreds of customers.
* 
* Feed structured field signal (model gaps, tooling friction, feature requests, eval results) to AWS Engineering teams
* 
* Collaborate with AWS SA leadership, Specialists, Partner SA, and ISV teams to deliver joint engagements and avoid duplicating effort.
* 
* Represent AWS AI at customer EBCs, industry conferences, and CXO briefings — you are the technical face of AWS's GenAI capability in the field.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working within software development or Internet\-related industries
* Experience migrating or transforming legacy customer solutions to the cloud
* Experience working with AWS technologies from a dev/ops perspective


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10456379

8ef1c60c.title: Technology & Transforma Data Delivery Manager | Delhi | Engineering | Data Modernization & Migration
8ef1c60c.description:
Job requisition ID :: 106561
Date: Jul 15, 2026
Location: Delhi
Designation: Senior Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Technology \& Transformation \| EAID \| Engineering \|Data Delivery Manager \| Delhi \|Data Modernization**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 106561
* **Location**: Delhi
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**The team**



Deloitte’s Technology \& Transformation practice can help you uncover and unlock the value buried deep inside vast amounts of data. Our global network provides strategic guidance and implementation services to help companies manage data from disparate sources and convert it into accurate, actionable information that can support fact\-driven decision\-making and generate an insight\-driven advantage. Our practice addresses the continuum of opportunities in business intelligence \& visualization, data management, performance management and next\-generation analytics and technologies, including big data, cloud, cognitive and machine learning.


Job Description:


* Closely work with Domain Managers and business requesters to understand the requirement. Partner with the Data Domain Owner, Data Engineering and Data Management Specialists to deliver the domain data strategy.


* Collaborate with global teams and market D\&A teams to gather the requirements and create a backlog.


* Deep dive at the data element level to create the quality source to target mapping.


* Take accountability on the output validation and the UAT support.


* Strong collaboration with Tech team, Project Manager and delivery lead.


* Act as the Data Manager for the domain, ensuring data products meet Bank data policy, standards and governance expectations.


* Translate policy/regulatory requirements into clear, practical data control requirements.


* Escalate control gaps, control failures and poor monitoring outcomes to accountable owners for timely action.


* Define and maintain domain data controls (preventative/detective/corrective) including scope, frequency and evidence.


* Oversee control adoption across data products and pipelines; drive automation where possible.


* Monitor control operations, review results, challenge anomalies and ensure issues are remediated.


* Deliver agreed governance artefacts (trusted sources, metadata, lineage, DQ) to plan and contribute to process improvements

  



Job Requirements

  


* Sufficient understanding of data domain and a complete data life cycle.


* In\-Depth understanding of Banking products , Customer and product related metrics.


* Experience in requirements Gathering, Data analysis, Data quality monitoring and Data lineage.


* Good interpersonal skills to collaborate with various teams and leads.


* Clear communication and presentation skills


* Strong in SQL.


* Identify and maintain Trusted Sources/aggregators for critical data elements with business and IT.


* Define Data Quality rules, thresholds and monitoring; review DQ results and drive remediation with owners.


* Ensure metadata and catalogue entries are complete and accurate; coordinate with SMEs/Data Governors.


* Ensure business and technical lineage is captured and kept current in approved tools.


* Support risk \& control assessments, issue/action tracking, and audit/regulatory requests with clear documentation and evidence.


* Work across stakeholders to embed governance and controls into delivery and BAU operations.

  


**Preferred Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

  


**Location and Way of Working:**

  


* Base location: Banglore, PAN India

266d2815.title: Technical Consultant - Snowflake Administrator ,  Cloud DBA, Python, FinOps & SnowPro Advanced
266d2815.description:
**Scope**
* This is a highly strategic, pure operations and infrastructure leadership role. It does not involve building data pipelines, ETL, or data models.
* You will act as the ultimate technical authority for platform reliability, security, and governance, administering the underlying Snowflake infrastructure that supports globally distributed, multi\-tenant SaaS applications operating at petabyte scale.
* The role demands deep expertise in systems administration, securing network perimeters, managing automated identity lifecycles, and engineering massive\-scale cost\-governance frameworks across dozens of federated Snowflake accounts.


**Technical Environment**
* Platform Infrastructure: Multi\-Org/Multi\-Account management, Multi\-tenant Data\-as\-a\-Service (DaaS) sharding topologies, Serverless Compute governance, Snowflake Cortex \& Snowpark Container Services (SPCS) compute administration.
* Identity \& Access Lifecycle: OAuth 2\.0 (External \& Custom Clients), Machine\-to\-Machine (M2M) Authentication, Identity Provider (IdP) integration (Azure AD B2C, Okta, Entra ID), SCIM provisioning, Automated Key\-Pair rotation, Tri\-Secret Secure administration.
* Enterprise Security \& Network Posture: Zero\-Trust Network Rules, AWS PrivateLink / Azure Private Link / Google Cloud Private Service Connect, Attribute\-Based Access Control (ABAC), Hierarchical RBAC, Dynamic Data Masking, Row Access Policies, Audit Logging \& Access History forensics.
* Global Business Continuity (BC/DR): Account\-level Replication, Client Redirect, Cross\-Region/Cross\-Cloud Failover Groups, strict RPO/RTO SLA enforcement, Storage fail\-safe and Time Travel retention management.
* FinOps \& Compute Governance: Enterprise\-wide compute right\-sizing, programmatic Object Tagging for cost attribution, Organization Account Usage analytics, Resource Monitor enforcement, and concurrency scaling parameters.
* Platform Operations (DataOps): Terraform (IaC) for account and object provisioning, system\-level automation scripting (Python/SnowSQL), Notification Integrations, External Storage Integrations (AWS IAM/Azure Managed Identities).


**What You’ll Do**
* Design \& Architect: Define scalable, petabyte\-scale data lakehouse architectures. Establish enterprise coding standards, hierarchical RBAC models, and data security best practices.
* Develop \& Deliver: Architect multi\-cluster compute topologies for high\-concurrency workloads. Build low\-latency integrations with external compute engines and catalogs.
* Guide \& Govern: Provide technical leadership to data engineers. Lead technical whiteboarding sessions and data strategy workshops with business stakeholders.
* Operate \& Optimize: Implement robust FinOps monitoring, compute quotas, and warehouse right\-sizing routines. Perform deep root\-cause analysis on chronic platform contention issues.


**What We Are Looking For**
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Systems Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* 9–12 years of core IT/Database Operations experience, with a minimum of 5–7\+ years operating explicitly as a Lead Snowflake Administrator or Cloud DBA in a Fortune 500 or multi\-tenant SaaS environment.
* Strictly Admin Focused: This role requires a background in systems administration, database administration (DBA), or cloud infrastructure. Candidates whose primary background is Data Engineering or ETL development will not be a fit.
* Mastery of Snowflake’s security models, specifically concerning programmatic API access, Oauth 2\.0 configuration, SCIM, and automated credential rotation.
* Deep expertise in resolving complex Snowflake concurrency issues, managing queuing logic, and debugging systemic infrastructure bottlenecks via query profiling.
* Advanced scripting skills (Python, bash, SnowSQL) specifically utilized for systems administration, platform automation, and integrating with CI/CD pipelines (Terraform).
* Certifications: SnowPro Advanced: Administrator is heavily preferred. Active cloud administration certifications (AWS SysOps/Azure Administrator) are a significant plus.


**Our Values**
 If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success – and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like ours? Find out here: Core Values
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

29a28186.title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
29a28186.description:
An extraordinarily talented group of individuals work together every day to drive TNS' success, from both professional and personal perspectives. Come join the excellence!
   

  

**Overview**
 This role is responsible for designing, automating, deploying, and supporting secure, scalable cloud infrastructure that directly enables business growth and operational reliability. The ideal candidate brings strong technical depth in AWS, infrastructure\-as\-code, and Linux systems, along with a mindset focused on automation, resilience, and continuous improvement. Candidates should be comfortable collaborating across time zones, working asynchronously when needed, and supporting platforms used by a global customer base.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Primary Duties and Responsibilities:**
* Design, implementation, and support for infrastructure as code using tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, and Ansible.
* Plan, deploy, and maintain AWS cloud infrastructure aligned to business objectives, performance, security, and availability requirements.
* Work with interdisciplinary teams to develop optimal cloud based solutions (Design, Build, Deploy)
* Maintenance, monitoring, and troubleshooting of AWS infrastructure
* Provide environmental analysis and recommend performant solutions
* Continuous improvement of service delivery to internal and external customers
* Evangelize process automation where at all possible
* Create, maintain, and improve documentation for processes, architecture, or other infrastructure elements


**Qualifications**
**Qualifications:**
* 5\+ years’ experience managing Linux/Unix systems (Red Hat, Ubuntu preferred)
* 3\+ years’ experience managing AWS infrastructure
* Advanced knowledge of AWS native tooling and architecture
* Experience deploying cloud native networks and interconnecting with on\-prem networks
* Strong understanding of cloud networking and security
* Granular experience deploying cloud native solutions
* Skilled in development of least privilege IAM policies
* Experience developing and applying cloud resource tags
* Experience using Infrastructure as Code tools (Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible, etc.)
* Familiarity with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab)
* Strong scripting or coding experience
* Demonstrated skills in decision making/judgement and initiative
* High integrity, accountability, and a positive attitude
* Team player with good interpersonal, organizational, and communication skills


**Optional Desired Qualifications**
* AWS certification
* Global infrastructure support experience preferred
* Red Hat, CentOS, Ubuntu preferred
* Exposure to other facets of IT helpful
* Knowledge of PCI/SOC1/SOC2 requirements and controls helpful


**Education And Certifications**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience required
* ITIL certification preferred


 If you are passionate about technology, love personal growth and opportunity, come see what TNS is all about!
   

  

 TNS is an equal opportunity employer. TNS evaluates qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, gender, national origin, age, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, disability/handicap status or any other legally protected characteristic.

87eda328.title: Cloud Specialist
87eda328.description:
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a Cloud Specialist with 8 to 10 years of experience to join our team. The ideal candidate will have expertise in Amazon DynamoDB Amazon Lambda AWS Kinesis and AWS CLI. This role involves working in a hybrid model with day shifts. Experience in Claim File Management is a plus. The position does not require travel.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and implement cloud\-based solutions using Amazon DynamoDB to enhance data storage and retrieval efficiency.
* Utilize Amazon Lambda to create serverless applications that improve system scalability and performance.
* Leverage AWS Kinesis to process and analyze streaming data in real\-time ensuring timely insights and decision\-making.
* Employ AWS CLI for efficient management and automation of AWS services optimizing operational workflows.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to integrate cloud solutions with existing systems ensuring seamless functionality.
* Monitor and troubleshoot cloud infrastructure to maintain high availability and reliability of services.
* Provide technical guidance and support to team members fostering a collaborative and innovative work environment.
* Conduct regular assessments of cloud architecture to identify areas for improvement and implement necessary changes.
* Ensure compliance with industry standards and best practices in cloud computing to safeguard data integrity and security.
* Document cloud processes and configurations to facilitate knowledge sharing and continuity.
* Engage in continuous learning to stay updated with the latest cloud technologies and trends contributing to the companys competitive edge.
* Participate in the design and execution of disaster recovery plans to ensure business continuity.
* Contribute to the companys mission by delivering cloud solutions that enhance operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.


**Qualifications**
* Possess strong technical skills in Amazon DynamoDB Amazon Lambda AWS Kinesis and AWS CLI essential for cloud solution development.
* Demonstrate experience in Claim File Management which is advantageous for understanding domain\-specific requirements.
* Exhibit excellent problem\-solving abilities crucial for troubleshooting and optimizing cloud infrastructure.
* Show proficiency in collaborating with cross\-functional teams vital for successful project integration and execution.
* Maintain a proactive approach to learning and adapting to new cloud technologies ensuring continuous improvement and innovation.


**Certifications Required**
 AWS Certified Solutions Architect or AWS Certified Developer

892793a4.title: Technology Delivery Lead
892793a4.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Technology Delivery Lead
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Manages the delivery of large, complex technology projects using appropriate frameworks and collaborating with sponsors to manage scope and risk. Drives profitability and continued success by managing service quality and cost and leading delivery. Proactively support sales through innovative solutions and delivery excellence.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Oracle Argus
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Technology Delivery Lead, a typical day involves overseeing the execution of substantial and intricate technology initiatives by applying suitable project management frameworks. The role requires close collaboration with project sponsors to effectively control project scope and mitigate risks. Throughout the day, the Technology Delivery Lead ensures that service quality and cost efficiency are maintained to drive profitability and sustain ongoing success. Additionally, the role includes fostering innovation and excellence in delivery to support business growth and client satisfaction, while coordinating efforts across multiple teams to achieve project objectives.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.
* Lead the planning and execution of technology delivery activities to meet project goals and timelines.
* Facilitate communication and alignment between stakeholders to ensure clarity and transparency throughout the project lifecycle.
* Mentor and support junior team members to enhance their skills and contribute effectively to project delivery.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Oracle Argus.
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies and frameworks relevant to technology delivery.
* Experience in risk management and mitigation strategies within complex project environments.
* Ability to coordinate cross\-functional teams and manage stakeholder expectations effectively.
* Excellent problem\-solving skills with a focus on delivering innovative and practical solutions.
* Strong communication and leadership capabilities to guide teams and influence decision\-making.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in Oracle Argus.
* This position is based at our Coimbatore office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

ab855ca8.title: SAP Delivery Manager-Senior Manager
ab855ca8.description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**Service line \- Position Title: Delivery Executive – Senior Manager**
 At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**About Global Delivery Services**
* Global Delivery Services refers to EY's worldwide network of service delivery centers. The GDS team plays an important role in EY’s strategy by ensuring effective support to EY’s growth agenda.
* Our journey started in 2002 with approximately 200 people. Today we stand at 80,000\+ professionals in ten locations around the world. We operate in Argentina, China, Hungary, India, Philippines, Poland, Sri Lanka, Mexico, Spain and the United Kingdom.
* Client service is focused on providing Consulting, Assurance, Tax, Strategy \& Transactions, and Knowledge support to our clients around the world. The teams enable account teams worldwide to provide seamless, high\-quality, value\-added support, helping deliver exceptional client service.
* Enablement Services provides cost\-effective, high\-skilled, and innovative services to support EY’s global and local enablement teams. Markets, BMC, AWS, Finance and Accounting, Risk Management, Procurement, People Shared Services, IT Service Delivery and IT Global Infrastructure services, are among the services offered by Enablement Services.
* Our innovation specialists serve the GDS Client Service and Enablement Services teams, along with Service Lines, Core Business Services and Sectors. The team brings the desired environment, technologies and skilled teams together for facilitation, rapid prototyping and innovative thinking. The competencies offered include analytics, digital, user experience, mobile technology, infrastructure, Microsoft technologies and open innovation.


**The Opportunity**
 The Global MS Delivery Executive oversees all of the engagements of a specific offering (understood as the end\-to\-end delivery, including technology, process and people) and works with the various engagement leaders to improve performance and deliver results and outcomes which are in line with the respective cost baselines “as sold” and EY´s related MS contractual obligations.
   

  

* In terms of proposition development this role will focus on delivering services across the following topics
* Offering delivery normative models and Global Standard Operating Models (GSOM)
* Competence development and ramp up for the specific offering
* Regulatory advisory work when applicable to the offering and on specific engagements
* Risk assessments when applicable to the offering and on specific engagements
* Transformation/change management across offerings and engagements
* Technology/analytics enablement across offerings and engagements
* On boarding/Transition and Data Operations of related engagements
* Quality Assurance \& Remediation
* Training


**Your Key Responsibilities**
* This position owns the end\-to\-end delivery of the defined Managed Services offering to enable growth plan/s.
* Brand and eminence – extend our reputation in the marketplace
* Grow related capabilities through people development, new hires, and service line alignment and develop the appropriate third\-party relationships with the various stakeholders in the supply chain of the specific offering
* End to end delivery, including technology for the offering globally
* Connecting all the SDCs (Service Delivery Centers). Site leaders for specific offering will be coordinated by this role and Account Delivery Leaders will have a dotted line into it as well
* Looking across the offerings and delivery centres to ensure accuracy of delivery for all engagements/solutions
* Accountable for the aggregated cost of delivery as it pertains to the respective offering.
* Deal support – role will support when clients want to review delivery and carry out due diligence. This role will need to manage due diligence visits and sign off on the cost baseline of the deals to make sure the scope is in fact “deliverable” and the supply chain is optimized
* Deal support – they will be the face of delivery for the related offering.
* Accountable for: delivery transformation, continuous improvement and transformation of the delivery network; all the SLAs for the specific offering. Input into the SLAs and build of offering Delivery Leaders in GDS and the SDCs


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
* Take on leadership role in driving the development of the Global/Managed Services delivery business contributing to growing headcount and revenues as applicable
* Confidence and experience to lead a “first of a kind deal” arrangement and establish new delivery capabilities where needed
* Develop ecosystem of supplier and product vendor relationships and how to take to market a price attractive offering blending in markets and near/off shore resources.
* Enhance our existing recruitment, on\-boarding, and development plan to both target hire experience to support the growth of the practice, and establish a training curriculum to develop the necessary skills to deliver to this market demand.
* Dedicated people accountable to this role, following global standards, right processes etc.
* Strength to withstand significant personal pressure and overtime on a regular basis to address role


**To qualify for the role, you must have**
* MBA and or Master's Degree
* Prior experience in Managed Services delivery of global operations (12\+ years)
* Experience in Service Management, Tech Ops and Data Ops functions and UAT capabilities and outsourcing
* Skilled in reengineering initiatives and data intelligence capability
* Lead Global Transformation programmes
* Experience in build/transform MS operations rather than operate BAU
* Domain expertise in the related field of play for the offering the candidate will drive in very large managed services/product companies with significant experience in interacting with senior client personnel including C\-level
* Experience of working in an Agile Scrum environment
* Be proficient in assessing options (e.g. risk, performance and cost\-benefit) and informing decision\-makers with persuasive visualizations based upon assessment outputs
* Can coordinate / collaborate with teams \& stakeholders in multiple geographies
* Manage Matrix teams with participants in multiple geographies
* This role requires flexibility in working with various Client and EY stakeholders across the world and in different time zones
* Travel required


**Ideally, you’ll also**
* Experience in integrated managed services solutions primarily around
* Risk: Transform the risk and controls functions and outcomes of the business, including enterprise risk, enterprise resilience, compliance, internal audit, and controls and protect value across stakeholders in the long term
* Finance: transform their finance functions and drive value creation by making finance more agile (responsive, insightful and efficient) to support better scalability, decision\-making and enterprise\-wide performance
* Integrated Workforce Mobility: Tax, Immigration, Compensation, Assignment \& Social Security
* IT outsourcing models, Cloud/Saas/Paas solutions and the role of IT in digital change
* You may have certification in TOGAF, PMP \& ITIL
* Proficiency in Design Thinking and Agile Methodology
* You will have core understanding of the big four and their got\-to\-market propositions


**What We Look For**
 Ability to extend our reputation in the marketplace
   

  

 Passion for problem\-solving and helping our clients with some of their most complex issues
   

  

**What We Offer You**
 At EY, we’ll develop you with future\-focused skills and equip you with world\-class experiences. We’ll empower you in a flexible environment, and fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams. Learn more.
   

  

 Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.
   

  

 To help create an equitable and inclusive experience during the recruitment process, please inform us as soon as possible about any disability\-related adjustments or accommodations you may need.
   

  

* Our Commitment: As a commitment, we persistently endeavour to embody our values, fulfil our purpose, and champion inclusiveness. Our dedication is to cultivate EY into an environment where diverse perspectives are celebrated, creating a supportive atmosphere for individuals to authentically be themselves and contribute their utmost.
* Professional Development: From entry\-level employees to senior leaders, we believe in continuous learning. We offer opportunities to build new skills, take on leadership roles, and connect and grow through mentorship.
* People and Culture: In our dynamic workplace, diversity, equity, and inclusiveness are ingrained in our culture. We're united by a commitment to create an environment where every individual's differences are valued, practices are equitable, fostering a sense of belonging. Our shared values include integrity, respect, teaming, inclusiveness, energy, enthusiasm, courage to lead, and building relationships based on doing the right thing.
* Benefits: Embark on a transformative career journey with us and indulge in a suite of premium benefits, encompassing exclusive health and wellness packages, enticing rewards, and cutting\-edge learning opportunities that empower you to continually grow and excel in your professional and personal development.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.
