da2e729c.title: Service Delivery Manager - Offshore
da2e729c.description:
**Company Description**
 Nexthink is the leader in digital employee experience management software. The company provides IT leaders with unprecedented insight allowing them to see, diagnose and fix issues at scale impacting employees anywhere, with any application or network, before employees notice the issue. As the first solution to allow IT to progress from reactive problem solving to proactive optimization, Nexthink enables its more than 1,200 customers to provide better digital experiences to more than 15 million employees. Dual headquartered in Lausanne, Switzerland and Boston, Massachusetts, Nexthink has 9 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Service Delivery Manager – MSP (SDM) is the focal point of driving the overall technical services delivery to any MSP customer from Day 1 as the project goes live. SDM is introduced as the SPOC from Technical Services at the beginning of the new logo implementation through any of the packages available with Nexthink. As the project enters the run phase, the SDM manages the delivery of scoped Managed Services (hereafter referred to as “Accelerate”) to Nexthink’s MSP Partner \& their end customer. They play a pivotal role in supporting the MSP \& their customer to realise value from the Nexthink platform. The SDM is supported by one or more Professional Services Consultants (PSC) as well as other support functions like Partner Success Manager, Product Managers, Product Support and more over, backend teams creating new content over the Nexthink platform. The objective of SDM is to ensure that Accelerate services are aligned with the customer success plan, and the value metrics being tracked for the customer, ensuring a continuous value delivery to the customer.
   

  

 The role will coordinate the daily activities of the assigned PSCs, along with the other supporting Accelerate teams located globally and focus on the highest priorities and the biggest impact to the customer, while providing quality assurance, and delivering within the agreed service levels.
   

  

 The role is a combination of technical and business skills; in which the candidate would work with the MSP \& their customer right from doing DEX Management planning, document mutually agreeable success parameters, assigning BAU tasks to Accelerate PSCs and setting a governance to track the achievements of set goals \& ultimately, document and present value achieved to the customer. The candidate should have the ability to assess technical requests, have meaningful discussions with customer on their objectives and map the same back to different product features / packages offered by Nexthink. SDM would be responsible to create and drive the Service Delivery Strategy for the customer and would work internal and external stakeholders across the customer and partner organizations.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Single Point of Contact (SPOC) for the Managed Service Provider (MSP) and their customer, overseeing all deliverables outlined in the Services contract.
   

  

 Participate actively in Customer Steering Group meetings, collaborating with the MSP to discuss Nexthink's role in the customer's Digital Experience (DEX) strategy, understand the partner / customer’s priorities and effectively, ensure timely and qualitative delivery of services.
   

  

 Provide guidance to the PSC \& MSP to drive the Business as Usual (BAU) operations. Recommend new business use cases and engage with the customer / MSP to increase adoption of Nexthink.
   

  

 Analyze customer’s business needs \& pain areas through regular connects, understanding of TCDs from Service Desk \& various data seen from Nexthink. Identify opportunities to increase automation of issues \& leverage existing as well as custom created contents to deliver value to the customer’s / MSP business.
   

  

 Gain a deep understanding of the customer's business goals and objectives as outlined in the MSP contract, aligning Nexthink's deliverables with these objectives.
   

  

 Comprehend the customer's DEX goals, strategic plans, pain points, and limitations to offer informed advice on leveraging Nexthink effectively.
   

  

 Conduct thorough analysis of Nexthink data and present actionable insights to the customer. Create well documented presentations, capturing insights from data and provide recommendations.
   

  

 Organize and coordinate for regular governance calls with MSP as well as bi\-monthly / quarterly business review meetings with a focus on getting things done, based on CSP and mutually agreed road\-map.
   

  

 Collaboratively plan the Customer Success Plan and strategy with the PSM, Sales team, PSC \& SC regularly; ensure to update the CSP based on the customer’s priorities.
   

  

 Lead and manage the PSC / PSCs assigned to specific projects, ensuring their tasks and goals align with the Customer's Success Plan (CSP).
   

  

 Identify and advocate for automation opportunities that bring value to the customer. Prioritize and request custom automation or report creation as needed, working backend with the other support teams of Accelerate.
   

  

 Develop content tailored to customer requirements, collaborating with the Shared Services team for custom scripting, reports using external tools with Nexthink data, custom NQL queries.
   

  

 Support customer initiatives related to Nexthink operations, including existing and upcoming projects. Encourage customer participation in Technical Previews of new features.
   

  

 Organize regular product roadmap workshops to keep customers informed about new features and modules.
   

  

 Meet Service Level Objectives (SLOs) and take prompt action, including internal escalations or partner notifications, in case of any impacts on SLO achievement.
   

  

 Identify and fulfill agreed\-upon use cases, consistently delivering results quarter after quarter.
   

  

 Validate any new service / content requirements from the partner and raise the records in JIRA ticketing system. Assign tasks to self or PSC, post validation.
   

  

 Establish and maintain a regular communication cadence with the MSP and customer through weekly, monthly, and quarterly meetings, ensuring that progress is tracked by PSCs.
   

  

 Maintain updated Action Trackers \& other relevant documents on OneDrive, including customer related insights and roadmap discussions. Update Salesforce records as required.
   

  

 Prepare all customer\-facing and internal deliverables, ensuring they meet high\-quality standards.
   

  

 Coordinate and communicate with cross\-functional teams, including Sales, Support, and Partner Success, to align Managed Services activities.
   

  

 Increase the footprint of Nexthink across different functions of the customer, within IT as well as non\-IT related usage. Enhance stickiness of Nexthink to ensure smooth renewal and possible product upsells.
   

  

 Escalate issues internally and externally when necessary to ensure prompt resolution. Follow\-up with Product Support or relevant resolver groups to ensure timely resolution of issues raised. Raise RED FLAGS to alert in case of any deviations.
   

  

 Stay informed about product development and releases at a level necessary to fulfill the above responsibilities, and inspire PSCs to innovate continuously to maximize Nexthink's value.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or Computer Engineering preferred.


**Experience:**
* 8 \- 10 years of experience in technical consulting, analytics, and automation, with a preference for candidates with this background.
* Consulting\-based approach in previous roles coupled with good project management skills.
* Knowledge of Nexthink / competing products would be an advantage.
* Flexible to work in UK / US shifts


**Key Skills and Attributes:**
* Analytical Expertise: Proficient in analyzing data to identify pain points and opportunities, with a strong commitment to providing actionable insights and driving automation.
* Transformation Experience: Demonstrated experience in transformation projects, such as Win10 and O365 migrations.
* End User Computing (EUC) Mastery: Extensive technical knowledge of end user computing (EUC) management.
* Collaborative Aptitude: Skilled at collaborating with dispersed teams, including CTOs, product management, and support, to deliver the right solutions and innovate based on customer input.
* IT Operations Proficiency: Deep understanding of IT operations.
* Quick Learner: Ability to rapidly acquire knowledge of new technologies.
* Customer\-Centric: Proven ability to gather and manage customer feedback, comprehend customer pain points, and propose practical solutions.
* Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with a strong ability to engage with customers and collaborate effectively within a team.
* Problem Management: Exceptional problem\-solving skills to address complex issues effectively.
* Adaptability: Capability to excel in challenging environments and adapt to changing circumstances.
* Enthusiasm for Innovation: Passion for working in an international, collaborative, and fast\-paced environment and eagerness to learn and adopt new technologies.
* Technical Proficiency: Excellent knowledge of Microsoft Windows, Office 365, web browsers, and other standard EUC applications.


**Preferred:**
* Nexthink certified professional / previous experience of working with Nexthink or similar DEM tools.
* Practical knowledge of Windows, Office 365 \& overall EUC insights
* Understanding of SQL, XML, PowerShell, PowerBI would be ideal.
* Practical experience of data integration methods and technologies
+ in any of the following:
+ IT systems
+ Enterprise infrastructure management / Data Centers
+ Application development and management
+ Managed IT Services
+ Security
+ Analytics – EU data

* Project Management skills (ITIL, PMP)


**Additional Information**
 We are the pioneers and trailblazers of a global IT Market Category (DEX) that is shaping the future of how the world works, giving our customers’ IT Teams total digital visibility across their enterprise. Our innovative solutions integrate real\-time analytics, automation, and employee feedback across all endpoints. This enables our IT teams to solve complex technical challenges, create ever more productive workplaces, and deliver happy, satisfied employees in the digital workplace.
   

  

 With over 1000 employees across 5 continents, Nexthink operates as One Team, connecting, collaborating and innovating to continuously grow. We call our employees ‘Nexthinkers’ and our commitment to diversity, inclusion, and equity is second to none. We currently have over 75 nationalities working with us, from all cultures and backgrounds, speaking many different languages.
   

  

 If you are looking for a change and like a nice atmosphere, lots of challenges, and having fun while working, this is a great opportunity for you! Check what we offer:
   

  

* 💼 Permanent Contract and a competitive compensation package.
* 🩺 Health insurance through our partnership with ACKO, including OPD coverage for dental, vision, health check\-ups, consultations, and pharmacy expenses.
* 🏡 Hybrid work model balancing office and remote work, with a structured approach for new hires to foster connections and onboarding.
* 🏖️ Flexible Hours and unlimited vacation (employees have unlimited paid time off on top of the 22 days of holidays we offer). Plus, company\-paid bank holidays (12\), sick days (10\-30\), bereavement leave (5\), and 3 days per year for volunteering.
* 📚 Free access to professional training platforms to explore your interests and enhance your skills.
* 🛡️ Stay covered against accidents, bodily injuries, and disabilities with our personal accident insurance policy, providing assurance with coverage up to three times your annual CTC.
* 🍼 New mothers are entitled to up to 26 weeks of maternity leave, with the flexibility to use up to 8 weeks before the expected delivery and the remaining 18 weeks after. Birth fathers can take 6 weeks of paternity leave, while adoptive parents are eligible for 26 weeks of leave for mothers and 6 weeks for fathers.
* 💰 Under the Payment of Gratuity Act, receive gratuity at the rate of 15 days of basic pay for every completed year of service, provided you've been employed by the company for a minimum of 5 years. Gratuity is payable at retirement or resignation based on your last drawn basic pay.
* 📣  Bonuses for referring successful hires after three months of continuous employment.


*Please note that not all the benefits listed above are available for temporary, contract, and internship roles. To ensure you have the most up\-to\-date information, we recommend checking with your Recruitment Partner.*

ff069592.title: Technical Solutions Consultant (Remote)
ff069592.description:
**Role: Technical Solutions Consultant** 




**Location:** 
 Vijayawada/Guntur (surrounding areas)
 



**Experience:** 
 1\-3 yrs.
 



**Work:** 
 Remote
 



**Skillset** 
 : Development expertise
 



**Reporting to** 
 : Director
 



  





**About LeadSource Tech** 




 LeadSource Tech is a technology consulting and software development company helping businesses accelerate digital transformation through custom software, Artificial Intelligence, Microsoft Dynamics 365, Power Platform, cloud technologies, and business process automation.
 



 We partner with startups, SMEs, and enterprises to understand complex business challenges and deliver scalable technology solutions that create measurable business value.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a Technical Solutions Consultant who can bridge the gap between business and technology.
 



 This role is responsible for understanding client requirements, translating business challenges into practical technology solutions, preparing professional solution documents and proposals, and working closely with our engineering team to ensure successful project delivery.
 



 You will become the primary technical representative during client engagements, working alongside the sales team while collaborating closely with developers, architects, and project teams.
 



 This is a consulting role—not a sales role and not a software development role.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Client Discovery \& Consulting** 



* Participate in client meetings and discovery workshops.
* Understand client business processes, challenges, objectives, and technical requirements.
* Ask the right business and technical questions to uncover complete project requirements.
* Identify opportunities where technology can improve efficiency, automation, productivity, or customer experience.
* Build trust with clients by explaining technical concepts in simple business language.
* Conduct requirement clarification sessions throughout the project lifecycle.



  





**Solution Design** 



* Design high\-level solution approaches for software, AI, automation, and digital transformation projects.
* Recommend appropriate technologies, platforms, integrations, and implementation strategies.
* Work closely with technical leads to validate architecture, feasibility, scalability, and security considerations.
* Identify project assumptions, risks, dependencies, and constraints.
* Ensure proposed solutions align with client goals and budgets.



  





**Proposal \& Documentation** 




 Own the creation and maintenance of client\-facing technical documentation including:
 


* Technical Proposals
* Solution Documents
* Statements of Work (SOW)
* Scope of Work Documents
* Functional Requirement Documents (FRD)
* Business Requirement Documents (BRD)
* Software Requirement Specifications (SRS)
* RFP Responses
* RFQ Responses
* Tender Documentation
* Technical Presentations
* Project Estimates
* Project Timelines
* Assumption Registers
* Risk Assessments
* Change Request Documentation
* Meeting Minutes
* Discovery Notes
* User Stories (where applicable)



 Ensure all documentation is accurate, structured, professional, and client\-ready.
 



  





**Sales Support** 



* Support the sales team during technical discussions.
* Participate in solution presentations and proposal walkthroughs.
* Help prepare effort estimates with engineering teams.
* Assist in defining project scope before commercial discussions.
* Support bid submissions and enterprise procurement documentation.
* Contribute to proposal strategies for enterprise and government opportunities.



  





**Engineering Collaboration** 



* Translate client requirements into actionable technical deliverables.
* Conduct detailed handover sessions with development teams.
* Clarify functional requirements during project execution.
* Help manage requirement changes and scope updates.
* Ensure alignment between client expectations and engineering delivery.
* Act as the primary functional point of contact throughout implementation.



  





**Continuous Improvement** 



* Develop reusable proposal templates and solution frameworks.
* Maintain a repository of standard documentation and best practices.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies, AI trends, Microsoft technologies, cloud platforms, and automation tools.
* Contribute to improving LeadSource Tech's consulting methodology.



  





**Required Skills** 




**Technical Knowledge** 




 Strong understanding of one or more of the following:
 


* Custom Software Development
* Web Applications
* Mobile Applications
* REST APIs
* Cloud Platforms (Azure preferred)
* Artificial Intelligence \& Generative AI
* Business Process Automation
* Microsoft Dynamics 365
* Microsoft Power Platform
* Database Fundamentals
* System Integrations



 Hands\-on development experience is beneficial but not mandatory.
 



  





**Consulting Skills** 



* Excellent requirement gathering abilities.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to understand business workflows and convert them into technical solutions.
* High attention to detail.
* Structured documentation skills.
* Strong presentation abilities.
* Excellent stakeholder management.
* Ability to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously.



  





**Communication Skills** 



* Exceptional verbal and written English.
* Ability to explain complex technical concepts in simple business language.
* Strong presentation and negotiation skills.
* Professional client\-facing personality.



  





**Qualifications** 




 Preferred:
 


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.
* 1–3 years of experience in software consulting, solution consulting, technology consulting, solution architecture, or technical business analysis.
* Experience working with enterprise clients is preferred.



 Equivalent practical experience will also be considered.
 



  





**What We Value** 




 We value individuals who:
 


* Think from the client's business perspective before recommending technology.
* Communicate clearly and confidently.
* Take ownership and accountability.
* Are curious, proactive, and solutions\-oriented.
* Balance technical depth with commercial awareness.
* Thrive in collaborative environments.
* Continuously learn and adapt to emerging technologies.



  





**Why Join LeadSource Tech?** 




 You'll play a key role in shaping how technology solutions are designed, communicated, and delivered. This position offers the opportunity to work across AI, enterprise software, automation, cloud technologies, and digital transformation initiatives while collaborating directly with clients, leadership, and engineering teams to solve meaningful business problems.

76ac8088.title: Director I - Cloud Infrastructure Services
76ac8088.description:
**Role Description**
**Job Description: Global Head \- Presales and Solutions, Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS)**
**About UST**
 UST is a global leader in digital transformation, technology innovation, and AI, with headquarters in Aliso Viejo, California, USA. As a trusted partner to the world’s leading businesses, we specialize in IT infrastructure, cloud transformation, and cybersecurity. Our mission is to help enterprises accelerate their innovation journey while ensuring scalability and security.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced and visionary
 **Global Head \- Presales and Solutions** 
 for our Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) business. This is a senior leadership role that plays a pivotal role in shaping our global strategy and strengthening our position as a leading provider of cutting\-edge CIS solutions.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The
 **Global Head \- Presales and Solutions** 
 is responsible for leading and managing a global team of Pre\-Sales and Solutions Architects. This individual will drive the development of differentiated solutions, lead the design of winning proposals, and ensure compelling pricing and defence presentations to customers. The role demands a highly experienced leader with exceptional technical knowledge of Cloud and IT infrastructure, strong business acumen, and the ability to drive AI initiatives within CIS operations.
   

  

 This position requires extensive global customer experience and the flexibility to travel frequently across the globe and within India.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Leadership \& Team Management:
+ Lead, manage, and motivate a high\-performing global team of Pre\-Sales and Solutions Architects.
+ Foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement within the team.
+ Build and mentor the team to ensure they have the skills and tools necessary to meet organizational goals.

* Pre\-Sales Strategy \& Execution:
+ Drive pre\-sales strategies that align with the organization’s growth objectives and CIS market trends.
+ Develop winning proposals, pricing models, and defense presentations that effectively articulate UST’s value proposition.
+ Collaborate with sales, marketing, and delivery teams to understand customer needs and deliver tailored solutions.

* Solution Development:
+ Design and develop innovative and differentiated CIS solutions to meet customer needs, ensuring scalability, security, and efficiency.
+ Drive the adoption of AI\-driven initiatives to enhance CIS operations and customer outcomes.
+ Work closely with technology partners to stay ahead of the curve in cloud and IT infrastructure trends.

* Customer Engagement:
+ Conduct high\-impact customer presentations showcasing UST’s CIS capabilities and solutions.
+ Establish strong relationships with global customers, ensuring a deep understanding of their business challenges and objectives.
+ Act as a trusted advisor to customers, influencing their IT strategies and positioning UST as a preferred partner.

* Deal Leadership:
+ Lead and participate in strategic large deals, working closely with cross\-functional teams to drive deal closure.
+ Ensure alignment of proposed solutions with customer needs, business outcomes, and budget constraints.
+ Oversee contract negotiations and ensure adherence to UST’s risk management practices.

* Market Insights \& Thought Leadership:
+ Stay updated on industry trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technologies in cloud, IT infrastructure, and cybersecurity.
+ Represent UST at industry events, webinars, and conferences as a thought leader.
+ Contribute to the development of intellectual property (IP) and reusable assets for the CIS practice.


**Qualifications And Experience**
* Experience:
+ Over 20 years of experience in Pre\-Sales and Solutions for Cloud Infrastructure Services in a similar or larger IT services organization.
+ Proven experience in managing strategic large deals and working on managed service engagements.
+ Extensive global customer engagement experience.

* Technical Expertise:
+ Deep technical knowledge of Cloud platforms (e.g., Azure, AWS, GCP) and IT infrastructure technologies (e.g., networking, storage, cybersecurity).
+ Expertise in leveraging AI and automation within CIS operations.

* Leadership Skills:
+ Strong track record of leading and managing large, diverse, and globally distributed teams.
+ Demonstrated ability to inspire, mentor, and grow talent within an organization.

* Business Acumen:
+ Strong understanding of commercial models, pricing strategies, and deal structuring.
+ Exceptional written and verbal communication skills to articulate complex solutions effectively.

* Education:
+ Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
+ MBA or equivalent business qualification is a plus.

* Additional Requirements:
+ Willingness to travel globally and within India, as required.


**Why Join UST?**
* Be a part of a globally recognized organization driving innovation and digital transformation.
* Work in a dynamic, collaborative, and high\-impact environment.
* Lead the development of cutting\-edge CIS solutions for global customers.
* Grow your career while contributing to transformative projects across industries.


**Skills**
 cloud infrastructure,cloud security,presales,aws,

6922f6c3.title: SAP Delivery Manager-Senior Manager
6922f6c3.description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**Service line \- Position Title: Delivery Executive – Senior Manager**
 At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**About Global Delivery Services**
* Global Delivery Services refers to EY's worldwide network of service delivery centers. The GDS team plays an important role in EY’s strategy by ensuring effective support to EY’s growth agenda.
* Our journey started in 2002 with approximately 200 people. Today we stand at 80,000\+ professionals in ten locations around the world. We operate in Argentina, China, Hungary, India, Philippines, Poland, Sri Lanka, Mexico, Spain and the United Kingdom.
* Client service is focused on providing Consulting, Assurance, Tax, Strategy \& Transactions, and Knowledge support to our clients around the world. The teams enable account teams worldwide to provide seamless, high\-quality, value\-added support, helping deliver exceptional client service.
* Enablement Services provides cost\-effective, high\-skilled, and innovative services to support EY’s global and local enablement teams. Markets, BMC, AWS, Finance and Accounting, Risk Management, Procurement, People Shared Services, IT Service Delivery and IT Global Infrastructure services, are among the services offered by Enablement Services.
* Our innovation specialists serve the GDS Client Service and Enablement Services teams, along with Service Lines, Core Business Services and Sectors. The team brings the desired environment, technologies and skilled teams together for facilitation, rapid prototyping and innovative thinking. The competencies offered include analytics, digital, user experience, mobile technology, infrastructure, Microsoft technologies and open innovation.


**The Opportunity**
 The Global MS Delivery Executive oversees all of the engagements of a specific offering (understood as the end\-to\-end delivery, including technology, process and people) and works with the various engagement leaders to improve performance and deliver results and outcomes which are in line with the respective cost baselines “as sold” and EY´s related MS contractual obligations.
   

  

* In terms of proposition development this role will focus on delivering services across the following topics
* Offering delivery normative models and Global Standard Operating Models (GSOM)
* Competence development and ramp up for the specific offering
* Regulatory advisory work when applicable to the offering and on specific engagements
* Risk assessments when applicable to the offering and on specific engagements
* Transformation/change management across offerings and engagements
* Technology/analytics enablement across offerings and engagements
* On boarding/Transition and Data Operations of related engagements
* Quality Assurance \& Remediation
* Training


**Your Key Responsibilities**
* This position owns the end\-to\-end delivery of the defined Managed Services offering to enable growth plan/s.
* Brand and eminence – extend our reputation in the marketplace
* Grow related capabilities through people development, new hires, and service line alignment and develop the appropriate third\-party relationships with the various stakeholders in the supply chain of the specific offering
* End to end delivery, including technology for the offering globally
* Connecting all the SDCs (Service Delivery Centers). Site leaders for specific offering will be coordinated by this role and Account Delivery Leaders will have a dotted line into it as well
* Looking across the offerings and delivery centres to ensure accuracy of delivery for all engagements/solutions
* Accountable for the aggregated cost of delivery as it pertains to the respective offering.
* Deal support – role will support when clients want to review delivery and carry out due diligence. This role will need to manage due diligence visits and sign off on the cost baseline of the deals to make sure the scope is in fact “deliverable” and the supply chain is optimized
* Deal support – they will be the face of delivery for the related offering.
* Accountable for: delivery transformation, continuous improvement and transformation of the delivery network; all the SLAs for the specific offering. Input into the SLAs and build of offering Delivery Leaders in GDS and the SDCs


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
* Take on leadership role in driving the development of the Global/Managed Services delivery business contributing to growing headcount and revenues as applicable
* Confidence and experience to lead a “first of a kind deal” arrangement and establish new delivery capabilities where needed
* Develop ecosystem of supplier and product vendor relationships and how to take to market a price attractive offering blending in markets and near/off shore resources.
* Enhance our existing recruitment, on\-boarding, and development plan to both target hire experience to support the growth of the practice, and establish a training curriculum to develop the necessary skills to deliver to this market demand.
* Dedicated people accountable to this role, following global standards, right processes etc.
* Strength to withstand significant personal pressure and overtime on a regular basis to address role


**To qualify for the role, you must have**
* MBA and or Master's Degree
* Prior experience in Managed Services delivery of global operations (12\+ years)
* Experience in Service Management, Tech Ops and Data Ops functions and UAT capabilities and outsourcing
* Skilled in reengineering initiatives and data intelligence capability
* Lead Global Transformation programmes
* Experience in build/transform MS operations rather than operate BAU
* Domain expertise in the related field of play for the offering the candidate will drive in very large managed services/product companies with significant experience in interacting with senior client personnel including C\-level
* Experience of working in an Agile Scrum environment
* Be proficient in assessing options (e.g. risk, performance and cost\-benefit) and informing decision\-makers with persuasive visualizations based upon assessment outputs
* Can coordinate / collaborate with teams \& stakeholders in multiple geographies
* Manage Matrix teams with participants in multiple geographies
* This role requires flexibility in working with various Client and EY stakeholders across the world and in different time zones
* Travel required


**Ideally, you’ll also**
* Experience in integrated managed services solutions primarily around
* Risk: Transform the risk and controls functions and outcomes of the business, including enterprise risk, enterprise resilience, compliance, internal audit, and controls and protect value across stakeholders in the long term
* Finance: transform their finance functions and drive value creation by making finance more agile (responsive, insightful and efficient) to support better scalability, decision\-making and enterprise\-wide performance
* Integrated Workforce Mobility: Tax, Immigration, Compensation, Assignment \& Social Security
* IT outsourcing models, Cloud/Saas/Paas solutions and the role of IT in digital change
* You may have certification in TOGAF, PMP \& ITIL
* Proficiency in Design Thinking and Agile Methodology
* You will have core understanding of the big four and their got\-to\-market propositions


**What We Look For**
 Ability to extend our reputation in the marketplace
   

  

 Passion for problem\-solving and helping our clients with some of their most complex issues
   

  

**What We Offer You**
 At EY, we’ll develop you with future\-focused skills and equip you with world\-class experiences. We’ll empower you in a flexible environment, and fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams. Learn more.
   

  

 Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.
   

  

 To help create an equitable and inclusive experience during the recruitment process, please inform us as soon as possible about any disability\-related adjustments or accommodations you may need.
   

  

* Our Commitment: As a commitment, we persistently endeavour to embody our values, fulfil our purpose, and champion inclusiveness. Our dedication is to cultivate EY into an environment where diverse perspectives are celebrated, creating a supportive atmosphere for individuals to authentically be themselves and contribute their utmost.
* Professional Development: From entry\-level employees to senior leaders, we believe in continuous learning. We offer opportunities to build new skills, take on leadership roles, and connect and grow through mentorship.
* People and Culture: In our dynamic workplace, diversity, equity, and inclusiveness are ingrained in our culture. We're united by a commitment to create an environment where every individual's differences are valued, practices are equitable, fostering a sense of belonging. Our shared values include integrity, respect, teaming, inclusiveness, energy, enthusiasm, courage to lead, and building relationships based on doing the right thing.
* Benefits: Embark on a transformative career journey with us and indulge in a suite of premium benefits, encompassing exclusive health and wellness packages, enticing rewards, and cutting\-edge learning opportunities that empower you to continually grow and excel in your professional and personal development.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

91ad539e.title: Practice / Delivery Manager - Warehouse Management System(Manhattan)
91ad539e.description:
**About the Company :** 




 Headquartered in California, U.S.A., GSPANN provides consulting and IT services to global clients. We help clients transform how they deliver business value by helping them optimize their IT capabilities, practices, and operations with our experience in retail, high\-technology, and manufacturing. With five global delivery centers and 2000\+ employees, we provide the intimacy of a boutique consultancy with the capabilities of a large IT services firm.
 



  





**Role:** 
 Practice / Delivery Manager \- WMS
 



**Experience:** 
 16\+ Yrs
 



**Work Location:** 
 Gurugram / Noida / Hyderabad / Pune / Bangalore
 



**Skills:** 
 Experience in any Warehouse Management System (Manhattan), Agile, Integration
 



  





**Role \& responsibilities** 



* Drive and manage the technology \& product roadmap planning and processes.
* Constantly lookout for innovation and lead strategic planning and drive development initiatives.
* Accountable for developing applications, solutions, frameworks / tools / accelerators with superior technical mastery in Warehouse Management products / tools.
* Conceptualize, analyse, create blueprint for business transformations and present solutions.
* Proactively research, evaluate, prototype and recommend right technology platforms \& solutions to various clients to achieve business goals.
* Attend conferences to be up to date of technology standards and emerging technologies trends.
* Conduct Webinars showcasing technology capabilities.
* Setup COE Warehouse Management with standards, industry proven best practices and development methodologies.
* Contribute to Whitepapers, Blogs and encourage team members to participate.
* Lead the Presales activities from offshore for the new opportunities \& proposals working with various internal stakeholders (Sales, Account \& Delivery anchors)
* Manage multiple technology teams.
* Mentor the next level technology leaders of the practice.
* Work with HR and hiring teams to ensure timely fulfilment of technical resource needs.



  





**Preferred candidate profile** 



* 15 \+ years of experience with good hands\-on in Warehouse Management System (Manhattan).
* Good understanding of Supply Chain Management domain.
* Experience in understanding requirements and translate into effort estimates for the implementation of solutions.
* Experience in customizations and Integrations with Warehouse Management Systems.
* Proficiency in architecting large scale real\-time, complex distributed systems, modelling solutions.
* Should have creative problem \- solving skills related to technical issues.
* Flexible to manage changing technical goals and demands.
* Experience with design of modern, scalable technology platforms \& services.
* Experience in Agile development process.
* Demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, product, and technical challenges.
* Have proven ability to establish rapport, credibility , and influence others to drive results across the organization.
* Experience in market research \& analysis, feasibility assessments, prototyping to wireframes of technologies.
* Proven experience in working in matrix organizations with varying technology practices.
* Experience in managing 50\+ technical resources.
* Excellent communication skills along with experience in managing and motivating high performance teams and individuals.
* Demonstrated ability to think strategically about technical challenges and provide optimum solutions.
* Very strong logical thinking capabilities and analytical skills.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

dc60d372.title: Life Sciences Solutions -Manager, Technical Transformation
dc60d372.description:
**Summary**
**Position Summary**
**Artificial Intelligence \& Engineering**
 AI \& Engineering leverages cutting\-edge engineering capabilities to help build, deploy, and operate integrated/verticalized sector solutions in software, data, AI, network, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. These insights are powered by engineering for business advantage, helping transform mission\-critical operations.
   

  

 Join our AI \& Engineering team to help transform technology platforms, driving innovation, and help make a significant impact on our clients' achievements. You’ll work alongside talented professionals reimagining and re\-engineering operations and processes that could be critical to businesses.
   

  

 As a Manager at Deloitte Consulting, you will large scale tech and AI transformation programs across the R\&D spectrum for leading Life Sciences players, which may involve end\-to\-end delivery for AMS Operate engagements and implementation and configuration of critical R\&D applications (Veeva Vault suite, Planisware, Argus, etc.) — spanning Clinical, Regulatory, Quality, Safety, Early Phase and Development, and Medical Affairs application domains. You will serve as the primary client relationship owner and delivery accountable, combining deep R\&D domain expertise, hands\-on configuration and integration expertise, AMS operational excellence, and strategic thinking to translate complex business and operational challenges into structured, scalable, and compliant technology solutions. This role is central to Deloitte’s growing Life Sciences R\&D Managed Services practice, responsible for sustaining and evolving mission\-critical R\&D platforms at scale.
   

  

**Work you'll do**
* Lead large scale technology implementation and transformation programs for large pharmaceutical companies across their R\&D spectrum
* Translate business strategy into a multi\-year tech roadmap, aligned to drug discovery, pre\-clinical, clinical, and regulatory goals
* Lead cross\-functional global teams, establish governance, risk management, escalation processes, and executive reporting
* Ensure Computerized system validation (where applicable), audit readiness, data integrity, GxP compliance, risk assessments, change control, etc.
* Own the ITSM service management framework for Application Management and Support engagements, encompassing Incident Management, Problem Management, Change Management, and Service Request Management across all supported platforms.
* Serve as the primary escalation point for complex L2/L3 incidents and major operational issues; drive structured resolution with appropriate client communication and post\-incident review.
* Govern SLA performance, KPIs, and operational metrics across the AMS portfolio; prepare and present executive\-level operational reports and steering committee presentations.
* Oversee Change Management governance including CAB (Change Advisory Board) leadership, change risk assessment, and post\-implementation review programmes.
* Manage ServiceNow and JIRA platform governance, including dashboard design, reporting configuration, and tool administration oversight.
* Drive continuous service improvement and automation initiatives across the portfolio, quantifying efficiency gains and building improvement roadmaps.
* Enforce GxP and applicable compliance standards across all engagement activities — implementation, configuration, and AMS operations — including 21 CFR Part 11, EU Annex 11, ICH E6 GCP, ICH M8 eCTD, ISO 9001/13485, GMP/GLP requirements, OPDP/MHRA promotional guidelines, and PhRMA/EFPIA codes of practice, as applicable to each platform and domain in scope.
* Ensure audit trail integrity, data integrity controls, and regulatory adherence are embedded in all service delivery and implementation processes.
* Lead engagement\-level preparation for regulatory inspections and GxP IT audits; act as the primary Deloitte interface during client audit events.
* Review and approve engagement\-level documentation including governance frameworks, SOPs, solution design documents, and change management records.
* Lead R\&D platform advisory and roadmap discussions with senior client stakeholders, aligning scope and capabilities to evolving R\&D technology strategies across Clinical, Regulatory, Quality, Safety, and Medical Affairs domains.
* Oversee the transition of new R\&D platform implementations and upgrades into steady\-state operations, including knowledge transfer, run\-book development, and hyper\-care management to ensure service continuity and operational readiness.
* Drive adoption of intelligent automation, AI\-assisted monitoring, and analytics capabilities


**The team**
 You will play a key role in delivering and evolving verticalized Managed Services solutions tailored to the unique needs of Life Sciences R\&D clients across Clinical, Regulatory, Quality, Safety, and Medical Affairs. In this role, you will help transform how organizations run and sustain mission\-critical operations by combining specialized talent, standardized delivery models, and advanced technology. You will support clients in improving service delivery, driving operational efficiency, maintaining compliance, and enabling scalable growth in a dynamic and highly regulated environment.
   

  

**Location** 
 : Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Required** 
 :
   

  

* 10\+ years of experience in Life Sciences IT, with significant hands\-on experience in configuration, integration, and AMS / Operate delivery across R\&D application domains (Clinical, Regulatory, Quality, Safety, and/or Medical Affairs), including at least 3 years in a management or delivery leadership role.
* Proven track record leading complex Life Sciences R\&D technology engagements across two or more of the following domains: Clinical (e.g. CTMS, EDC, eTMF, study management), Regulatory (e.g. RIM, eCTD, submissions), Quality (e.g. QMS, LMS, document management), Safety (e.g. pharmacovigilance, safety reporting, Argus), or Medical Affairs — with strong emphasis on platform configuration, system integration, and AMS Operate delivery.
* Demonstrated ability to lead delivery governance across multiple workstreams, with accountability for scope, service quality, financial performance, and client outcomes.
* Some expertise in ITSM processes, including Incident, Problem, Change, and Service Request Management, within GxP\-regulated environments.
* Experience overseeing Life Sciences platform implementations, including solution design governance, transition to support, hyper\-care management, and go\-live readiness across R\&D domains.
* Strong proficiency in ServiceNow for ITSM governance, SLA/KPI management, and operational reporting, as well as JIRA for Agile delivery management and cross\-functional coordination.
* Comprehensive understanding of GxP requirements for Life Sciences R\&D systems, including 21 CFR Part 11, Annex 11, ICH E6 GCP, and other relevant ICH guidelines.
* Proven track record of building, leading, and developing cross\-functional onsite/offshore teams within a global delivery model.
* Demonstrated ability to manage senior client and executive stakeholder relationships, define and govern SLAs, and drive service performance against contractual commitments.
* Experience managing engagement financials, including budgeting, forecasting, revenue/margin oversight, and overall commercial performance.
* Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to communicate complex delivery and operational topics clearly to senior and executive audiences.
* Experience defining and executing continuous service improvement initiatives and automation roadmaps across managed services environments.
* Excellent documentation skills across governance artifacts, operating procedures, solution and support documentation, SLA dashboards, and executive\-level reporting.


**Preferred** 
 :
   

  

* Veeva Vault certification
* PMP (Project Management Professional) or PRINCE2 Practitioner certification.
* ITIL Expert or ITIL v4 Managing Professional certification.
* SAFe Agile or equivalent scaled Agile delivery certification.
* Broad platform familiarity across Life Sciences R\&D domains, including clinical (e.g. Medidata Rave, Vault Clinical, Oracle Clinical One, Planisware, SAS Grid), regulatory (e.g. Veeva Vault, Lorenz Docubridge, PRISM, Documentum), quality (e.g. MasterControl, Veeva Vault Quality, ComplianceWire, ALVIS LMS), and medical affairs (e.g. Veeva Vault MedInquiry, IRMS Anju (Admin, Web, DV, CM), Wordpress, Drupal medical websites), Safety (Argus Safety)
* Experience with cloud\-hosted Life Sciences platforms and GxP cloud compliance frameworks (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Knowledge of Life Sciences industry trends including digital R\&D transformation, AI/ML in drug development, and regulatory technology evolution.
* Experience in regulatory inspection readiness and support for GxP IT audits.
* Lean Six Sigma or equivalent process improvement certification.
* MBA or advanced postgraduate degree is a plus.
* BE / B.Tech / M.C.A. / M.Sc (CS) or MBA / equivalent postgraduate degree from an accredited university.


 \#CAL\-JPM
   

  

**Our purpose**
 Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
   

  

**Our people and culture**
 Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
   

  

**Professional development**
 At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .
   

  

**Benefits To Help You Thrive**
 At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
   

  

**Recruiting tips**
 From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
   

  

 Requisition code: 351353

**What We Offer You**
 At EY, we’ll develop you with future\-focused skills and equip you with world\-class experiences. We’ll empower you in a flexible environment, and fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams. Learn more.
   

  

 Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.
   

  

 To help create an equitable and inclusive experience during the recruitment process, please inform us as soon as possible about any disability\-related adjustments or accommodations you may need.
   

  

* Our Commitment: As a commitment, we persistently endeavour to embody our values, fulfil our purpose, and champion inclusiveness. Our dedication is to cultivate EY into an environment where diverse perspectives are celebrated, creating a supportive atmosphere for individuals to authentically be themselves and contribute their utmost.
* Professional Development: From entry\-level employees to senior leaders, we believe in continuous learning. We offer opportunities to build new skills, take on leadership roles, and connect and grow through mentorship.
* People and Culture: In our dynamic workplace, diversity, equity, and inclusiveness are ingrained in our culture. We're united by a commitment to create an environment where every individual's differences are valued, practices are equitable, fostering a sense of belonging. Our shared values include integrity, respect, teaming, inclusiveness, energy, enthusiasm, courage to lead, and building relationships based on doing the right thing.
* Benefits: Embark on a transformative career journey with us and indulge in a suite of premium benefits, encompassing exclusive health and wellness packages, enticing rewards, and cutting\-edge learning opportunities that empower you to continually grow and excel in your professional and personal development.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

4ae350a9.title: Engagement Manager
4ae350a9.description:
**Engagement Manager — CFO Services** 




  





**CFO2Growth \| Bengaluru \| Full\-time** 




  






 CFO2Growth is looking for an Engagement Manager with 1–3 years of post\-qualification experience to join our growing team.
 




  






 📍 Location: Bengaluru
 





 💼 Employment Type: Full\-time
 




  





**About CFO2Growth** 





 CFO2Growth is a boutique fractional CFO and advisory firm supporting founders, startups, and SMEs. We help businesses improve financial visibility, strengthen planning and reporting, and make data\-driven decisions through finance, analytics, and technology. Our engagements start with a data\-driven diagnostic of the client's finance function and convert into hands\-on controllership, FP\&A, compliance remediation, or IPO\-readiness work.
 




  





**About the Role** 





 The selected candidate will own client engagements end\-to\-end — running the client relationship, managing scope and delivery, and being the person the client calls first when something's off. This is not a review\-and\-approve seat; you will report into the partners with a check\-in, not line\-by\-line review of your work.
 




  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Own the client relationship and delivery for accounts concurrently
* Drive monthly close discipline across clients
* Prepare and present monthly MIS packs, business commentaries, and management reports
* Oversee statutory compliance across GST, TDS, and other applicable filings
* Lead weekly or bi\-weekly client conversations independently — status, risks, decisions required
* Identify issues proactively and resolve within scope
* Supervise associates and senior associates deployed on your accounts
* Contribute to diagnostic assessments for new client onboarding and existing client reviews



  





**Required Skills** 



* Chartered Accountant, 1–3 years post\-qualification experience
* Advanced proficiency in working with accounting ERPs \- Tally \& Zoho Books
* Working knowledge about Financial reporting, GST, TDS \& other compliance related aspects
* Advanced Excel \& AI Fluency \- Pivot tables, Advanced lookups, Ability to crunch high volumes of data
* Good communication skills and the ability to work directly with founders and CXOs



  





**Good to Have** 



* Prior experience managing more than one client or entity concurrently (multi\-entity audit or consulting background)
* Exposure to Power BI, Zoho Analytics, or similar reporting tools
* Experience with startup or SME clients across sectors

a9da0b57.title: Program Manager/Lead, Program Management (DESIS Tech PMO)
a9da0b57.company: D. E. Shaw India Private Limited
a9da0b57.description:
The D. E. Shaw group is a global investment and technology development firm with more than $90 billion in investment capital as of March 1, 2026, and offices in North America, Europe, and Asia. Since our founding in 1988, our firm has earned an international reputation for successful investing based on innovation, careful risk management, and the quality and depth of our staff. We have a significant presence in the world’s capital markets, investing in a wide range of companies and financial instruments in both developed and developing economies.
   

  

 We are looking for an exceptional individual to join the Tech Portfolio Management Office (PMO) in the firm’s office in Hyderabad. This team serves as the strategy office for the Head of the DESIS Tech Business Unit (BU) encompassing over 1,200 technical staff in India. DESIS Tech PMO acts as a centralized backbone, providing strategic consultations to the Tech leadership group, driving firm\- and BU\-wide initiatives, and compiling analytics and insights to empower leadership decision\-making. This is a role for a “Technologist with Strategic Aspirations”. It requires deep technical fluency (gained from significant hands\-on software development experience) combined with high\-level organizational strategy skills (demonstrated by education and/or experience collaborating with senior leadership). You will engage with engineering leads on system design or similar technical discussions, serving as a bridge between engineering and business\-level strategy.
   

  

**WHAT YOU'LL DO DAY\-TO\-DAY:**
 In this role, you will partner with the relevant stakeholders (Tech leadership, team leads) to work on BU\-wide tech strategies, programs, and initiatives. Specifically, you will serve as a technical thought partner on technical strategy and decision making, evaluate the technical health of programs, identifying short\- and long\-term risks before they impact the business. You will lead and coordinate complex, cross\-departmental projects and deliver actionable business intelligence by working with complex datasets and synthesizing insights for leadership. Additionally, you will encourage and institutionalize a culture of high performance, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:**
 The ideal candidate should hold\-
   

  

 Basic Qualifications:
   

  

* Overall work experience of 4 to 8 years with a minimum of 3 years of software engineering experience
* A degree in computer science engineering or a related technical field; an MBA (or equivalent) from a premier institution would be a plus
* Software engineering experience in areas such as full\-stack development, backend systems, and/or data engineering
* Proficiency in System Design (HLD/LLD) with the ability to whiteboard solutions and share technically sound opinions about technology/architecture choices
* Good grasp of modern technology development tools and development processes of enterprise\-scale products
* Proven ability to manage multiple strategic programs, including end\-to\-end planning, execution, and cross\-team collaboration
* Comfort working with ambiguity, navigating dynamic environments, and aligning the perspectives of diverse stakeholders (from technical engineers to senior executives)
* Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, the ability to confidently interact with both senior management and technical teams in a multicultural, global context


 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  

* Experience in management consulting and/or program management (ideally in a technology\-driven organization e.g., office of the Chief Technology Officer)


 Interested candidates can apply through our website:
   

  

 https://www.deshawindia.com/recruit/jobs/Adv/Link/PMOFeb25
   

  

 We encourage candidates with relevant experience looking to restart their careers after a break to apply for this position. Learn about Recommence, our gender\-neutral return\-to\-work initiative.
   

  

 The Firm offers excellent benefits, a casual, collegial working environment, and an attractive compensation package. For further information about our recruitment process, including how applicant data will be processed, please visit https://www.deshawindia.com/careers
   

  

 Members of the D. E. Shaw group do not discriminate in employment matters on the basis of sex, race, colour, caste, creed, religion, pregnancy, national origin, age, military service eligibility, veteran status, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, or any other protected class.

c9b50449.title: Technical Program Manager
c9b50449.description:
What You'll Do
   

  

 The Global Analytics \& Insights (GAI) team is seeking a Technical Program Manager to organize, coordinate, and accelerate delivery across Data \& Analytics Engineering programs. You will work with engineering teams, analytics stakeholders, product partners, and business leaders to ensure complex projects are delivered in a coordinated, transparent, and predictable manner.
   

  

 As a Technical Program Manager, you will play a key role in managing integrated delivery plans, tracking dependencies, driving release readiness, and ensuring teams have the clarity, resources, and communication needed to deliver successfully. You will be the source of truth for program status, risks, timelines, scope, and delivery health. You'll be collaborative and comfortable working across engineering, analytics, and business teams to solve complex delivery problems. You will report to Director, Data \& Analytics Engineering.
   

  

**What Your Responsibilities Will Be**
 As a Technical Program Manager, you will work with teams to organize and accelerate delivery, ensuring that you align all teams, manage dependencies, and make outputs production ready at launch.
   

  

* You will plan, execute, and deliver projects from inception to completion related to data platforms, analytics engineering, cloud infrastructure, and business\-critical data programs.
* You will describe and maintain integrated plans that account for internal and external dependencies, differing delivery approaches, delivery constraints, and contingencies for unplanned delays.
* You will manage the end\-to\-end delivery of engineering work across the organization and dependent teams.
* You will report progress, identify gaps between teams and processes, and remove blockers that impact delivery. Colleagues will look to you as the first contact for program status and delivery coordination.
* You will provide the right information and supporting data to the right audience at the right time.
* You will transform raw thoughts, ambiguity, and scattered inputs into clear, concise, actionable communications.
* Plan, execute, and deliver Data \& Analytics Engineering programs from inception to completion, ensuring alignment across engineering, analytics, product, and business stakeholders.
* You'll build and maintain integrated program plans covering scope, milestones, owners, dependencies, risks, delivery timelines, release readiness, and contingency plans.
* Track delivery health and provide clear, data\-driven updates on progress, blockers, scope, timing, milestone status, and production launch readiness.
* You'll manage cross\-team dependencies, identify gaps between teams or systems, and remove blockers to ensure outputs are production ready at launch.
* Run planning sessions, delivery reviews, dependency reviews, retrospectives, stakeholder updates, and launch readiness meetings.
* Partner with data engineers, analytics engineers, architects, and technical leads to understand technical scope, implementation risks, and delivery dependencies across SQL, Snowflake, dbt, Power BI, AWS, Terraform, CI/CD, and related data platform capabilities.
* Support initial merge request reviews by validating delivery readiness, documentation completeness, dependency impact, test evidence, and alignment to agreed scope before deeper technical review by engineers or SMEs.
* Maintain high\-quality documentation, including project plans, decision logs, risk registers, dependency trackers, launch plans, meeting notes, and stakeholder communications.
* Use AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT Enterprise, or approved internal AI assistants to improve productivity, summarize meetings, draft clear communications, strengthen documentation, identify risks, and improve overall program effectiveness.
* Build relationships with engineers, managers, peers, product partners, finance stakeholders, and analytics consumers while improving delivery processes using data and retrospectives.


 What You’ll Need To Be Successful
   

  

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Analytics, Business, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 7\+ years of experience in technical program management, engineering program management, data platform delivery, analytics program delivery, or related roles.
* Experience with Data \& Analytics Engineering concepts, including data pipelines, data modeling, analytics platforms, cloud data warehouses, and modern data stack delivery.
* Working knowledge of SQL, Snowflake, dbt, Power BI, AWS, Terraform, CI/CD practices, and infrastructure\-as\-code delivery models.
* Experience managing cross\-functional technical programs with multiple teams, team members, dependencies, delivery constraints, and production launch requirements.
* The ability to convert complex technical details and raw inputs into clear, audience\-appropriate updates.
* Stakeholder management and identify blockers, evaluate tradeoffs, and lead practical decisions.
* Experience running meetings and maintaining delivery artifacts using tools such as Jira, Confluence, Smartsheet, Google Workspace, or equivalent tools.
* Perform initial MR reviews for delivery completeness, documentation quality, test evidence, dependency impact, and scope alignment while partnering with engineers for detailed technical validation.
* Practical experience using AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT Enterprise, or approved internal AI assistants to improve productivity, communication quality, meeting summaries, documentation, risk identification, and decision support.
* Define program strategy while trying to find direction from peers or managers.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working in Data \& Analytics, Business Intelligence, Data Engineering, Finance Analytics, or cloud data platform organizations.
* Experience supporting programs involving Snowflake, dbt, AWS, Power BI, Airflow, Python, or similar data engineering technologies.
* Experience working with Finance, Sales, Marketing, Customer, or Product data domains.
* Experience managing release readiness, production launch planning, dependency management, or enterprise\-scale delivery coordination.
* Experience creating executive\-level program updates, dashboards, delivery scorecards, or operational reporting.
* Experience with Agile, Scrum, Kanban, SAFe, or hybrid delivery models.
* PMP, CSM, SAFe, AWS, Snowflake, dbt, or other relevant certifications.
* Experience working with globally distributed teams across multiple time zones.


 Avalara is an AI\-first Company
   

  

 AI is embedded in our workflows, decision\-making, and products. Success here requires embracing AI as an essential capability.
   

  

* You’ll bring experience using AI and AI\-related technologies, ready to thrive here.
* You’ll apply AI every day to business challenges \- improving efficiency, contributing solutions, and driving results for your team, our company, and our customers.
* You’ll grow with AI by staying curious about new trends and best practices, and by sharing what you learn so others can benefit too.


 How We’ll Take Care Of You
   

  

 Total Rewards
   

  

 In addition to a great compensation package, paid time off, and paid parental leave, many Avalara employees are eligible for bonuses.
   

  

 Health \& Wellness
   

  

 Benefits vary by location but generally include private medical, life, and disability insurance.
   

  

 Inclusive culture and diversity
   

  

 Avalara strongly supports diversity, equity, and inclusion, and is committed to integrating them into our business practices and our organizational culture. We also have a total of 8 employee\-run resource groups, each with senior leadership and exec sponsorship.
   

  

**What You Need To Know About Avalara**
 We’re defining the relationship between tax and tech.
   

  

 We’ve already built an industry\-leading cloud compliance platform, processing over 54 billion customer API calls and over 6\.6 million tax returns a year. Our growth is real \- we're a billion dollar business \- and we’re not slowing down until we’ve achieved our mission \- to be part of every transaction in the world.
   

  

 We’re bright, innovative, and disruptive, like the orange we love to wear. It captures our quirky spirit and optimistic mindset. It shows off the culture we’ve designed, that empowers our people to win. We’ve been different from day one. Join us, and your career will be too.
   

  

**We’re An Equal Opportunity Employer**
 Supporting diversity and inclusion is a cornerstone of our company — we don’t want people to fit into our culture, but to enrich it. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, age, gender, national orientation, disability, sexual orientation, US Veteran status, or any other factor protected by law. If you require any reasonable adjustments during the recruitment process, please let us know.

360c05a4.title: Technical Program Manager, Anti Financial Crime
360c05a4.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.
* Experience leading technical discussions and plans.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Strong technical judgment and experience guiding technical decisions and discussions.
* Demonstrated ability to own and deliver complex, cross\-functional technical programs end\-to\-end.
* Excellent ability to influence without authority and drive consensus across engineering, product, and UX.
* Exceptional communication skills, articulating complex topics to technical and non\-technical audiences.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 In this critical portfolio level role, you will take lead on execution and delivery governance across multiple workstreams. This portfolio is in the process of building cross\-functional operating model maturity, with a focus on effective and efficient delivery at scale. You will have the opportunity to drive process improvements across cross\-functional teams and work with stakeholders across different business units on their top compliance priorities, on some of the top priorities. To be successful in the role in addition to program management skills, you will need to have excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to influence and gain buy\-in across various stakeholder groups of technical and non\-technical teams across Google. You will be involved in all phases of the projects, including requirements gathering, planning, design, and deployment, through full integration.
   

  

 You will be part of a Global Payments Platform team and community working at global scale, with the opportunity to collaborate and drive impact not just within your program but also across the Payments community.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with team members and stakeholders to understand or identify defined work problems and program goals, obtain prioritized deliverables, and discuss program impact.
* Prioritize program goals, understand and translate other stakeholders needs into program goals and prioritized deliverables with minimal assistance, and contribute to decisions on prioritizing goals and deliverables.
* Define the scope of projects and develop, execute, or manage project plans for supported programs.
* Review key metrics pertaining to a program, monitor potential metric deviations, and define corrective actions for critical deviations.
* Identify, communicate, and collaborate with relevant stakeholders within one or more teams to drive impact and work toward mutual goals. Build, maintain and enhance business, operational, and management dashboards.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

f252ceb0.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
f252ceb0.description:
**Senior Technical Program Manager** 




  





 Shell Recharge Solutions is a leader in delivering the new electric mobility future through innovative software, infrastructure, and professional services that empower utilities, cities, fleets, transit agencies, and automakers to deploy EV charging infrastructure at scale. Our technology is connecting EV infrastructure solutions with public and private charging needs in a safer, cleaner, and smarter way. Headquartered in Offshore India the company’s global footprint spans across three continents with deployments in 13 different countries.
 



  





 At Shell Recharge Solutions, we are looking for candidates who want to be a part of something bigger than themselves – passionate, purpose\-driven individuals who believe having a career means making a meaningful impact on our business and the world. We believe in creating and doing ‘the right thing’ through responsible and sustainable EV deployment. We are looking for the innovative, driven to find a solution in a complex and dynamically evolving marketplace and look at “no” as just a challenge to find the next “yes”.
 



  





 Shell Recharge Solutions is seeking a
 **Senior Technical Program Manager** 
 !
 



  





 Shell Recharge Solutions is looking for a Senior Technical Program Manager to lead our Run and Maintain (R\&M) portfolio, overseeing the stability and performance of our production platforms including the Charge Point Management System (CPMS), Mobile App, and MSP integrations. You will drive global coordination across Engineering, QA, SRE, DevOps, Support, and Product teams to ensure that issues are resolved quickly, incidents are prevented, and performance improves with each release.
 



 You’ll play a key role in operational strategy, change management, and the measurement of production success using DevOps and DORA metrics like MTTR, change failure rate, and deployment frequency.
 



  










**What you’ll do:**



* Lead program execution across multiple regions and systems, coordinating sprint cycles focused on feature delivery and production stability
* Define, track, and drive improvement across project delivery metrics: OnTime delivery, quality, cost control, planning effectiveness, stakeholder satisfaction
* Serve as a primary escalation point for quality issues and align stakeholders on prioritizing and delivering functionalities.
* Oversee entire lifecyle of requirement from discovery through development to handover to the support team with effective planning, risk management and stakeholder management.
* Build and maintain dashboards and reporting tools to provide visibility into plan, progress, system health, regression quality, and delivery velocity.
* Drive delivery excellence through process improvements, retrospectives, and proactive risk management
* Partner with Product managers, Engineering leadership to define scope, resource plan, assess technical debt, prioritize feature, and balance maintenance with new feature delivery
* Coach and mentor other program managers
* Represent the TPM function in cross\-organizational planning and quarterly release readiness forums



  










**What We’re Looking For:**




**Basic Qualifications**



* 8\+ years of experience in program or technical project management, with at least 3 in a product development
* Proven track record of managing large\-scale programs working with product managers, engineering team, quality team, operations team
* Strong understanding of Agile delivery and production\-readiness best practices
* Excellent communication, collaboration, and leadership skills, especially in high\-pressure situations
* Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline



  





**Preferred Qualifications**



* Experience with EV charging platforms (CPMS, OCPP), mobile/backend app ecosystems, or other distributed systems
* Experience operationalizing DORA metrics
* Familiarity with incident management platforms, observability tooling, and CI/CD pipelines
* Comfortable leading in a global, matrixed environment with stakeholders across time zones



  





**What We Offer:**



* A work environment that allows you to work with and learn from some of the best and brightest in this emerging industry
* The ability to make a difference in a world that needs our technology to help reduce carbon emissions and enable a more sustainable energy future through the use of electric vehicle charging software, services and infrastructure
* The freedom to learn, suggest, and implement innovative new ideas applied to our systems, processes, programs and technologies
* Daily ownership of your role in a challenging, high\-growth environment.
* A casual work environment and culture that support work life ‘fit’, enabling you to fit life into your work and work into your life, i.e. flexible scheduling, virtualization options, and a generous holiday package
* Competitive pay and benefits programs designed to enable you to thrive inside and outside of work
* Participation in Shell Recharge Solutions’ performance and rewards bonus program
* Health benefits for employees
* Innovative Paid Time Off Program

847ddc2e.title: Technical Program Manager
847ddc2e.description:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.
