a6895308.title: Program Manager
a6895308.description:
**Key Responsibilities And Capabilities**
* Manages transitions across multiple service lines and geographies, as the single point owner
* Manage all workstreams within the transition including People Transfer, Process \& Tools, Organization Change Management
* Ensure that the Transition related clauses in any Contractual documents are measurable, attainable, and reportable
* Own all the activities planned and scheduled during the Transition phase
* In\-depth understanding of all Knowledge Transition phases, activities, deliverables and exit criteria
* Ability to collaborate with the Client and with internal stakeholders on a day\-to\-day basis to drive towards defined transition outcomes
* Proactive in identifying the risks and proposing mitigations to ensure the risks are addressed upfront with minimal impact on Transition KPIs
* Track and report all Transition KPIs across 1\) Cost 2\) Schedule 3\) Quality
* Prepare and present Transition status with clarity to senior stakeholders (both internal and client stakeholders); and to effectively report and address risks/issues
* Design transition solutions and build transition plans as part of sales pursuits / RFP process, and present the transition solution to the client as part of orals presentations
* Understand the working of Tools used directly or otherwise during a Transition such as ServiceNow and Jira
* Work closely with Client Stakeholders and SMEs / Transition leads to ensure the transition deliverables are reviewed and signed off on time
* Work closely with delivery teams to ensure cutover to steady state is effective and successful
* If other workstreams such as process transition / people transition are in scope \- work closely with the respective capabilities to ensure these workstreams are planned and executed within the agreed timelines
* Own the transition reporting both internally and with Client \- Weekly status and Steering committee reports
* Expertise in managing Org Level changes across the Client Org and Cognizant.


**Technical Skills \& Qualifications**
* Experience across multiple industry domains
* Experience in managing transitions larger than 500 FTEs across Application support and Application development services
* Experience in designing transition solutions and in making orals presentations to clients as part of sales pursuits/ RFP process
* Experience with transition Infrastructure services transition is desirable
* 18\+ years of experience


**Required Education:** 
 MBA or Master’s degree strongly preferred; Bachelor’s degree required

e657237a.title: Annotation Program Manager
e657237a.description:
**Annotation Program Manager**
==============================


**About Us**
------------



Are you ready to build the future of supply chain? At Gather AI, we're not just creating software, we're pioneering a new era of warehouse intelligence. We've developed a groundbreaking, vision\-powered platform that uses autonomous drones and existing equipment to capture real\-time data, completely digitizing workflows that have historically been manual and error\-prone. This means facilities operate smarter, safer, and more efficiently, ultimately redefining "on\-time, in full" delivery.



If you're looking for an opportunity to contribute to truly transformative technology and make a significant impact in a vital industry, Gather AI is the place for you. We're leading the charge in the rapidly evolving robotics industry, and we invite you to join us in reshaping the global supply chain, one intelligent warehouse at a time.


**About the Team**
------------------



Our engineering organization spans autonomy, computer vision and machine learning, embedded and hardware systems, full\-stack, and cloud, all working in parallel across multiple active product lines tied to live customer deployments. It's a technically deep, fast\-moving team where individual contributors carry real accountability and the work shows up directly in customer operations. We're at the stage where the complexity of running concurrent programs across disciplines has outpaced informal coordination, and we're ready to fix that.


**About the Role**
------------------



We are looking for an experienced **Annotation Program Manager** to own and scale our production annotation operations supporting computer vision and machine learning initiatives. This role is responsible for managing external annotation partners, improving annotation quality, maintaining documentation, and ensuring high\-quality labeled datasets are delivered on schedule to support model development.



You will work closely with Machine Learning Engineers, Data Engineers, and Operations teams while serving as the primary owner of our annotation programs and vendor relationship. Success in this role requires a combination of technical problem\-solving, operational excellence, and strong project management.


**What You'll Do**
==================


* Own day\-to\-day management of our annotation vendor relationship, including workload planning, throughput monitoring, and SLA management.
* Coordinate annotation batches, scheduling, and delivery timelines across multiple production programs.
* Monitor annotation quality and continuously improve labeling accuracy through structured QA processes.
* Develop, maintain, and improve annotation SOPs, taxonomies, and documentation.
* Build and maintain Python\-based workflows for annotation data preparation, API integrations, reporting, and validation.
* Partner with ML teams to prioritize annotation work that maximizes model performance.
* Track work across Jira and communicate project status, risks, and capacity needs to stakeholders.
* Drive operational improvements that reduce annotation turnaround time while maintaining high quality.

**First 90 Days**
=================



Within your first three months, you will be expected to:


### **Own Annotation Operations**


* Take over day\-to\-day coordination with CloudFactory from existing program owners.
* Own weekly turnaround time (TAT) reporting, batch scheduling, and vendor escalation management.
* Become the primary operational contact for annotation delivery.

### **Become Fluent in Existing Annotation Programs**



Develop working expertise in both active production annotation programs:


* MHEV forklift event labeling (PICK\_UP / DROP\_OFF) using the internal MHEV annotation application
* Drone Human\-in\-the\-Loop (HIL) annotation pipeline supporting case counting and empty detection through the CloudFactory API

### **Improve Annotation Quality**


* Audit completed annotation batches across both programs.
* Run inter\-annotator agreement (IAA) analysis against gold\-set datasets.
* Identify common annotation errors and present recommendations to ML leads.
* Lead calibration sessions with the annotation vendor as needed.

### **Own Documentation**



Take ownership of:


* MHEV Event Annotation SOP
* Barcode \+ Location Root Cause Analysis (RCA) SOP


Responsibilities include:


* Version control
* Closing documentation gaps
* Adding edge\-case guidance
* Ensuring all annotators are using current documentation

**Required Technical Skills**
=============================


* Annotation vendor management, including onboarding, batch management, SLA tracking, and calibration sessions
* Python scripting for data preparation, automation, reporting, validation, and API integrations
* Writing annotation SOPs, taxonomies, and detailed labeling guidelines
* Annotation quality assurance using inter\-annotator agreement (IAA), gold\-set validation, and structured quality programs
* Cloud storage and data handling using Azure Blob Storage or AWS S3, along with JSON and CSV data formats
* Strong Jira project management and task organization across multiple concurrent annotation programs

**Nice\-to\-Have Skills**
=========================


* Computer vision annotation experience including video event labeling, bounding boxes, polygon segmentation, or similar workflows
* Experience with annotation platforms such as Labelbox, Scale AI, CVAT, Hasty, or V7 Darwin
* Familiarity with active learning or ML\-assisted annotation prioritization

**Qualifications**
==================


### **Required**


* 3–6 years of experience in data operations, annotation program management, ML data engineering, or a closely related role
* Experience managing an external annotation vendor operating under production SLAs
* Strong Python programming skills for data preparation and API integrations
* Experience authoring annotation guidelines or standard operating procedures
* Understanding of data privacy and confidentiality requirements when working with customer operational data

### **Preferred**


* Experience with CloudFactory
* Experience in warehouse automation, robotics, or computer vision applications
* Experience with additional annotation platforms and APIs

**Required Technologies**
=========================


* Python
* REST APIs (CloudFactory API or equivalent annotation platform APIs)
* Azure Blob Storage or AWS S3
* Jira

**Success Traits**
==================



We're looking for someone who is:


* Highly organized and able to manage multiple concurrent workstreams
* Collaborative, respectful, and an excellent cross\-functional partner
* Detail\-oriented with a strong focus on annotation quality
* Resourceful and comfortable building processes where they don't yet exist
* Persistent in driving vendor accountability and meeting SLAs
* Comfortable managing external teams and influencing without direct authority
* Analytical, with the ability to identify root causes of annotation quality issues and implement lasting improvements

e633aa16.title: Technical Program Manager Telemetry BMS & EPSM
e633aa16.description:
**Technical Program Manager – Telemetry, BMS \& EPMS (APAC)**
 Location: India (Remote, APAC coverage)
   

 Engagement Type: Contract
   

 Duration: 12 Months (with possibility of extension)
   

 Region Ownership: Sole APAC lead for this program
   

 Overview
   

 We are seeking an experienced Technical Program Manager (TPM) to independently own and lead the end\-to\-end onboarding and integration of lease telemetry and industrial control systems — including Building Management Systems (BMS) and Electrical Power Monitoring Systems (EPMS) — across data centre construction environments in the APAC region.
   

 This role combines fleet telemetry onboarding with data centre controls delivery, and serves as the single point of program leadership across external lease providers, BAS/BMS/EPMS vendors, and internal engineering teams, for all of APAC. The candidate will operate as the primary regional owner, driving delivery across multiple sites and countries without a co\-located regional counterpart.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Program \& Delivery Ownership: Own end\-to\-end onboarding of lease telemetry providers and BAS/BMS/EPMS integration and deployment for Microsoft's Data Centres during construction. Manage scope, schedule, risks, dependencies, and milestone delivery across a multi\-site, multi\-country APAC environment.
   

  

**Sole Regional Leadership** 
 : Serve as the single accountable TPM for all APAC telemetry and controls onboarding activity, coordinating directly across markets without regional deputies.
   

 Stakeholder \& Vendor Management: Act as the primary interface between internal engineering teams and external vendors (lease telemetry providers, BAS/BMS/EPMS integrators). Lead onboarding readiness reviews and execution alignment.
   

 BAS, BMS \& EPMS Platforms: Oversee design, engineering, testing, and commissioning of building management and electrical power monitoring systems alongside telemetry platforms.
   

 Governance \& Reporting: Drive program governance, status reporting, and escalation management across all APAC workstreams.
   

  

**KPI Tracking** 
 : Monitor telemetry coverage, onboarding progress, and timeline adherence across sites.
   

 Process Improvement: Identify process gaps, standardise onboarding workflows, and build a scalable, repeatable onboarding framework for future APAC sites.
   

  

**Required Qualifications**
 5\+ years in Technical Program / Project Management, ideally within data centre, controls, or industrial IoT environments
   

 Proven experience delivering large\-scale data centre, IoT, or controls programs
   

 Hands\-on experience with BMS, EPMS, controls systems, or low\-voltage electrical systems
   

 Strong vendor and multi\-stakeholder management skills
   

 APAC regional delivery experience strongly preferred, given sole ownership of the region
   

 Familiarity with data centre construction projects and construction\-phase commissioning workflows
   

 Technical Expertise
   

 MQTT and device\-to\-cloud telemetry architectures
   

 Azure Event Hub or comparable event streaming platforms
   

 BAS/BMS system design and integration knowledge
   

 EPMS and low\-voltage electrical systems knowledge
   

 Industrial communication protocols: Ethernet/IP, Modbus, MQTT
   

 Data Centre Commissioning (L1–L5 stages) and system validation
   

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
 Prior data centre / critical environment delivery experience
   

 Broader telemetry / IoT ecosystem exposure
   

 PMP or equivalent program management certification
   

 Demonstrated multi\-country program experience, particularly across APAC markets
   

 Success Criteria
   

 Lease telemetry onboarding completed within agreed timelines
   

 Effective coordination between internal teams and external vendors across all APAC sites
   

 Strong stakeholder alignment and proactive risk mitigation
   

 A scalable onboarding model established and documented for reuse across future sites
   

  

**Business Impact**
 This role is critical to accelerating telemetry adoption, improving data centre observability, and standardising BMS/EPMS onboarding processes across the APAC region — with this individual acting as the sole regional driver of that outcome.

4f14e56f.title: Tech Lead - Cloud Application
4f14e56f.description:
By clicking the “Apply” button, I understand that my employment application process with Takeda will commence and that the information I provide in my application will be processed in line with Takeda’s Privacy Notice and Terms of Use. I further attest that all information I submit in my employment application is true to the best of my knowledge.
   

  

**Job Description:**
**The Future Begins Here:**
 At Takeda, we are leading digital evolution and global transformation. By building innovative solutions and future\-ready capabilities, we are meeting the need of patients, our people, and the planet.
   

  

 Bengaluru, the city, which is India’s epicenter of Innovation, has been selected to be home to Takeda’s recently launched Innovation Capability Center. We invite you to join our digital transformation journey. In this role, you will have the opportunity to boost your skills and become the heart of an innovative engine that is contributing to global impact and improvement.
   

  

**At Takeda’s ICC we Unite in Diversity:**
 Takeda is committed to creating an inclusive and collaborative workplace, where individuals are recognized for their backgrounds and abilities they bring to our company. We are continuously improving our collaborators journey in Takeda, and we welcome applications from all qualified candidates. Here, you will feel welcomed, respected, and valued as an important contributor to our diverse team
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Technical Lead and Program Manager in the Donor Information System (DIS) space within the Plasma\-Derived Therapies (PDT) business unit, you will lead the strategic planning, development and enhancement of web applications using Angular, .NET Framework and .NET Core, as well as spearhead the modernization of scheduler jobs into an event\-based real\-time architecture. Your role will be pivotal in driving innovation and operational excellence including day to day delivery and requires a strong technical background, leadership abilities, and a strategic mindset to drive the project to success. You will establish and enforce best practices, lead the delivery of scalable and secure solutions, and ensure that the execution aligns with critical project/business objectives. You will also be instrumental in fostering a culture of technical and engineering proficiency, mentoring a team of software developers and data engineers. Collaborating closely with business stakeholders and global leadership, you will ensure that the team’s efforts enhance business capabilities and drive forward the strategic goals of PDT as well as Takeda. Your leadership will be key in advancing the technology landscape to support the evolving needs of the global marketplace.
   

  

 This position will align to the ICC and report to the PDT Delivery Lead for strategic direction as well as day\-to\-day management.
   

  

 How you will contribute
   

  

* Lead and manage cross\-functional teams spanning different role types and own end to end delivery.
* Establish and nurture a positive team culture.
* Drive innovative thinking and identify opportunities for process improvements and new methodologies
* Oversee the development and enhancement of web applications, ensuring timely and high\-quality delivery.
* Design and implement robust, scalable, and maintainable architectures for web applications and event\-based jobs and task scheduler.
* Conduct regular code reviews to ensure code quality, performance, and security.
* Work closely with cross\-functional teams, including product managers, designers, and other stakeholders, to align technical solutions with business goals.
* Deliver robust solutions by following the product development lifecycle from requirement gathering to production deployments and hypercare.
* Maintain comprehensive documentation for all development processes, including architecture discussions, design, and code reviews.
* Optimize application performance and ensure scalability.
* Identify and resolve issues, ensuring minimal disruption to business operations.
* Work closely with business and IT teams to ensure data accuracy, consistency, and availability across different systems.
* Stay up to date with the latest trends and advancements in technologies, recommending new tools and techniques to enhance capabilities.
* Lead discovery workshops with stakeholders from different product teams.
* Oversee projects from conception to deployment, managing timelines, resources, and risks effectively.


**Minimum Requirements/Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a similar field required. Master's degree in a similar field would be a plus
* 10\-14 years of professional experience in full stack development with a focus on .NET Core and C\# language.
* Hands\-on experience with Monitoring‑Driven Development (MDD) and Test‑Driven Development (TDD), ensuring proactive observability and high\-quality, test\-first engineering practices.
* Experience with containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
* Proven experience in leading and mentoring development teams.
* Strong understanding of cloud computing concepts and hands\-on experience with Microservices, Dotnet core and AWS services.
* Exposure in front\-end development technologies such as HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and frameworks like Angular/ Angular JS or React.
* Experience with DevSecOps and secure SDLC practices, including hands\-on use of SonaType, JFROG, DAST, SonarCloud, and CodeQL for dependency scanning, vulnerability detection, and code quality enforcement.
* Proficiency with Git or other version control tools.
* Solid understanding of relational databases and experience with SQL.
* Strong problem\-solving skills and the ability to think strategically about complex issues.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively with diverse teams.
* Ability to manage and propose proper technology choices to determine what technology and methods can be combined for the optimal result in an ever\-changing product landscape.
* Understanding applicable regulatory compliance requirements surrounding PHI, PII, and GxP.


**Preferred Requirements**
* Understanding event\-based real\-time architectures and technologies such as Kafka, AWS SQS, or Lambda functions.
* Experience with project management tools like Jira.
* Familiarity with AI\-assisted coding tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot) to enhance productivity, code quality, and developer efficiency.
* Understanding of legacy technologies (VB6/VB.NET) is an advantage.


**BENEFITS:**
 It is our priority to provide competitive compensation and a benefit package that bridges your personal life with your professional career. Amongst our benefits are
   

  

* Competitive Salary \+ Performance Annual Bonus
* Flexible work environment, including hybrid working
* Comprehensive Healthcare Insurance Plans for self, spouse, and children
* Group Term Life Insurance and Group Accident Insurance programs
* Employee Assistance Program
* Broad Variety of learning platforms
* Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Programs
* Reimbursements – Home Internet \& Mobile Phone
* Employee Referral Program
* Leaves – Paternity Leave (4 Weeks) , Maternity Leave (up to 26 weeks), Bereavement Leave (5 calendar days)


**ABOUT ICC IN TAKEDA:**
* Takeda is leading a digital revolution. We’re not just transforming our company; we’re improving the lives of millions of patients who rely on our medicines every day.
* As an organization, we are committed to our cloud\-driven business transformation and believe the ICCs are the catalysts of change for our global organization.


**Locations:**
 IND \- Bengaluru
   

  

**Worker Type:**
 Employee
   

  

**Worker Sub\-Type:**
 Regular
   

  

**Time Type:**
 Full time

8ac30241.title: FinOps Program Manager, AI Enablement
8ac30241.description:
Who we are
   

  

**About Stripe**
 Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world's largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The FinOps organization at Stripe is responsible for the financial operations that sustain our business at scale. It comprises five specialized service teams:
   

  

* Accounts Payable (AP)—managing supplier invoices, vendor payments, and procurement workflows
* Accounts Receivable (AR)—overseeing customer billing, collections, and revenue operations
* Travel and Expense (T\&E)—managing employee expense processes and ensuring policy compliance
* Payroll—guaranteeing accurate and timely compensation for Stripe employees
* Monetization Operations (MonOps)—handling unique billing arrangements with our largest clients


 Supporting all five of these teams is FinOps Strategic Enablement—a dedicated function aimed at driving efficiency, scalability, and strategic value across the entire FinOps organization. This team provides expertise in process design, data management, and increasingly, artificial intelligence.
   

  

 As AI capabilities advance, FinOps Strategic Enablement is strategically investing in resources to ensure our service teams can fully harness these tools. This role is pivotal to achieving that objective.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

 We're seeking a FinOps Program Manager to act as a strategic catalyst for positive change. This high\-impact position focuses on identifying, defining, and managing large\-scale AI and process improvement initiatives through to successful completion.
   

  

 You'll serve as the primary partner for our sub\-teams, facilitating their transition from manual bottlenecks to AI\-driven solutions. Positioned at the intersection of Operational Excellence (OE), Finance Systems (FinSys), and AI technology, your objective is to transcend simple "handoffs" by thoroughly understanding technical requirements and driving solutions to fruition.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* AI Strategy and Scoping Collaborate with FinOps sub\-teams to identify high\-impact opportunities for AI and automation. Transform operational challenges into clear, actionable project roadmaps.
* End\-to\-End Project Management Lead strategic projects from initial discovery through technical implementation and post\-launch optimization.
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration Partner closely with OE leads and FinSys teams to design and develop scalable solutions. You'll ensure that the operational vision is accurately translated into system architecture.
* Continuous Improvement Foster a mindset focused on improvement to simplify and standardize processes before integrating AI capabilities.
* Solution Realization Take ownership of the final stages of implementation. Collaborate with technical teams to ensure the solution effectively addresses the business problem and delivers measurable ROI.


 Who you are
   

  

 We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.
   

  

**Minimum Requirements**
* The Architect You possess 4–6 years of experience in Program Management or Strategic Operations. You understand how to design workflows from the ground up, beyond merely tracking tasks.
* Technically Capable While not a software engineer, you are "technically savvy." You can navigate data structures and AI orchestration tools to build prototypes or initial solutions independently to validate concepts before transitioning them.
* Process Improvement Mindset You instinctively seek to eliminate waste. Your experience with Operational Excellence (Lean and Six Sigma) leads you to address process inefficiencies prior to automation efforts.
* The Bridge You excel at bridging the gap between Finance leads and FinSys engineers, translating operational challenges into technical requirements while preserving the business intent.
* Solution Realizer You possess a bias for action, ensuring that projects extend beyond the recommendation phase to guarantee the technical solution is adopted and delivers value to the sub\-teams.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Demonstrated experience managing complex, cross\-functional programs in Finance or Business Operations, with the ability to map financial workflows, identify AI and automation opportunities, apply Lean and Six Sigma methodologies, influence stakeholders, and drive projects from discovery through technical realization
* Experience in a Finance, Accounting, or FinOps function
* Familiarity with financial systems or ERP data (e.g., Oracle, SAP, NetSuite, Workday, Coupa)
* Experience with workflow orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, Prefect, or similar)
* Prior experience in an embedded engineering or "data product" role within a business unit


 In\-office expectations
   

  

 Office\-assigned Stripes in most of our locations are currently expected to spend at least 50% of the time in a given month in their local office or with users. This expectation may vary depending on role, team and location. For example, Stripes in Stripe Delivery Center roles in Mexico City, Mexico, Bengaluru, India, and Dublin, Ireland work 100% from the office. Also, some teams have greater in\-office attendance requirements, to appropriately support our users and workflows, which the hiring manager will discuss. This approach helps strike a balance between bringing people together for in\-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility when possible.
   

  

 Pay and benefits
   

  

 Stripe does not yet include pay ranges in job postings in every country. Stripe strongly values pay transparency and is working toward pay transparency globally.

a2c44680.title: Practice Lead - Presales (Apple BU)
a2c44680.description:
**Company Description** 
 Orbit Techsol is a technology solutions provider delivering end\-to\-end IT services, including hardware, networking, cybersecurity, cloud, AI, and digital transformation. With three decades of experience, the company combines strong vendor partnerships and highly skilled teams to design secure and scalable solutions for diverse business environments. Orbit Techsol operates with a client\-first approach, focusing on long\-term relationships and measurable business impact. Its pan\-India presence enables it to support organizations of varying sizes and sectors on their digital growth journeys. The company is committed to sustainable, innovation\-led outcomes that help businesses stay competitive in a rapidly evolving technology landscape.
   

**Role Description** 
 The Practice Lead – Presales (Apple BU) is a full\-time, on\-site role based in Noida, responsible for driving presales activities and solution design for Apple\-focused offerings. This role typically involves engaging with clients to understand their business and technical requirements, crafting tailored Apple ecosystem solutions, and preparing proposals, presentations, and demonstrations to support sales efforts. The Practice Lead collaborates closely with sales, technical, and delivery teams to ensure solution feasibility, accurate scoping, and alignment with Orbit Techsol’s standards and partner guidelines. Day\-to\-day activities include responding to RFPs/RFQs, conducting product and solution briefings, leading technical discussions, and supporting proof\-of\-concept initiatives. The role also involves staying updated on Apple technologies, training internal teams, and contributing to go\-to\-market strategies and practice development.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong experience in IT presales or solution consulting, preferably within an Apple\-focused business unit or similar device and ecosystem practice.
* Ability to understand client requirements and translate them into comprehensive solutions, proposals, and technical presentations.
* Background in enterprise IT solutions (hardware, networking, cloud, security or related domains) with familiarity or interest in Apple platforms and deployment models.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and presentation skills to interact confidently with clients and internal teams.
* Proven capability to work on\-site in a fast\-paced environment, manage multiple opportunities, and meet presales timelines.
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, information technology, computer science, business, or a related field; relevant professional certifications are an advantage.
* Experience collaborating with OEMs or technology partners and understanding of channel, enterprise, or B2B sales processes.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with a client\-centric mindset and commitment to ethical, inclusive, and non\-discriminatory practices.

684fa92c.title: Consultant / Sr. Consultant - Client & Patient Solutions
684fa92c.description:
About iCanHeal:
 
 At
 **iCanHeal** 
 , we are redefining patient access by partnering with leading pharmaceutical companies to design and deliver innovative
 **Patient Support Programs (PSPs), affordability solutions, digital health initiatives, and patient access models** 
 that improve healthcare outcomes across India.
 



 We are looking for a
 **Consultant – Client \& Patient Solutions** 
 who is passionate about healthcare consulting, strategic problem\-solving, and creating impactful solutions for patients and pharmaceutical partners.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Strategy \& Consulting**
* Collaborate with senior leadership to design innovative patient access, affordability, reimbursement, adherence, and financing solutions.
* Solve complex healthcare challenges using structured problem\-solving and strategic thinking.
* Evaluate emerging healthcare trends, policies, technologies, and business models to identify opportunities for innovation and growth.
* **Client Engagement**
* Engage with pharmaceutical clients to understand business objectives and recommend customized patient solutions.
* Participate in client meetings, workshops, presentations, and strategic discussions.
* Build trusted relationships by delivering high\-quality insights and strategic recommendations.
* **Proposal \& Business Development**
* Develop proposals, RFP responses, capability presentations, and solution documents.
* Translate client requirements into compelling and executable healthcare solutions.
* Support business development initiatives through strategic pitches and account planning.
* **Market Research \& Business Insights**
* Conduct market assessments, competitive intelligence, patient journey mapping, and therapy\-area analyses.
* Analyze healthcare data and operational metrics to generate actionable business insights.
* Benchmark global best practices and recommend innovative approaches tailored to the Indian healthcare ecosystem.
* **Executive Communication**
* Prepare consulting\-style presentations, executive reports, business cases, and strategic recommendations.
* Present complex analyses in a clear, structured, and impactful manner to internal and external stakeholders.
* **Innovation**
* Conceptualize new patient support services, digital health solutions, financing models, and value\-added healthcare offerings.
* Continuously identify opportunities to enhance client value and strengthen iCanHeal's competitive advantage.



**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* MBA in Healthcare, Pharmaceutical Management, Marketing, Strategy, or a related field.
* 2–6 years of experience in healthcare consulting, pharmaceutical strategy, commercial excellence, market research, business intelligence, or client consulting.
* Experience in developing proposals, RFP responses, strategic presentations, and client\-facing consulting deliverables.
* Strong analytical and structured problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent PowerPoint presentation and storytelling skills.
* Strong business writing and communication abilities.
* Ability to convert data into meaningful business insights.
* Self\-motivated, intellectually curious, and comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment.



**Why Join iCanHeal?** 



* Work directly with senior leadership and leading pharmaceutical organizations.
* Shape innovative Patient Support Programs and patient access solutions.
* Gain exposure across oncology, rare diseases, specialty care, and digital health.
* Thrive in a collaborative, entrepreneurial environment where your ideas matter.
* Accelerate your career while making a meaningful impact on patient access to life\-changing therapies.



  





  




* **📩 Interested candidates are invited to share their updated resume at** 
*hr@rxcs.in* 
**with the subject line:
 *Application – Consultant – Client \& Patient Solutions* 
 .**

74c598bb.title: Presales Consultant- Cisco
74c598bb.description:
****Responsibilities:****
* To work closely with Sales / Channel Team in approaching new engagements/prospects to find out and document the requirements and key findings. Perform solution mapping and relay requirements to Pre\-Sales Team for demonstrations.
* To conduct product demonstrations with focus in either Data Center infrastructure domain, Networking \& Networking Security domain or Data Analytics, Cognitive \& IoT domain.
* To provide assistance to the Sales / Channel Team in preparing Presentation Slides, Solution Proposals, solution BOM, Response to RFP and Tenders.
* To work closely with the Sales / Channel Team to ensure prospects requirements are fulfilled with and without the inclusion of 3rd party products other than what the Company distributes.
* To perform research on respective solution domain technologies (Eg, DC infra, Netsec, DCI) and how it can enhance solution or product positioning. If there are other technologies that can value add to the position, it should also be incorporated.
* To work closely with the Sales / Channel Team and Post\-Sales Team in preparing Scope of Work (SOW) whereby you will be the final owner of the SOW.
* To assist and jointly execute a hand\-over meeting upon successful win to the Post\-Sales Team with the Sales / Channel Team and Pre\-Sales Team.
* To be updated with latest changes or new product introduced by principals and/or 3rd party vendors.
* To fulfill and undergo product certification trainings as required.
* To understand and execute company's marketing strategies and understand competitors' products, services and strategies, feedback to management on plans and strategies.
* Participate in exhibitions to showcase products/solutions, capture leads, network with audiences to be closely updated with industry trends and needs.
* To ensure that you execute and deliver the target allocated for the Presales team or based on your line card.
* Any other duties as and when assigned from time to time.
* Validates pre\-sales solutions design and sizing.
* Coaches and mentor pre\-sales team
* Leads the technical discussion with suppliers on new initiatives.
* Responsible for cross solutions bundles.
* Attends QBR sessions with sales.


****Knowledge, Skills and Experience:****
* Bachelor's degree in information technology/computer science or equivalent experience certifications preferred.
* Minimum of 4 years relevant working experience, ideally in IT multinational environment.
* At the minimum 5 years of solid work\-related experience, if does not possess a degree.
* Track record on the assigned line Cards experience is an added advantage.
* IT Distributor and/or SI experience would also be an added advantage.
* Have good communication in English, on the job understanding and problem\-solving skills.
* Proven ability to work independently, effectively in an off\-site environment and under high pressure.

85a7a5b7.title: Solutions Architect - APAC
85a7a5b7.description:
At Branch, we power every touchpoint with links that work and insights that prove it. From click to conversion, we make growth measurable. Our unparalleled attribution, backed by AI\-enhanced linking, is trusted to deliver seamless experiences that increase ROI, decrease wasted spend, and eliminate siloed attribution.
 



 We bring the same rigor to how we build our team, by empowering our people to move fast, own outcomes, and build something that matters. We take pride in making meaningful investments in our team’s health, wealth, and growth so individuals can thrive as we scale. Our culture values smart, humble, and collaborative teammates who take accountability and drive results in an environment where their work truly moves the business forward.
 



 We are innovative, scaling with purpose, and led by seasoned leaders who know how to build enduring companies. Trusted by brands like Instacart, Western Union, NBCUniversal, ZocDoc, and Sephora, we’re big enough to matter, small enough for you to make a real impact. If you’re excited by the grit of building, rapid learning, and shaping the future of customer growth, you’ll find your place here.
 



**Role Overview:** 




 As a Solutions Architect, at Branch, you will work with the most widely known global brands to implement our mobile technology into their marketing stacks.  A successful Solutions Architect can combine hands\-on implementation of cutting\-edge mobile technology, with strategic technical mapping \& planning.  If you're an enthusiastic \& driven self\-starter; enjoy becoming deeply familiar with the technical details of any new mobile technology; can effectively build relationships with internal \& external stakeholders; and enjoy building technical solutions that deliver value for your clients; then you’re a great fit for this mission\-critical role that is a key driver of growth for Branch.
 


**As a Solutions Architect, you’ll get to:** 
* Plan \& execute the end\-to\-end implementation of Branch’s technology into the mobile applications \& tech stacks of large global enterprises.
* Lead in\-person \& remote technical workshops with engineering \& product teams on Branch’s technical capabilities \& integration process.
* Leverage your understanding of mobile and web technology to help customers execute their desired use cases \& discover new custom use cases
* Flex project management skills to build, manage, deliver project plans internally and externally.
* Interact with customers in person, over phone, and via email/slack to answer technical questions and provide support.
* Investigate and troubleshoot implementation issues and bugs.
* Collaborate with Branch’s account management, product, and engineering teams to build \& grow the Branch platform.


**You’ll be a good fit if you have:** 
* 2 years iOS and/or Android programming experience (
 *building apps with Java/Objective\-C/Swift, releasing apps to the app store, etc* 
 ).
* 2 years experience in Mobile and/or SaaS industries (
 *ideally in a customer\-facing role* 
 ).
* Problem\-solving skills around technical, product, and business questions.
* Ability to manage multiple projects \& deliverables running in parallel timelines.
* Ability to understand \& clearly communicate details behind Branch’s SDK \& SaaS products with technical \& non\-technical customers.
* Excellent verbal communication and writing skills
* Outstanding work ethic and can create value with minimal direction.
* Intellectual curiosity and hunger.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (
 *or comparable experience* 
 ).
* Experience pulling \& manipulating data \& logs using SQL.
* Experience using productivity tools like: JIRA, Charles Proxy, Chrome Developer Tools, etc.



**Nice to have:** 



* Web development experience using: Javascript, CSS, HTML, React, etc.
* Experience developing with 3rd party SDKs: mParticle, Segment, Adobe Launch, Adobe Analytics, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager



**Market Focus:** 



* This role caters to the APAC and EMEA market which will be served from Bangalore/Jakarta/Kuala Lumpur in the English language.




 The salary range provided represents base compensation and does not include potential equity, which is available for qualifying positions. At Branch, we are committed to the well\-being of our team by offering a comprehensive benefits package. From health and wellness programs to paid time off and retirement planning options, we provide a range of benefits for qualified employees. For detailed information on the benefits specific to your position, please consult with your recruiter.
 





 Branch is an equal opportunity employer. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability status.
 





 If you think you'd be a good fit for this role, we'd love for you to apply! At Branch, we strive to create an inclusive culture that encourages people from all walks of life to bring their unique, diverse perspectives to work. We aim every day to build an environment that empowers us all to do the best work of our careers, and we can't wait to show you what we have to offer!
 



**A little bit about us:** 
  
 
 Branch is the leading provider of engagement and performance mobile SaaS solutions for growth\-focused teams, trusted to maximize the value of their evolving digital strategies. The Branch platform provides a seamless experience across paid and organic, on all channels and platforms, online and offline, to eliminate friction and drive valuable action at the moments of highest intent. With Branch, businesses gain accurate mobile measurement and insights into user interactions, enabling them to drive conversions, engagement, and more intelligent marketing spend.
 



 Branch is an award\-winning employer headquartered in Mountain View, CA. World\-class brands like Instacart, Western Union, NBCUniversal, Zocdoc and Sephora acquire users, retain customers and drive more conversions with Branch.
 




 Candidate Privacy Information:
   

 For more information on the data that Branch will collect through your application, and how we use, share, delete, and retain that information as part of our recruitment and employment efforts, please see our HR Privacy Policy.

edfdf93d.title: Solution Architect
edfdf93d.description:
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 with
 **15\+ years of experience** 
 in .NET technologies to lead the design and delivery of a cloud\-native loan management platform on Microsoft Azure. The role involves architecting scalable
 **microservices, micro frontends (React), Azure cloud solutions, APIs, event\-driven systems, and CI/CD pipelines**

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design end\-to\-end solutions using .NET Microservices and React Micro Frontends.
* Architect and implement cloud\-native applications on Microsoft Azure.

* Lead containerized deployments using Docker and AKS (Azure Kubernetes Service).

* Drive security, scalability, performance, and reliability best practices.

* Provide architecture governance, code reviews, and technical leadership.
* Design monitoring, logging, and observability solutions.
* Mentor teams and promote modern engineering practices.


**Required Skills** 
  

  

* 15\+ years of experience in .NET application development and architecture.
* Strong expertise in:
+ .NET / ASP.NET Core
+ Microservices Architecture
+ React, Redux, Axios
+ Azure Cloud Services
+ AKS (Azure Kubernetes Service)
+ Docker \& Kubernetes
+ Azure DevOps (CI/CD)
+ REST APIs, gRPC, API Gateways
+ Azure Service Bus \& Event Grid
+ OAuth2 / OpenID Connect
+ Azure Application Insights

* Experience delivering enterprise\-scale financial applications.
* Strong stakeholder management and leadership skills.

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.

bb5c42fc.title: PRE-SALES & POST-SALES TECHNICAL CONSULTANT
bb5c42fc.description:
**Company Description** 
 Corponizers is a corporate facilitator dedicated to connecting job seekers with roles that align with their skills and aspirations. The organization partners with businesses worldwide to deliver recruitment services focused on high\-quality talent acquisition and tailored solutions. Corponizers emphasizes innovative practices, collaboration, and integrity, creating an environment where team members and clients can succeed together. Trusted as a go\-to recruitment expert, the company is committed to promoting diversity, equity, and positive change in the global workforce. Its mission is to help organizations meet their goals while enabling individuals to build meaningful careers.
   

**Role Description** 
 The PRE\-SALES \& POST\-SALES TECHNICAL CONSULTANT is a full\-time, on\-site role based in Sundargarh. This position involves engaging with prospective clients to understand their technical and business needs, preparing solution proposals, and supporting product demonstrations. The consultant will collaborate with sales teams to design tailored solutions, respond to technical queries, and assist in closing deals. Post\-sales, the role includes providing technical support, troubleshooting issues, guiding clients through implementation, and ensuring successful adoption of solutions. The consultant will document client requirements, maintain accurate records of interactions, and contribute to continuous improvement of services and processes.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong Analytical Skills to assess client requirements, evaluate solutions, and interpret technical and business data.
* Consulting experience to advise clients on best\-fit solutions and align offerings with their strategic objectives.
* Technical Support and Troubleshooting skills to resolve issues, provide guidance during implementation, and ensure customer satisfaction.
* Sales\-related capabilities to assist in pre\-sales activities, support the sales team, and help drive successful deal closures.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills to interact with clients, explain technical concepts clearly, and prepare documentation.
* Ability to collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams and manage multiple client engagements simultaneously.
* Relevant academic background in Engineering, Information Technology, Business, or a related field is preferred.
* Prior experience in a technical consulting, pre\-sales, or post\-sales support role will be an advantage.

0de0a0cb.description:
Job Title: Customer Solutions Design Specialist
   

  

 Req ID: 60657
   

  

 Job Function: Design
   

  

 Posting Start Date: 17/07/2026
   

  

 Posting End Date: 21/07/2026
   

  

 Division: UK Business
   

  

 Job Location: IND Gurugram \- Tower B and C
   

  

 Advertised Salary: Competitive
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Customer Solutions Design Specialist independently executes a range of workstreams in the creation of end\-to\-end technical designs, ensuring that business requirements are successful translated into deliverable solutions, which meet customer needs whilst considering the impact of those solutions on all technical and business areas.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Captures detailed customer technical requirements and translation to detailed solution design in accordance with design methodologies.
* Manages and recommends on the technical direction and helps determine the optimum solution design for customers.
* Manages the review and validation processes for both new developments and in\-life products and services, ensuring full integration across all aspects, considering the broad impact of solutions on the product roadmap.
* Drives the improvement of design and delivery capabilities for end\-to\-end technical solutions.
* Manages customer solution design engagement and statement of work creation, including any 3rd party deliverables.
* Facilitates the development of strong customer relationships at the senior level through providing specialist service design expertise, and influencing the customer's service strategy and operational decisions.
* Drives consistency in architecture and technical processes, with the aim of reducing costs and increasing productivity.
* Undertakes customer migration planning and implementation.
* Coordinates impact assessments and design documentation updates.
* Resolves complex solution and service issues, leads root cause analysis, troubleshooting and escalation.
* Pursues the identification of potential risks and the implementation of controls and mitigations, ensuring compliance with relevant industry and company policies.
* Ensures the delivery of thought leadership in complex bids and agreeing strategic approach as part of customer solution design.
* Mentors other customer solution designers, helping to improve the team's abilities by acting as a technical resource.
* Champions, continuously develops and shares with team knowledge on emerging trends and changes in customer solution design.


**Essential Skills / Experience**
**Desirable Skills / Experience**
**Our Package**

07ada9ce.title: Senior Microsoft Fabric Data Architect / Technical Lead
07ada9ce.description:
**Location:** Banglore  
**Experience:** 8\+ years

We are looking for a hands\-on Microsoft Fabric Data Architect to design and lead a modern enterprise data platform for a global manufacturing company.

This is not a traditional SAP implementation role. The focus is on extracting SAP and non\-SAP data, building scalable data models, automating reporting and preparing the platform for future AI use cases.

Responsibilities

· Design the Microsoft Fabric architecture using OneLake, Lakehouse, Warehouse and Power BI.

· Define SAP\-to\-Fabric data integration and incremental\-loading strategies.

· Build and guide ETL/ELT pipelines using Fabric Data Factory or Azure Data Factory.

· Design fact tables, dimensions, semantic models and business KPIs.

· Lead Excel\-report automation and executive dashboard development.

· Define data governance, security, quality and deployment standards.

· Work directly with business, SAP and technical stakeholders.

· Guide the Data Engineer and review technical implementation.

Required Skills

· Microsoft Fabric, OneLake, Lakehouse and Warehouse

· Strong SQL and dimensional data modelling

· Azure Data Factory or Fabric Data Factory

· Power BI and semantic modelling

· Python and ETL/ELT pipelines

· SAP ECC or S/4HANA data extraction

· Data governance and security

· Strong communication and technical leadership

Nice to Have

SAP CDS Views, SAP APIs, Spark, Synapse, Purview, Copilot, RAG, AI agents and manufacturing\-domain experience.

Pay: ₹1,000,000\.00 \- ₹2,600,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Paid sick time
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

ecdc00e5.title: Junior Solution Architect for System Design
ecdc00e5.description:
Junior Solution Architect / Technical Architect (Project Planning \& System Design Only)

We are looking for an experienced Solution Architect / Technical Architect to design the complete technical blueprint for our software projects before development begins.

This is NOT a development or coding role. Your responsibility is to analyze our requirements and prepare a complete implementation plan that our development team can follow.

What You’ll Do

For every new software project (CRM, ERP, SaaS, Admin Panel, Mobile App, etc.), you will create a detailed technical plan covering every aspect of the system.

**Example:**

\* CRM Platform  
\* Admin Dashboard  
\* Payment Management System  
\* Gym Management Platform  
\* Coach Management  
\* Customer Portal  
\* Staff Portal  
\* Finance \& Reporting

**Your Responsibilities**

Requirement Analysis

\* Understand the business workflow.  
\* Break down requirements into modules.  
\* Identify user roles and permissions.

System Architecture

\* Design the complete application architecture.  
\* Recommend frontend, backend, database, and cloud infrastructure.  
\* Explain why each technology is the best choice.

Database Design

\* Design SQL database schema.  
\* Create ER diagrams.  
\* Define tables, relationships, indexes, constraints, and naming conventions.  
\* Plan scalability and performance.

**User Roles \& Permissions**

Example:

\* Super Admin  
\* Company Owner  
\* Manager  
\* Coach  
\* Staff  
\* Accountant  
\* Customer  
\* Member

Define exactly what each role can access and modify.

**Module Planning**

Examples:

\* Dashboard  
\* CRM  
\* Lead Management  
\* Member Management  
\* Coach Management  
\* Staff Management  
\* Attendance  
\* Payments  
\* Cash Payments  
\* Online Payments  
\* Subscription Plans  
\* Expenses  
\* Invoices  
\* Notifications  
\* Reports  
\* Audit Logs  
\* Settings

**Payment Planning**

Plan complete payment workflows including:

\* Cash Payments  
\* Manual Payments  
\* UPI  
\* Credit/Debit Cards  
\* Subscription Billing  
\* Payment Links  
\* Payment History  
\* Refunds  
\* Failed Payments  
\* Reconciliation  
\* Accounting Reports

**Technology Recommendations**

Recommend the best stack, such as:

\* Frontend Framework  
\* Backend Framework  
\* SQL Database  
\* Authentication  
\* Email Service  
\* SMS Provider  
\* Push Notifications  
\* File Storage  
\* Cloud Hosting  
\* CDN  
\* Cache  
\* Queue System  
\* Search Engine  
\* Logging  
\* Monitoring  
\* Analytics

**API Planning**

\* API documentation  
\* Endpoint mapping  
\* Authentication flow  
\* Third\-party integrations  
\* Webhooks  
\* Error handling

**Documentation**

Prepare complete documentation including:

\* System Architecture  
\* Database Design  
\* ER Diagram  
\* API Specification  
\* Feature Mapping  
\* Workflow Diagrams  
\* User Flow  
\* Development Roadmap  
\* Milestones  
\* Technical Decisions  
\* Security Guidelines  
\* Deployment Strategy

**Example Project**

A Gym CRM Platform may include:

\* Super Admin Dashboard  
\* Gym Owner Dashboard  
\* Coach Portal  
\* Staff Portal  
\* Customer Portal  
\* Membership Management  
\* Cash \& Online Payment Tracking  
\* Manual Payment Entry  
\* Subscription Management  
\* Reports \& Analytics  
\* Notifications  
\* Attendance  
\* Workout \& Nutrition Modules  
\* Invoice Generation  
\* Audit Logs

You will define exactly how every module works, how data flows between them, which SQL tables are required, which APIs are needed, and how the entire platform should be built.

**Required Skills**

* Solution Architecture
* System Design
* \* Database Architecture\* SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL)\* SaaS Architecture\* REST API Design\* Microservices (preferred)\* Cloud Architecture\* Security Best Practices\* UML / ER Diagrams\* Technical Documentation\* Business Process MappingDeliverablesWe expect a complete technical blueprint that allows developers to begin implementation immediately, with minimal clarification required. The documentation should include architecture diagrams, database schema, workflows, API planning, technology recommendations, security considerations, deployment strategy, and a structured development roadmap.

Pay: ₹25,000\.00 \- ₹40,000\.00 per month

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Ludhiana, Punjab (Ludhiana)

2fb8216f.title: Infrastructure Architect
2fb8216f.description:
**Employment Type** 
 : Full Time
 



**Location** 
 : Remote
 



**Experience** 
 : Infrastructure Architecture, Cloud Infrastructure, Systems Architecture, or Enterprise Infrastructure Roles
 



  





**Company Description** 




 Scry AI is a research\-led enterprise AI company that builds intelligent platforms for BFSI, insurance, logistics, and industrial enterprises to drive efficiency, insight, and compliance. Our product suite includes Auriga for conversational AI, Collatio for document intelligence, and Concentio for cognitive IoT and operational intelligence. These platforms help clients convert complex, fragmented data into actionable enterprise intelligence.
 



  





 We are looking for an Infrastructure Architect to design, optimize, and manage scalable infrastructure that powers Scry AI’s enterprise AI platforms. This role is critical in ensuring high availability, security, performance, and scalability across our technology ecosystem.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 As an Infrastructure Architect at Scry AI, you will be responsible for designing cloud and on\-premises infrastructure, defining architecture standards, and supporting deployment strategies for enterprise applications. You will work closely with engineering, DevOps, security, and product teams to build resilient and future\-ready infrastructure.
 



  





 This role is ideal for someone who is technically strong, strategic, and experienced in designing enterprise\-scale infrastructure in a fast\-paced environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Infrastructure Architecture \& Design** 



* Design scalable, secure, and highly available infrastructure solutions
* Define architecture standards, deployment models, and infrastructure roadmaps
* Ensure infrastructure supports business growth and product scalability



  





**Cloud \& Platform Management** 



* Architect solutions across cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Optimize compute, storage, networking, and resource utilization
* Support hybrid and multi\-cloud infrastructure strategies where applicable



  





**Security \& Reliability** 



* Implement infrastructure security best practices and access controls
* Ensure high availability, disaster recovery, backup, and business continuity planning
* Monitor infrastructure health and optimize system performance



  





**Collaboration \& Technical Leadership** 



* Work closely with engineering, DevOps, and security teams
* Provide technical guidance on infrastructure\-related decisions
* Support architecture reviews and infrastructure planning initiatives



  





**Governance \& Continuous Improvement** 



* Develop infrastructure standards, documentation, and best practices
* Identify opportunities for automation and operational efficiency
* Stay updated with emerging infrastructure technologies and architecture trends



  





**Required Qualifications and Skills** 



* Strong experience in infrastructure architecture or enterprise infrastructure roles
* Expertise in cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Strong understanding of networking, virtualization, storage, and security
* Experience with infrastructure automation and container technologies
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities



  





**Our Ideal Candidate** 



* Is strategic and technically driven
* Can design secure, scalable, and resilient infrastructure
* Is proactive in optimizing performance and reliability
* Collaborates effectively with engineering and operations teams
* Thrives in a fast\-paced, technology\-driven environment
* Is interested in AI, cloud technologies, and enterprise architecture



  





 If this role interests you, follow our page to stay updated on more job opportunities and insights into how AI companies build secure, scalable, and high\-performance technology infrastructure.

d05008db.title: Solution Architect
d05008db.description:
**About The Role**
 We are seeking a skilled Solution Architect to join our dynamic GMDIT team in Bangalore, India. In this role, you will be accountable for designing the overall structure and organization of an organization's data assets within an Azure based modern data estate. You’ll be responsible for defining how data is stored, organized, integrated, and accessed within an organization. You will work closely with business and technical stakeholders from various departments to understand their data needs and requirements, while leading the team of GM associates located in the GCC working in Data \& Analytics. You should have a good understanding of data modeling, data architecture, and database design principles to ensure that the systems created are scalable, reliable, secure and efficient.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the team of GM associates in GCC for Data \& Analytics (D\&A) needs while developing and coordinating team activities with the D\&A Leader.
* Work across business stakeholders and technical teams to create solution architectures that align the technical solution to the business objectives.
* Oversee the development, testing and deployment of solutions for processing and analyzing data using Azure services including Databricks.
* Create and maintain detailed documentation of architecture designs and processes inclusive of reference architecture, data models, patterns, best practices, and guidance.
* Identify the need for, oversee the creation of, and monitor the alignment to applicable standards and principles.
* Oversee the performance monitoring and optimization of data pipelines, while ensuring chosen solutions implement applicable security measures (e.g., encryption, access controls, auditing) and regional compliance rules.
* Implement data governance to ensure data quality, consistency, and compliance within and across pipelines.
* Within a data catalog maintain metadata to describe data models, their structures, and their semantics.
* Participate in, or lead when needed, governance processes including intake, prioritization, and root cause analysis.
* Keep up to date with the latest data\-related technologies, trends, and industry standards to be able to provide recommendations to enhance analytics capabilities on Azure.


**Required Qualifications**
* Minimum bachelor’s degree in computer science or related area (or equivalent).
* Minimum 6 years of industry experience.
* Proficiency in Azure, Databricks environment, as well as Fabric (PBI).
* Strong understanding of data structures, data architecture, modeling, governance \& management.
* Effective communication with an ability to collaborate with global team members and business stakeholders, with ability to translate business objectives into technical solutions.
* Demonstrated problem solving and systems thinking.
* Travel \~10%.


**Desired Qualifications**
* Experience in Azure DevOps, GitHub.
* Working Experience in SDLC Process.
* Experience with machine learning frameworks and tools.

831a7dd1.title: Software Architect
831a7dd1.description:
**About Ennoventure** 




 Ennoventure is a B2B SaaS company delivering invisible product authentication and anti\-counterfeiting technology embedded directly into packaging. Our platform empowers global enterprises like Nestle, Unilever, Denso, CNH, Gulf Oil, Godrej, and many more to protect their products, safeguard supply chains, and eliminate counterfeit risks.Our mission is to build a world where authenticity prevails and every product and experience is verifiably genuine.
 



  





**Your role** 




 As Software Architect, you will own the end\-to\-end technical architecture of our platform — front\-end, backend, data, and infrastructure — as we scale a system that authenticates products for global enterprise brands in real time, at massive volume.
 



 You will set the architectural foundation for a company built with an “agentic\-first” engineering culture, where AI agents are first\-class participants in how we design, build, and ship software. You will partner closely with engineering, product, data science, and leadership to translate our roadmap into resilient, secure, and scalable systems.
 



  





**What will you do?** 




  





 •
 **End\-to\-End Architecture Ownership:** 
 . Own and evolve the end\-to\-end technical architecture across web, mobile, back\-end, data, and cloud infrastructure, ensuring scalability, reliability, and consistency across the platform.
 



 •
 **Platform Scalability \& Reliability** 
 : Architect systems that authenticate products at global scale — high\-throughput image and ML pipelines, sub\-second API response targets, and horizontal scalability across regions.
 



 •
 **Full\-Stack Technology Strategy** 
 : Define and document architectural decisions across front\-end frameworks, backend microservices, data infrastructure, and DevOps — balancing build\-vs\-buy, technical debt, and long\-term maintainability.
 



 •
 **Agentic\-Ready Architecture:** 
 Partner with engineering leadership to architect systems, contracts, and workflows that work equally well for human engineers and AI coding/QA agents — including agent\-consumable APIs and MCP\-based tooling.
 



 •
 **Data \& ML Infrastructure** 
 : Design data storage and pipeline strategy across relational, NoSQL, and vector/RAG stores to support both application data and ML\-driven authentication workloads.
 



 •
 **Cloud \& DevOps Architecture:** 
 Define cloud infrastructure architecture (containerized, Kubernetes\-based, multi\-region), CI/CD strategy, observability, and security posture across the stack.
 



**•Governance, Standards \& Mentorship:** 
 Establish architectural principles, design review processes, and coding/API standards; run architecture reviews and mentor engineers across front\-end, backend, data, and DevOps disciplines.
 



 •
 **Security \& Compliance:** 
 Ensure the architecture meets the security, privacy, and compliance expectations of enterprise clients operating in regulated industries.
 



 •
 **Stakeholder Collaboration:** 
 Work with product, engineering, and data science leadership to translate business and product roadmaps into scalable, sequenced technical architecture.
 



  





**What do we look for at Ennoventure?** 




  





**Must Have** 




 •Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
 



 •7\-8 years of software engineering experience, including meaningful time in an architecture\-focused role designing and shipping production systems on a scale.
 



 •Backend depth, full\-stack breadth: Deep, hands\-on expertise in backend architecture — microservices, REST/GraphQL API design, idempotency, and machine\-readable contracts — plus working fluency across front\-end, data, and DevOps.
 



 •Front\-end: Solid understanding of modern frameworks (React/Next.js) and mobile app architecture (native or cross\-platform) and how they integrate with backend and agent\-driven workflows.
 



 •Data: Experience architecting relational and NoSQL data stores (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and the data pipelines that feed them.
 



 •Cloud/DevOps: Hands\-on experience architecting on AWS, GCP, or Azure, with containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure\-as\-code (Terraform or equivalent).
 



 •Architecting for Scale: Proven track record designing for scale, performance, and reliability — SLAs, fault tolerance, observability, and graceful degradation underload.
 



 •Security Mindset: Strong grasp of security best practices for a multi\-tenant, enterprise\-grade SaaS platform, including data protection and compliance requirements.
 



 •Communication \& Influence: Excellent communication skills, with the ability to influence technical direction, drive alignment across teams, and present architecture clearly to both engineers and leadership.
 



  





**Nice\-to\-Have** 




  





 •Experience architecting systems that integrate AI/LLM agents into production workflows or applying “agentic\-first” design principles.
 



 •Familiarity with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agent orchestration frameworks such as Lang Chain, Lang Graph, or Crew AI.
 



 •Experience with computer vision or ML\-serving infrastructure operating at scale.
 



 •Background in a high\-growth B2B SaaS company, ideally in security, brand protection, fraud, or trust \& safety.
 



 •Experience with event\-driven architectures and message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS).
 



 •Familiarity with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector) and RAG architecture.
 



 •Prior experience standing up architecture governance and review processes inside a scaling engineering organization.
 



  





**What do we offer?** 




  





 We believe that our people are the driving force behind our success, fueling big ambitions with bigger impact. We are building more than just a workplace, we are crafting a space where everyone feels seen, heard, and unstoppable. Here, you don’t just thrive, you grow, innovate, and leave a mark that matters.
 



 That is why we are committed to equipping you with the best: a Total Rewards Policy that integrates\-
 



 •Pay: A Competitive Salary that reflects your talent and drive!
 



 •Financial Rewards: Performance\-based Rewards that recognize your impact.
 



 •Well\-being: Comprehensive Health Insurance \& Mental Health Programs to keep you at your best!
 



 •Learning: An ongoing investment in you and your skills.
 



 •Personalized Development: Self\-growth plans crafted to match your performance and career aspirations.
 



 •Compensation Reviews: Regular reviews to ensure your value aligns with market trends.

001f4c4f.title: Amazon Connect Lead / Architect
001f4c4f.description:
**About Position:** 




  





 We are looking for an experienced AWS Connect SME with strong expertise in Amazon Connect architecture, contact flows, AWS Lambda, and enterprise integrations to lead design, implementation, migration, optimization, and support of contact center solutions. The role involves working as the technical authority, collaborating with customer stakeholders, architects, and delivery teams to drive scalable Amazon Connect solutions and ensure operational excellence.
 



  




* **Role: Amazon Connect Lead / Architect**
* **Location: All Persistent Location**
* **Experience: 8 to 16 Years**
* **Job Type: Full\-Time Employment**



  





**What You'll Do:** 




  




* Act as the AWS Connect SME and technical lead for implementation, migration, optimization, and support programs.
* Lead Amazon Connect architecture discussions, design reviews, solution recommendations, and technical governance.
* Configure contact flows, routing profiles, queues, security profiles, user management, and contact center components.
* Support contact center migration, modernization, managed services, hyper care, and operational excellence initiatives.
* Design integrations with ServiceNow, CRM, IAM, APIs, and enterprise platforms using serverless architectures.
* Develop AWS Lambda\-based automation and API integrations, and provide L3 support, RCA, and production stabilization.
* Participate in governance meetings, discovery workshops, customer workshops, and stakeholder discussions with Sydney\-based teams.



  





**Expertise You'll Bring:** 




  




* 8\+ years of overall IT experience with 4\+ years of hands\-on Amazon Connect experience.
* Strong capability in Amazon Connect, contact flows, routing profiles, queues, IVR design, user management, and contact center operations.
* Hands\-on experience with AWS Lambda, API Gateway, IAM, CloudWatch, DynamoDB, S3, Event Bridge, Step Functions, Python, Node.js, REST APIs, JSON, Git, and CI/CD.
* Experience delivering Amazon Connect implementations, contact center migrations, and cloud\-native solutions for global customers.
* Preferred exposure to Amazon Lex, Polly, Transcribe, Translate, Bedrock, conversational AI, contact center analytics, managed services, and cloud migration programs.
* Preferred certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect, AWS Certified Developer, AWS Certified SysOps Administrator, and AWS Cloud Practitioner.
* Strong ability to collaborate with distributed teams, customer stakeholders, architects, and delivery teams.



  





**Benefits:** 




  




* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
