0477780f.title: Partner and Solutions Development Manager - India
0477780f.description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.
   

  

**Partner \& Solutions GSI Development Manager\- India**
**Your Contribution**
 Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. Share our passion for Equality and the Environment. These are behaviors and values you’ll need for success at Logitech.
   

  

 The Partner and Solution Development Manager is a high\-impact, strategic role designed to drive Logitech’s growth through its most critical global partnerships.
   

  

 This role ensures Logitech continues to lead the market in partner\-driven innovation, revenue growth, and global influence through strategic enablement of our partners
   

  

 The Partner and Solution Development Manager is a unique Go to Market role that will embody a partner centric and results\-oriented approach, leveraging exceptional relationship\-building skills to accelerate partner sales performance, and enable Logitech’s expansion across its portfolio of innovative business solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Business Development \& Strategic Partnerships**
* Drive expansion and adoption of Logitech’s portfolio by fostering and strengthening strategic relationships with GSI partners and enterprise customers.
* Identify, pursue, and influence new business opportunities in collaboration with, Sales, Partner, and Alliance teams.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to key stakeholders, supporting partner business plans and joint go\-to\-market initiatives.
* Share market and customer insights with internal business groups to inform portfolio development and competitive positioning.


**Technical Enablement \& Solution Design**
* Architect end\-to\-end technical solutions tailored for global and regional partners, integrating Logitech offerings across Managed Services, Personal Workspace, and Video Collaboration platforms.
* Lead cross\-functional teams internally, developing compelling and innovative solution designs for global customers.
* Develop and templatize persona\-driven solution bundles (such as meeting space Personas), and educate partners on go\-to\-market strategies with customers.
* Influence reference designs and establish standards with global partners across regions, driving awareness of solution design implications with local sales and technical teams.


**Partner Enablement \& Sales Acceleration**
* Align proposed solutions with partner capabilities, and help partners build expertise to lead with Logitech’s offerings.
* Enable partners to transition from selling individual products to solution\-based selling, increasing confidence across the global partner ecosystem.
* Guide partners on API integration requirements, enriching partner and customer experience.


**Pre\-Sales \& Bid Support**
* Own the pre\-sales and RFI/RFP response journey for solutions, ensuring timely and standardized responses across varying partner sizes.
* Establish customer journey frameworks and expectations for implementing solutions.
* Guide Bill of Materials creation focused on value for customers, and act as a trusted advisor throughout the sales cycle.
* Present technical architectural approaches, perform demos, and create documentation; drive successful Proof of Concept (POC) implementations.


**Thought Leadership \& Market Influence**
* Lead workshops and forums with sales teams and partner executives to drive improvements, share best practices, and foster preferential mindshare for Logitech.
* Educate partners on Logitech’s alliance ecosystem (Microsoft, Google, Zoom, etc.).
* Serve as a subject matter expert, engaging technology councils and delivering design workshops and sessions.


**Portfolio Expansion \& Cross\-Sell Initiatives**
* Help partners expand their focus across Logitech’s entire solutions portfolio, targeting diverse verticals and segments for broader market reach.


**Relationship Management \& Influence**
* Develop influential relationships at both partner and customer organizations, guiding key decisions for Logitech offerings.
* Become a go\-to strategic resource for global partners and central presales teams.


**Leading with Logitech’s Differentiation**
* Adapt and deliver strategic training to help partners recognize Logitech’s competitive advantages, including APIs, sustainability, and ecosystem integration.
* Ensure differentiation is woven through partner engagement and enable partners to deliver Logitech’s value propositions convincingly.


**Core Behavioral Contribution**
 Success in this role hinges on embodying Logitech’s cultural values:
   

  

* Be Yourself: Bring authenticity and confidence.
* Be Open: Foster trust and transparency in partnerships.
* Stay Hungry and Humble: Strive for continuous growth while collaborating effectively.
* Collaborate \& Challenge: Work cohesively while constructively pushing boundaries.
* Decide \& Execute: Take initiative, make decisions, and own results.


**Key Qualifications**
**Education**
* Bachelor’s degree (B.A., B.S.) required, or relevant technical certifications.


**Experience**
* Many years of demonstrated success in solutions engineering, supporting global partners and driving channel\-sourced revenue growth.
* Proven capability in leading change initiatives and ambitious, multi\-year business projects within strategic partnerships.
* Strong knowledge of enterprise integration patterns, APIs, and modern IT architectures.


**Skill Set**
* Executive presence with the ability to influence and gain mindshare with strategic and technical advisory teams at a global scale.
* Operationally savvy, with a track record of building templates and repeatable frameworks to accelerate organizational go\-to\-market capabilities.
* Deep understanding of IT and business trends, especially in Unified Communication and Collaboration Technologies.
* Experience serving as a trusted technology advisor to large, complex, and matrixed organizations, both internally and externally.


**Additional Skills**
* Organizational Excellence: Highly self\-motivated, capable of thriving in a fast\-paced environment with minimal supervision.
* Adaptability: Flexible and quick to adjust approaches based on evolving circumstances and priorities.
* Influence \& Advocacy: Ability to inspire alignment and drive shared goals across diverse stakeholders and teams.
* Communication: Exceptional interpersonal and listening skills that enable strong collaboration, trust, and accountability.
* Creativity: Innovative thinker, skilled in developing efficient and customer\-focused solutions that deliver strategic objectives.


 Across Logitech we empower collaboration and foster play. We help teams collaborate/learn from anywhere, without compromising on productivity or continuity so it should be no surprise that most of our jobs are open to work from home from most locations. Our hybrid work model allows some employees to work remotely while others work on\-premises. Within this structure, you may have teams or departments split between working remotely and working in\-house.
   

  

 Logitech is an amazing place to work because it is full of authentic people who are inclusive by nature as well as by design. Being a global company, we value our diversity and celebrate all our differences. Don’t meet every single requirement? Not a problem. If you feel you are the right candidate for the opportunity, we strongly recommend that you apply. We want to meet you!
   

  

 We offer comprehensive and competitive benefits packages and working environments that are designed to be flexible and help you to care for yourself and your loved ones, now and in the future. We believe that good health means more than getting medical care when you need it. Logitech supports a culture that encourages individuals to achieve good physical, financial, emotional, intellectual and social wellbeing so we all can create, achieve and enjoy more and support our families. We can’t wait to tell you more about them being that there are too many to list here and they vary based on location.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, sex, age, color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, or on the basis of disability.
   

  

 If you require an accommodation to complete any part of the application process, are limited in the ability, are unable to access or use this online application process and need an alternative method for applying, you may contact us toll free at \+1\-510\-713\-4866 for assistance and we will get back to you as soon as possible .

6c0adbe1.title: Senior Interior Draftsman (Residential Interiors & Architecture)
6c0adbe1.description:
Grey Ink Studio https://greyinkstudio.com/ is a multidisciplinary architecture and interior design practice driven by a design\-led and concept\-oriented approach. The studio believes in creating spaces that are not only visually compelling but also deeply rooted in context, functionality, and user experience. The practice has developed a diverse body of work spanning hospitality, F\&B, institutional, and residential projects. Each project is approached with a fresh perspective, ensuring that design solutions are tailored to the specific needs of the client, site, and end user. From ideation to execution, the studio maintains a strong emphasis on clarity of concept, material exploration, and precision in detailing. Grey Ink Studio’s design philosophy focuses on balancing creativity with practicality— delivering spaces that are thoughtful, well\-resolved, and built to last. With a commitment to quality and innovation, the studio continues to push boundaries while maintaining a strong foundation in design fundamentals and execution excellence.

Why Join Grey Ink Studio Design\-Led Practice: At Grey Ink Studio, design is at the heart of everything. Team members are encouraged to think conceptually, challenge ideas, and contribute creatively throughout the design process. Diverse Project Exposure: Work across multiple sectors including hospitality, F\&B, institutional, and residential projects—gaining well\-rounded experience and strengthening your professional portfolio. End\-to\-End Involvement: Opportunity to be involved in the complete project lifecycle—from concept development and design detailing to site coordination and f inal execution. Creative Ownership \& Responsibility: The studio provides a platform for individuals to take initiative, contribute ideas, and take ownership of their work, fostering both accountability and confidence. Strong Focus on Detailing \& Execution: Gain hands\-on exposure to real\-world challenges, material applications, and on\-site execution—bridging the gap between design intent and built reality. Collaborative \& Open Work Culture: Be part of a close\-knit, collaborative team environment where discussions, feedback, and idea exchange are actively encouraged. Learning \& Growth Opportunities: Ideal for professionals looking to accelerate their learning curve, build a strong design sensibility, and grow within a dynamic and evolving practice. Impactful Work: Contribute to projects that are thoughtfully designed and leave a lasting impression on users and spaces.

**Role Overview**

Grey Ink Studio is looking for a highly skilled **Senior Interior Draftsman** with **6–10 years of experience** in residential interiors and architectural projects. The ideal candidate should have strong technical expertise, excellent detailing skills, and the ability to independently manage complete drawing packages from concept through execution. This role also requires mentoring junior draftsmen, coordinating with designers and consultants, and ensuring accurate, timely project documentation.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Prepare complete architectural and interior working drawing sets for residential projects.
* Develop detailed construction drawings including plans, elevations, sections, ceiling layouts, flooring layouts, furniture details, staircase details, toilet details, kitchen details, and joinery drawings.
* Produce detailed millwork, furniture, and custom joinery drawings for site execution.
* Coordinate drawings with structural, MEP, HVAC, and other consultants.
* Review and maintain drawing accuracy, standards, and quality across all project stages.
* Manage revisions and ensure drawings are updated as per design and site requirements.
* Coordinate closely with designers to translate design concepts into technically executable drawings.
* Visit project sites to understand execution requirements and resolve technical drawing issues.
* Lead and mentor junior draftsmen by reviewing drawings and ensuring drafting standards are maintained.
* Manage multiple projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines and project milestones.
* Ensure all drawings comply with applicable building codes, construction practices, and project specifications.
* Maintain drawing documentation, BOQ references, and revision records throughout the project lifecycle.

**Required Skills \& Qualifications**

* **6–10 years** of experience in residential interior and architectural drafting.
* Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Interior Design, Civil Engineering, or a related field.
* Strong expertise in residential interior detailing and architectural working drawings.
* Excellent knowledge of construction detailing, joinery, materials, and execution methodologies.
* Advanced proficiency in **CAD** (mandatory).
* Good understanding of SketchUp and basic visualization workflows is preferred.
* Strong knowledge of furniture detailing, modular kitchen detailing, wardrobe detailing, staircase detailing, and interior execution drawings.
* Experience coordinating with consultants, contractors, vendors, and site teams.
* Ability to independently prepare complete Good for Construction (GFC) drawing sets.
* Strong understanding of residential construction standards and site execution.
* Excellent problem\-solving, technical coordination, and organizational skills.
* Ability to lead, mentor, and manage a drafting team while ensuring quality and timely delivery.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience working on luxury residential interiors and high\-end architectural projects.
* Familiarity with AI\-assisted drafting and documentation tools is a plus.
* Understanding of BOQ preparation and material specifications.
* Strong attention to detail and commitment to drawing accuracy.
* Experience working in a fast\-paced design consultancy environment.

**How to Apply**

**Send your profile to:** **hr.greyink@gmail.com**

**Subject Line:**  
**Application – Senior Interior Draftsman \| Grey Ink Studio**

Pay: ₹45,369\.33 \- ₹95,248\.46 per month

Benefits:

* Cell phone reimbursement
* Leave encashment
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off

Work Location: In person

eef77486.title: Industrial Architect
eef77486.description:
**Company**

Archfusion Design

**Position**

Industrial Architect

**Department**

Architecture \& Design

**Reporting To**

Principal Architect / Design Director

**Job Summary**

Archfusion Design is seeking a creative and technically strong Industrial Architect to lead the planning, design and execution support of industrial, warehouse, logistics, manufacturing and mixed\-use developments. The role involves developing concept designs through construction documentation while coordinating with structural, MEP, façade, landscape and project management consultants to deliver innovative, sustainable and commercially viable solutions.

**Key Responsibilities**

· Develop architectural concepts, feasibility studies and master plans for industrial and commercial developments.

· Prepare concept presentations, detailed architectural drawings, working drawings and tender documentation.

· Coordinate with structural, MEP, fire, HVAC and specialist consultants throughout the project lifecycle.

· Ensure compliance with National Building Code (NBC), local authority regulations and client requirements.

· Optimize layouts for manufacturing efficiency, logistics flow, warehousing and future expansion.

· Review shop drawings, material submissions and technical specifications.

· Attend client meetings, design workshops and project coordination meetings.

· Undertake site visits and provide construction\-stage technical support.

· Mentor junior architects

· Deliver projects within approved timelines, budgets and quality standards.

**Qualifications**

Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.). Master's degree in Architecture or Industrial Design is desirable. Registration with the Council of Architecture (COA) preferred.

**Experience**

5–10 years of relevant experience in industrial architecture, logistics parks, warehouses, factories, PEB buildings, commercial developments or large\-scale mixed\-use projects. Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, BIM, Adobe Creative Suite and Microsoft Office is preferred.

**Key Competencies**

· Architectural design excellence

· Industrial planning

· Building codes \& regulations

· Project coordination

· Client presentation skills

· Problem solving

· Attention to detail

· Time management

**Location**

Mumbai, India

Pay: ₹50,000\.00 \- ₹70,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Cell phone reimbursement
* Health insurance

Application Question(s):

* What is your current CTC
* If interested send your portfolio on hr@archfusiondesign.com

Work Location: In person

fa3c2a5d.title: Solution Consultant, Intermediate - IND
fa3c2a5d.description:
**About Kinaxis**
 Elevate your career journey by embracing a new challenge with Kinaxis. We are experts in tech, but it’s really our people who give us passion to always seek ways to do things better. As such, we’re serious about your career growth and professional development, because People matter at Kinaxis.
   

  

 In 1984, we started out as a team of three engineers based in Ottawa, Canada. Today, we have grown to become a global organization with over 2000 employees around the world, and support 40,000\+ users in over 100 countries. As a global leader in end\-to\-end supply chain management, we enable supply chain excellence for all industries. We are expanding our team in Chennai and around the world as we continue to innovate and revolutionize how we support our customers.
   

  

 Our journey in India began in 2020 and we have been growing steadily since then! Building a high\-trust and high\-performance culture is important to us and we are proud to be Great Place to Work® Certified TM . Our state\-of\-the\-art office, located in the World Trade Centre in Chennai, offers our growing team space for expansion and collaboration.
   

  

**Location**
 Chennai (or) Bangalore \- Office Based.
   

  

 As a member of our Consulting Team, you understand our customers’ most pressing business performance challenges and you are committed to helping our customers solve complex challenges in the distributed value chain that is prevalent in manufacturing today
   

  

****What you will do****
* Participate in deep\-dive customer business requirements discovery sessions and develop requirements specifications documentation.
* Collaborates closely with agile team members to support the configuration, implementation of Maestro software to enable the solution according to our customers distinct needs
* Translate business requirements into Kinaxis Maestro software specifications, following supply chain industry trends and best practices.
* Support senior team members in providing creative solutions to complex business problems while maintaining best practices.
* Participate in data management and data integration activities, including source systems data transformation, data loading, data cleanup and validation.
* Perform training of customer end users on the configured solution.
* Provide technical support to end users and resolve issues of the configured solutions, escalating to senior team members as needed.
* Support the validation and testing of the solution and capture user feedback.
* Actively engage, guide and mentor to develop the skills of junior consultants on projects.
* Any other reasonable project related tasks as assigned by the Project Manager


****What we are looking for****
* Candidates with results\-oriented mindset, focusing on improving client satisfaction and providing a very high standard of service, driving towards Kinaxis’s success.
* Sound knowledge in Supply Chain concepts and understanding of statistical forecasting, inventory management,MRP, scheduling, etc coupled with software consulting experience with 7 – 10 years of experience.
* Strong intent to learn our first in class product “Maestro”
* Work in a fast\-paced project environment and co\-ordinate with members at all levels in an organization
* Highly adaptable professional, able to embrace teamwork in diverse and evolving work environments.
* Capability to lead by example, having the drive to think in an innovative way and have passion about new challenges
* Ability to solve complex problems, think critically and make sound judgement decisions.
* A passion for working in customer facing roles that require high level of interpersonal, communication, facilitation and presentation skills.
* Ability to communicate complex ideas effectively in English, both verbally and in writing Technical skills such as SQL, R, Java Script, Python, etc.
* Experience with manufacturing planning solutions such as Kinaxis, SAP, JDA, etc. is an added advantage


**Work With Impact:** 
 Our platform directly helps companies power the world’s supply chains. We see the results of what we do out in the world every day—when we see store shelves stocked, when medications are available for our loved ones, and so much more.
   

  

**Work with Fortune 500 Brands:** 
 Companies across industries trust us to help them take control of their integrated business planning and digital supply chain. Some of our customers include Ford, Unilever, Yamaha, P\&G, Lockheed\-Martin, and more.
   

  

**Social Responsibility at Kinaxis:** 
 Our Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Committee weighs in on hiring practices, talent assessment training materials, and mandatory training on unconscious bias and inclusion fundamentals. Sustainability is key to what we do and we’re committed to net\-zero operations strategy for the long term. We are involved in our communities and support causes where we can make the most impact.
   

  

 People matter at Kinaxis and these are some of the perks and benefits we created for our team:
   

  

* Flexible vacation and Kinaxis Days (company\-wide day off on the last Friday of every month)
* Flexible work options
* Physical and mental well\-being programs
* Regularly scheduled virtual fitness classes
* Mentorship programs and training and career development
* Recognition programs and referral rewards
* Hackathons


 For more information, visit the Kinaxis web site at www.kinaxis.com or the company’s blog at http://blog.kinaxis.com .
   

  

 Kinaxis welcomes candidates to apply to our inclusive community. We provide accommodations upon request to ensure fairness and accessibility throughout our recruitment process for all candidates, including those with specific needs or disabilities. If you require an accommodation, please reach out to us at recruitmentprograms@kinaxis.com. Please note that this contact information is strictly for accessibility requests and cannot be used to inquire about application statuses.
   

  

 Kinaxis is committed to ensuring a fair and transparent recruitment process. We use artificial intelligence (AI) tools in the initial step of the recruitment process to compare submitted resumes against the job description, to identify candidates whose education, experience and skills most closely match the requirements of the role. After the initial screening, all subsequent decisions regarding your application, including final selection, are made by our human recruitment team. AI does not make any final hiring decisions.

8df7f813.title: Solutions Architect II
8df7f813.description:
**Job Description**
**Do you enjoy creating innovative and strategic solutions to solve complex problems?**
**Would the opportunity to provide technical consulting services to our customers excite you?**
**Join our prestigious Enterprise Professional Services team**
 Our team works with world\-leading companies to make the internet fast and secure. As a partner to the Global 500, we collaborate with customers and align Akamai solutions to their needs. We build relationships and insights to maximize product value through the full scope of our global platform.
   

  

**Partner with our Enterprise Customers**
 As a Solutions Architect II on Akamai’s Enterprise Professional Services team, this role provides technical consulting and integration services. Responsibilities include delivering support for Akamai’s Zero Trust Solutions, collaborating with customers across industries, and focusing on post\-sales integration. The position may also involve limited participation in pre\-sales activities when required.
   

  

**As a Solutions Architect II, you will be responsible for:**
* Leading technical integration, deployment, and troubleshooting of ZTS services for enterprise customers.
* Serving as a trusted advisor to customers, providing best practices and technical guidance throughout the project lifecycle.
* Delivering coaching and training to customers to ensure the value and usability of our products.
* Collaborating with internal teams to address intricate technical challenges, documenting resolutions, developing technical materials, and fostering knowledge exchange within the group.
* Participating in pre\-sales activities as needed (e.g., technical workshops, POCs).


**Do What You Love**
**To be successful in this role you will:**
* Possess 6\+ years of experience in web application or network security deployment, or supporting security solutions within an IT vendor environment.
* Demonstrate knowledge of Network Security and Zero Trust principles, expertise in VPN and proxy technologies.
* Have experience with cloud provider ecosystems (AWS, Azure, GCP, etc.).
* Demonstrate expertise in networking protocols, including TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, and TLS.
* Demonstrate expertise in authentication technologies and methods, including SAML, OIDC, and identity providers.
* Demonstrate expertise with Layer 3 and Layer 4 networking technologies and scripting using Python, Bash, JavaScript, or similar tools.
* Demonstrate expertise in at least one web development language or framework while ensuring high\-quality implementation.
* Demonstrate exceptional consulting and client management abilities; present intricate technical concepts to technical and non\-technical stakeholders effectively.

20946823.title: Staff Cloud Engineer
20946823.description:
Cloud Architecture \& Infrastructure
   

  

* Design, architect, and implement scalable, secure, and highly available cloud infrastructure on AWS across multi\-account, multi\-region environments.
* Define and enforce cloud architecture standards, best practices, and governance policies using AWS Organizations, Control Tower, and SCPs.
* Build and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform and AWS CloudFormation — writing reusable modules consumed across all product teams.
* Improve and optimize cloud environments for cost, performance, and reliability — owning FinOps practices including Savings Plans, Spot strategy, and Graviton adoption.
* Collaborate with engineering, data, and security teams to build resilient distributed systems.
* Drive innovation and continuous improvement initiatives across the platform.
* Design, deploy, and manage production EKS clusters at multi\-tenant financial\-services scale.
* Plan and execute cluster upgrades, patching, and Kubernetes version lifecycle management with zero customer impact.
* Build and maintain internal Helm chart libraries and GitOps\-driven cluster configuration using ArgoCD or Flux.
* Implement zero\-trust network principles and enforce IAM least\-privilege across all AWS accounts.
* Drive SRE practices: define and enforce SLOs for EKS, API Gateway etc.
* Lead incident response, postmortem analysis, and blameless RCA processes for platform\-level outages.
* Build chaos engineering exercises and disaster recovery testing across availability zones and regions.
* Partner with software engineering teams to deliver end\-to\-end solutions from design through production.
* Evaluate new AWS services and open\-source tooling to continuously improve infrastructure capabilities.


**Required Qualifications**
* Strong, hands\-on experience with AWS cloud services: EC2, VPC, IAM, EKS, S3, CloudWatch, API Gateway, Route 53, and more.
* Proven experience operating Amazon EKS in production: cluster lifecycle, RBAC, IRSA, node groups, and autoscaling.
* Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and AWS CloudFormation.
* Solid understanding of containerization: Docker, Kubernetes architecture, and container lifecycle management.
* Experience with monitoring and logging tools: Prometheus, Grafana, Dynatrace, OpenSearch, ELK/Loki.
* Strong Linux/Unix systems administration and scripting in Bash, Python, or similar.
* Deep knowledge of cloud security best practices: IAM, RBAC, secrets management, and network security.
* Solid networking fundamentals: VPCs, subnets, load balancing, DNS, and Kubernetes ingress controllers.
* Ability to troubleshoot distributed systems and debug complex production issues at scale.
* Strong problem\-solving skills with the ability to drive technical decisions across teams in a fast\-paced environment.


**Preferred Skills**
* AWS Certifications: Solutions Architect Professional or DevOps Engineer Professional.
* Kubernetes Certifications: CKA or CKAD.
* Experience with Helm and GitOps tools (ArgoCD, Flux).
* Experience with Rancher/ArgoCD or similar tools for EKS node provisioning.
* Exposure to microservices architecture and distributed systems at scale.
* Experience with AWS API Gateway and Lambda Authorizers for JWT/OIDC\-based auth flows.
* Background in cost optimization and performance tuning (Graviton, Spot, Savings Plans).
* Familiarity with CIAM/identity federation: OIDC, OAuth2, SAML, Auth0 integration.
* Understanding AI/ML infrastructure: model training pipelines, deployment on EKS, and model monitoring.

1b5414b5.title: Identity Solution Engineer
1b5414b5.description:
**Location**
 Pune, India
   

  

**Reports to**
 Group Head of Identity Security
   

  

**Role Description**
 At FNZ, our purpose is to make wealth management more accessible, bringing easier, fairer and more inclusive solutions to people worldwide. Here in the
 **Global Cyber \& Information Security** 
 team, we are on a mission to embed cyber resilience across FNZ, protecting the platforms that support investment solutions for over 20 million people.
   

  

 We are seeking an Identity Security solution engineer to support the design, automation and implementation of Identity and Privileged access management solutions. Must have knowledge of identity stores (e.g. EntraID and Active Directory) and cloud identity concepts. Will work across identity solutions as part of Identity security team such as Secrets Management, Saviynt and CyberArk. Must be able to script automated solutions and engage with business stakeholders to solutionise identity concepts.
   

  

 The successful candidate will combine deep technical expertise in security platforms with other engineers, drive operational maturity, and deliver engineering improvements across multiple security domains. This role sits within Identity Security. The focus is on engineering and. You will work closely with global engineering teams and the Identity Security function across the global audience.
   

  

**Specific Role Responsibilities**
* Contribute to the development and improvement of the Identity group Roadmap
* Drive initiatives to mature automation, specifically around Entra / AD.
* Support in building effective governance and oversight of security controls and services.
* Support in the delivery of the Information Security strategy.
* Lead in the drive to mature cloud identity concepts for Azure, AWS \& GCP
* Contribute to the development and maintenance of formal security documentation (i.e. policies, standards).
* Build a solution for controlled monitoring across Privileged access and Identity Governance functions to manage
* Build Groups and users within Groups for key platforms and services
* Support in the development and delivery of consistent global services that enable delivery of the business goals.


**Experience Required**
**Primary requirements**
* Strong experience of IAM lifecycle and Specifically Entra / AD / Cloud.
* SME level knowledge Experience in developing and managing formal security documents.
* Proven ability to manage internal stakeholders through a journey of improving information security maturity.
* Good ability to communicate information security and risk concepts to stakeholders of all levels.
* Vendor tooling Saviynt and CyberArk strong knowledge
* Coding skillset and knowledge to support other engineers


**About FNZ Culture**
 Our culture is what drives us. It's at the heart of who we are and everything we do. It's what inspires, excites and moves us forward. Our ambition is to create a culture for growth, one that opens up limitless opportunities for our employees, customers and the wider world. At FNZ we know that great impact is only possible with great teamwork.
   

  

 That’s why we value the strength and diversity of thought in our global team.
   

  

 The FNZ Way is the cornerstone of what we do. It is comprised of four values that set the standard for how everyone at FNZ interacts with each other, with our customers, and with all our diverse stakeholders around the world.
   

  

 Customer obsessed for the long\-term
   

  

 Think big and make an impact
   

  

 Act now and own it all the way
   

  

 Challenge, commit and win together
   

  

**Read more about The FNZ Way and our values** 
 : www.fnz.com/culture
   

  

**Opportunities**
* Right from day one, you will work alongside exceptional, multicultural teams \- experts in their respective fields \- who will inspire and challenge you to make your greatest impact.
* Be part of a highly successful, rapidly growing, global business that is leading the delivery of financial services via cloud computing and partners with some of the world’s largest companies.
* Working in a flexible and agile way that meets the needs of the business and personal circumstances.
* Remuneration, significant financial rewards and career advancement is based on individual contribution and business impact rather than tenure or seniority;
* We provide global career opportunities for our best employees at any of our offices in the UK, EU, US, Canada, South Africa and APAC.


**About FNZ**
*FNZ is committed to opening up wealth so that everyone, everywhere can invest in their future on their terms. We know the foundation to do that already exists in the wealth management industry, but complexity holds firms back.*
*We created wealth’s growth platform to help. We provide a global, end\-to\-end wealth management platform that integrates modern technology with business and investment operations. All in a regulated financial institution.*
*We partner with the world’s leading financial institutions, with over US$2\.4 trillion in assets on platform (AoP).
   

  

 Together with our clients, we empower nearly 30 million people across all wealth segments to invest in their future.*

85eae748.title: Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2) - Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
85eae748.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  


**Job Description**



Are you ready to shape the next generation of enterprise automation while keeping mission\-critical workflows running smoothly?



As Tech Lead for the Automation Team, you will play a pivotal role in Husky’s transition from legacy workflow platforms to a modern, scalable automation landscape centered on the Microsoft Power Platform. You’ll lead by example—guiding your team in designing, governing, and delivering Power Apps and Power Automate solutions—while also ensuring the reliability, continuity, and evolution of existing automation solutions such as K2\.



This role sits at the intersection of innovation and responsibility: driving modernization, setting technical standards, and mentoring engineers, while safeguarding the automation backbone that supports our global business operations.



If you enjoy combining hands\-on technical leadership, platform thinking, and pragmatic enterprise automation, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.


**Responsibilities**


**Technical Leadership**


* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD
* Technical direction for the product area
* Contribute to coordinating cross\-team dependencies and integration points


**Delivery \& Execution Excellence**


* Contribute to the feature definition and review
* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection
* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks
* Helping with estimation and sprint planning
* Addressing technical impediments
* Own production readiness (incl. non\-functional requirements)


**Quality, Governance \& Security**


* Ensuring quality
* Conducting meaningful reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria
* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)


**Incident Response**


* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post\-mortems


**Mentorship \& Team Growth**


* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement


**Collaboration \& Communication**


* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade\-offs to non\-technical stakeholders


**Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10\+ years professional experience in software development, 5\+ years’ experience with Power Platform
* **Power Platform Expertise**
* Deep, hands\-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including: Power Apps (Canvas \& Model Driven)
* Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, error handling)
* Dataverse (data modeling, security, performance)
* Proven ability to design enterprise\-scale Power Platform solutions
* Strong understanding of solution layering, Application Lifecycle Management, and environment strategies
* **Power Platform Governance**
* Hands\-on experience implementing Power Platform governance, including DLP policies, environment strategies, Center of Excellence (CoE) Starter Kit
* Strong understanding of: Role\-based security in Dataverse
* Tenant\-level Power Platform administration
* Experience working in regulated or enterprise environments (e.g., GDPR, ISO, SOC)
* **Azure \& Microsoft Ecosystem**
* Solid experience in integrating Power Platform with Azure services (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Entra AD) and Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive)
* Experience with authentication and authorization: Entra AD, OAuth, service principals, managed identities
* **DevOps \& ALM**
* Proven experience with Power Platform ALM, including: Managed vs unmanaged solutions
* Versioning and deployment strategies
* **Experience with:**
* Azure DevOps or GitHub
* CI/CD pipelines for Power Platform
* Automated testing strategies (where applicable)
* Familiarity with source control best practices for low\-code assets
* **Development \& Customization Skills**
* Strong proficiency in: Power Fx
* JavaScript (for model\-driven apps)
* Understanding data modeling best practices and normalization
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., SOAP, REST)
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team
* Fluency in English (spoken and written)
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities


**Assets**


* K2 Five / K2 BlackPearl – Workflows, Smart Objects, Forms and Views, Administration \& Troubleshooting, End\-to\-End testing
* Certifications: PL 600 \- Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
* Experience setting up or running a Power Platform Center of Excellence
* Prior experience in citizen development enablement
* Exposure to AI Builder, Copilot Studio, or Power Platform \+ AI scenarios
* Background in enterprise integration


**Why Husky?**


**Regulated Working Hours:** Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\-being.


**Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.


**Strategic Influence:** Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.


**Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.


**Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.


**Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.


**Cutting\-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.


**Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.


**Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

a90680ae.title: Principal Solution Architect
a90680ae.description:
Dyson IT
   

  

 At Dyson, we demand the highest performance standards from the technologies we engineer. Our people expect the same from the technology that supports them.
   

  

 Global IT plays a critical role in enabling Dyson’s engineering teams to deliver world class innovation through scalable, reliable, and forward\-thinking digital platforms.
   

  

 Our RDD IT Team
   

  

 The RDD IT function has end\-to\-end accountability for the design, delivery, and support of the systems that enable Dyson’s global research, engineering, and product development communities.
   

  

**This Includes**
* Engineering platforms spanning PLM, ALM, CAE, simulation, electronics, and software development
* Integration of engineering toolchains across product lifecycle workflows
* Delivery of transformation initiatives and operational IT services across multiple global sites


 The Role
   

  

 The Principal Solution Architect is responsible for defining and governing the end\-to\-end solution architecture that supports Dyson’s global Research, Design \& Development organisation.
   

  

 Operating within the RDD IT function, this role ensures that technology solutions are designed with clarity, consistency, and alignment to both engineering requirements and enterprise architecture standards. You will translate complex business and engineering needs into structured architectural outcomes, guiding solutions from early\-stage discovery through to implementation.
   

  

 You will work closely with product owners, engineering stakeholders, delivery teams, and other architecture functions to define scalable, secure, and integrated solutions across Dyson’s engineering ecosystem. This includes shaping the evolution of core platforms such as PLM, simulation environments, electronics development, and software engineering systems.
   

  

 The role requires balancing long\-term strategic architecture with pragmatic delivery needs, ensuring that solutions are robust, maintainable, and aligned to Dyson’s global growth and engineering ambitions.
   

  

 Principal Accountabilities
   

  

 Architecture Definition \& Solution Design
   

  

* Define target\-state architectures across RDD IT, including application, integration, and deployment views
* Produce clear and structured architectural artefacts aligned to enterprise standards and business capabilities
* Ensure traceability from business requirements through to technical design and implementation
* Establish and promote architectural principles, standards, and patterns across RDD IT


 Engineering Platform Architecture
   

  

* Define and evolve architecture across key engineering platforms, including PLM (e.g. Teamcenter), ALM, CAE, and simulation ecosystems
* Design integration patterns linking application development, electronics development, simulation, and product lifecycle systems
* Ensure solutions support global collaboration, scalability, and performance requirements
* Drive architectural consistency across engineering toolchains and associated data flows


 Solution Governance \& Assurance
   

  

* Provide architectural governance across programmes, projects, and product teams
* Review and assure solution designs to ensure alignment with target architecture and standards
* Identify and manage architectural risks, dependencies, and trade\-offs
* Support governance forums and decision\-making processes related to solution design


 Delivery Alignment \& Support
   

  

* Work closely with delivery teams to guide the implementation of architectural designs
* Support solution refinement during delivery, ensuring designs remain aligned to requirements and constraints
* Provide technical leadership across project lifecycles, from discovery to deployment
* Ensure architecture supports both immediate delivery needs and long\-term sustainability


 Stakeholder Engagement \& Collaboration
   

  

* Engage with engineering, product, and IT stakeholders to understand complex requirements and translate them into architectural solutions
* Collaborate with business product owners, delivery leads, and technical teams to align priorities and outcomes
* Communicate architectural concepts clearly to both technical and non\-technical audiences
* Build strong working relationships across global teams and functions


 Technology Strategy \& Evolution
   

  

* Contribute to the development of RDD IT technology strategy and roadmap
* Identify opportunities to simplify, modernise, and improve the engineering technology landscape
* Support adoption of new technologies, including digital engineering platforms and AI\-enabled capabilities where appropriate
* Ensure alignment with enterprise technology direction and standards


 Person Specification / Core Competencies
   

  

 You must possess strong technical leadership capability, with the ability to define and communicate complex architectural solutions across a global engineering environment. You will demonstrate a structured and methodical approach to problem solving, while remaining pragmatic and delivery focused.
   

  

 Core Competencies
   

  

* Strong solution architecture capability across complex, integrated technology environments
* Ability to translate business and engineering requirements into structured technical designs
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills across technical and non\-technical audiences
* Ability to balance strategic architecture thinking with delivery pragmatism
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving capability in complex environments


**Essential**
* Significant experience in solution architecture within engineering, R\&D, or product development IT environments
* Proven experience designing complex, integrated IT systems across multiple platforms
* Strong experience with engineering toolchains such as PLM, ALM, CAE, or simulation platforms
* Experience defining integration patterns and architecture across distributed systems
* Experience working in global, matrixed organisations supporting complex delivery landscapes


 Desirable
   

  

* Experience with Siemens Teamcenter or equivalent PLM platforms
* Experience working with simulation\-led design environments and engineering toolchains
* Experience supporting large\-scale digital transformation programmes
* Experience with modern cloud\-based architectures and integration technologies
* Experience implementing or supporting AI\-enabled engineering tools or digital capabilities


 Dyson is an equal opportunity employer. We know that great minds don’t think alike, and it takes all kinds of minds to make our technology so unique. We welcome applications from all backgrounds and employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other any other dimension of diversity.

8bf13789.title: Solution Architect – Python
8bf13789.description:
We are seeking a
 **Solution Architect specializing in Python and GenAI** 
 to design and build production\-grade GenAI solutions for enterprise clients.
 



 Join our Solution Architecture team to lead technical discovery, develop reusable accelerators, and define best practices for LLM applications. Apply now to contribute to cutting\-edge GenAI projects and help clients achieve transformative results.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Design end\-to\-end GenAI architectures including RAG, Agents, and Multi\-Agent Systems for enterprise clients
* Build reusable solution accelerators and reference implementations to standardize delivery
* Lead technical discovery sessions and provide hands\-on guidance to engineering teams
* Define evaluation frameworks and establish best practices for large language model (LLM) applications
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure scalable and maintainable system designs
* Implement microservices architectures using design patterns and modern frameworks
* Oversee integration of cloud infrastructure components such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Manage containerization and orchestration using Docker and Kubernetes
* Evaluate and select vector databases like Pinecone, Weaviate, or Chroma for GenAI solutions
* Apply LLMOps practices and monitoring to optimize production deployments
* Support prompt management and RAG evaluation to enhance application accuracy
* Contribute to knowledge sharing and mentoring within the architecture group
* Ensure production\-grade code quality in Python applications
* Drive continuous improvement in system design and solution scalability







**Requirements** 



* Strong solution architecture and system design experience with 9\-14 years in software development
* Expert Python programming skills with production\-grade code quality
* Proficient in microservices, design patterns, FastAPI, Redis, Elasticsearch, and Kafka
* Extensive GenAI application development experience including Agents, MCP, RAG, Agentic RAG, and GraphRAG
* Deep knowledge of LangGraph, LangChain, and orchestration frameworks
* Practical experience in LLM evaluation, RAG evaluation, and prompt management
* Proven track record delivering scalable, production GenAI applications
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Familiarity with container technologies Docker and Kubernetes
* Knowledge of vector databases including Pinecone, Weaviate, or Chroma
* Understanding of LLMOps practices and monitoring tools
* Excellent leadership skills to guide engineering teams
* Ability to work collaboratively in a client\-facing environment
* Strong written and verbal English communication skills (B2\+)







**Nice to have** 



* Background in traditional machine learning including feature engineering, model training, and evaluation
* Experience with knowledge graphs and fine\-tuning techniques
* Prior consulting or client\-facing role experience

6bed8d13.title: AWS solution architect
6bed8d13.description:
We are seeking a highly strategic and articulate
 **AWS Cloud Architect** 
 to design, govern, and evolve our enterprise AWS . In this role, you won't just be managing cloud infrastructure—you will be the driving force behind our cloud design thinking, technical strategy, and architectural best practices.
   

  

 The ideal candidate possesses deep, practical mastery of AWS services, exhibits exceptional high\-level design thinking, and can seamlessly translate complex technical concepts to both engineering teams and executive stakeholders.
   

  

* Advanced AWS Expertise
* Proven track record designing large\-scale architectures using core and advanced AWS services (e.g., IAM, VPC, EC2, RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB, Lambda, ECS/EKS, S3, CloudFront).
* Deep understanding of Cloud Architecture Patterns (e.g., Microservices, Event\-Driven Architecture, Serverless, Multi\-region/Disaster Recovery).
